The high dimensionality and intricate spectral-spatial properties of HSI pose unique challenges for models primarily trained on RGB data.To address this gap, we introduce Hyperspectral Multimodal Benchmark (HM-Bench), the first benchmark designed specifically to evaluate MLLMs in HSI understanding. We curate a large-scale dataset of 19,337 question-answer pairs across 13 task categories, ranging from basic perception to spectral reasoning. Given that existing MLLMs are not equipped to process raw hyperspectral cubes natively, we propose a dual-modality evaluation framework that transforms HSI data into two complementary representations: PCA-based composite images and structured textual reports. This approach facilitates a systematic comparison of different representation for model performance. Extensive evaluations on 18 representative MLLMs reveal significant difficulties in handling complex spatial-spectral reasoning tasks. Furthermore, our results demonstrate that visual inputs generally outperform textual inputs, highlighting the importance of grounding in spectral-spatial evidence for effective HSI understanding. Dataset and appendix can be accessed at https://github.com/HuoRiLi-Yu/HM-Bench.

</details>


### [74] [Precise Shield: Explaining and Aligning VLLM Safety via Neuron-Level Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08881)
*Enyi Shi,Fei Shen,Shuyi Miao,Linxia Zhu,Pengyang Shao,Jinhui Tang,Tat-Seng Chua*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Precise Shield框架，通过识别安全神经元并限制参数更新在子空间内，提升多语言多模态VLLM的安全性，同时保持泛化能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实部署中，VLLM面临多语言多模态复合攻击的挑战：有害图像与低资源语言文本组合可绕过为高资源语言设计的防御，暴露当前跨语言跨模态安全方法的结构性盲点

Method: 提出两阶段框架：1) 通过对比有害与良性输入的激活模式识别安全神经元；2) 通过梯度掩码将参数更新严格限制在该子空间内，影响少于0.03%的参数

Result: 显著提升安全性同时保持多语言多模态泛化能力；分析显示安全神经元在语言和模态间存在适度重叠，支持零样本跨语言跨模态安全能力迁移

Conclusion: Precise Shield为神经元级、基于迁移的安全增强提供了新方向，通过精准定位和约束安全神经元，有效应对多语言多模态复合攻击

Abstract: In real-world deployments, Vision-Language Large Models (VLLMs) face critical challenges from multilingual and multimodal composite attacks: harmful images paired with low-resource language texts can easily bypass defenses designed for high-resource language scenarios, exposing structural blind spots in current cross-lingual and cross-modal safety methods. This raises a mechanistic question: where is safety capability instantiated within the model, and how is it distributed across languages and modalities? Prior studies on pure-text LLMs have identified cross-lingual shared safety neurons, suggesting that safety may be governed by a small subset of critical neurons. Leveraging this insight, we propose Precise Shield, a two-stage framework that first identifies safety neurons by contrasting activation patterns between harmful and benign inputs, and then constrains parameter updates strictly within this subspace via gradient masking with affecting fewer than 0.03% of parameters. This strategy substantially improves safety while preserving multilingual and multimodal generalization. Further analysis reveals a moderate overlap of safety neurons across languages and modalities, enabling zero-shot cross-lingual and cross-modal transfer of safety capabilities, and offering a new direction for neuron-level, transfer-based safety enhancement.

</details>


### [75] [MoRight: Motion Control Done Right](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07348)
*Shaowei Liu,Xuanchi Ren,Tianchang Shen,Huan Ling,Saurabh Gupta,Shenlong Wang,Sanja Fidler,Jun Gao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MoRight：一个解耦运动建模框架，支持用户分别控制物体运动和相机视角，并学习主动运动与被动反应之间的因果关系，实现运动控制视频生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法存在两个主要问题：1) 将相机运动和物体运动耦合到单一跟踪信号中，无法分别控制；2) 将运动视为运动学位移，未建模物体间的因果关系。需要同时解决这两个限制。

Method: 提出MoRight统一框架：1) 在静态规范视图中指定物体运动，通过时间跨视图注意力转移到任意目标相机视角，实现相机与物体运动的解耦控制；2) 将运动分解为主动（用户驱动）和被动（后果）分量，从数据中学习运动因果关系；3) 支持前向推理（给定主动运动预测后果）和逆向推理（指定被动结果恢复驱动动作）。

Result: 在三个基准测试中展示了最先进的性能，包括生成质量、运动可控性和交互感知能力。

Conclusion: MoRight通过解耦运动建模解决了现有方法的局限性，实现了用户可分别控制物体运动和相机视角，并建模了运动因果关系，为运动控制视频生成提供了统一框架。

Abstract: Generating motion-controlled videos--where user-specified actions drive physically plausible scene dynamics under freely chosen viewpoints--demands two capabilities: (1) disentangled motion control, allowing users to separately control the object motion and adjust camera viewpoint; and (2) motion causality, ensuring that user-driven actions trigger coherent reactions from other objects rather than merely displacing pixels. Existing methods fall short on both fronts: they entangle camera and object motion into a single tracking signal and treat motion as kinematic displacement without modeling causal relationships between object motion. We introduce MoRight, a unified framework that addresses both limitations through disentangled motion modeling. Object motion is specified in a canonical static-view and transferred to an arbitrary target camera viewpoint via temporal cross-view attention, enabling disentangled camera and object control. We further decompose motion into active (user-driven) and passive (consequence) components, training the model to learn motion causality from data. At inference, users can either supply active motion and MoRight predicts consequences (forward reasoning), or specify desired passive outcomes and MoRight recovers plausible driving actions (inverse reasoning), all while freely adjusting the camera viewpoint. Experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance in generation quality, motion controllability, and interaction awareness.

</details>


### [76] [Harnessing Weak Pair Uncertainty for Text-based Person Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08877)
*Jintao Sun,Zhedong Zheng,Gangyi Ding*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种不确定性感知方法用于基于文本的行人搜索，通过显式估计图像-文本对的不确定性并自适应调整损失权重，充分利用弱正样本对提升检索性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于文本的行人搜索方法通常专注于视觉和文本模态之间的严格一对一对应匹配（如对比学习），这种范式无意中忽略了弱正样本图像-文本对（即同一行人但文本描述来自不同视角/摄像头）。为了充分利用这些弱正样本，需要一种能够处理这种不确定性的方法。

Method: 提出包含两个模块的不确定性感知方法：1) 不确定性估计模块，获取给定正样本对的相对置信度；2) 不确定性正则化模块，基于预测的不确定性自适应调整损失权重。此外，引入组级图像-文本匹配损失以进一步促进弱正样本对之间的表示空间学习。

Result: 在三个广泛使用的数据集（CUHK-PEDES、RSTPReid和ICFG-PEDES）上进行大量实验，与现有竞争方法相比，mAP分别提升了3.06%、3.55%和6.94%。

Conclusion: 所提出的不确定性感知方法能够显式防止模型推开潜在的弱正样本候选，有效利用了弱正样本对，显著提升了基于文本的行人搜索性能。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the text-based person search, which is to retrieve the person of interest via natural language description. Prevailing methods usually focus on the strict one-to-one correspondence pair matching between the visual and textual modality, such as contrastive learning. However, such a paradigm unintentionally disregards the weak positive image-text pairs, which are of the same person but the text descriptions are annotated from different views (cameras). To take full use of weak positives, we introduce an uncertainty-aware method to explicitly estimate image-text pair uncertainty, and incorporate the uncertainty into the optimization procedure in a smooth manner. Specifically, our method contains two modules: uncertainty estimation and uncertainty regularization. (1) Uncertainty estimation is to obtain the relative confidence on the given positive pairs; (2) Based on the predicted uncertainty, we propose the uncertainty regularization to adaptively adjust loss weight. Additionally, we introduce a group-wise image-text matching loss to further facilitate the representation space among the weak pairs. Compared with existing methods, the proposed method explicitly prevents the model from pushing away potentially weak positive candidates. Extensive experiments on three widely-used datasets, .e.g, CUHK-PEDES, RSTPReid and ICFG-PEDES, verify the mAP improvement of our method against existing competitive methods +3.06%, +3.55% and +6.94%, respectively.

</details>


### [77] [BIAS: A Biologically Inspired Algorithm for Video Saliency Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08858)
*Zhao-ji Zhang,Ya-tang Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: BIAS是一个快速、受生物启发的动态视觉显著性检测模型，用于连续视频流分析，结合静态和运动信息，在交通事故事件分析中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个既具有生物合理性又计算高效的动态视觉显著性检测模型，能够实时处理视频流，特别适用于需要快速响应的实际应用场景如交通事故分析。

Method: 基于Itti-Koch框架，集成视网膜启发的运动检测器提取时间特征，使用贪婪多高斯峰值拟合算法识别注意力焦点，平衡赢家通吃竞争与信息最大化。

Result: BIAS在DHF1K数据集上优于启发式方法和多个深度学习模型，特别是在自下而上注意力主导的视频中；在交通事故分析中实现最先进的因果识别性能，能提前0.72秒预测事故。

Conclusion: BIAS成功桥接了生物合理性与计算效率，实现了可解释、高速的动态显著性检测，在实时视频分析和实际应用场景中具有强大实用性。

Abstract: We present BIAS, a fast, biologically inspired model for dynamic visual saliency detection in continuous video streams. Building on the Itti--Koch framework, BIAS incorporates a retina-inspired motion detector to extract temporal features, enabling the generation of saliency maps that integrate both static and motion information. Foci of attention (FOAs) are identified using a greedy multi-Gaussian peak-fitting algorithm that balances winner-take-all competition with information maximization. BIAS detects salient regions with millisecond-scale latency and outperforms heuristic-based approaches and several deep-learning models on the DHF1K dataset, particularly in videos dominated by bottom-up attention. Applied to traffic accident analysis, BIAS demonstrates strong real-world utility, achieving state-of-the-art performance in cause-effect recognition and anticipating accidents up to 0.72 seconds before manual annotation with reliable accuracy. Overall, BIAS bridges biological plausibility and computational efficiency to achieve interpretable, high-speed dynamic saliency detection.

</details>


### [78] [DeFakeQ: Enabling Real-Time Deepfake Detection on Edge Devices via Adaptive Bidirectional Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08847)
*Xiangyu Li,Yujing Sun,Yuhang Zheng,Yuexin Ma,Kwok-Yan Lam*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DefakeQ是首个专门为深度伪造检测器设计的量化框架，通过自适应双向压缩策略在边缘设备上实现实时检测


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法计算密集、参数量大，难以部署到资源受限的边缘设备进行实时推理。同时，由于需要捕捉极其细微的伪造痕迹，现有量化技术通常会损害这些敏感特征，导致性能显著下降

Method: 提出DefakeQ量化框架，采用新颖的自适应双向压缩策略，同时利用特征相关性并消除冗余，在模型紧凑性和检测性能之间实现有效平衡

Result: 在5个基准数据集和11个最先进的骨干检测器上进行广泛实验，DefakeQ始终优于现有的量化和模型压缩基线方法。在实际移动设备部署中展示了实时深度伪造检测能力

Conclusion: DefakeQ是首个专门为深度伪造检测器设计的量化框架，成功解决了边缘设备部署中的计算效率和性能保持问题，具有实际应用价值

Abstract: Deepfake detection has become a fundamental component of modern media forensics. Despite significant progress in detection accuracy, most existing methods remain computationally intensive and parameter-heavy, limiting their deployment on resource-constrained edge devices that require real-time, on-site inference. This limitation is particularly critical in an era where mobile devices are extensively used for media-centric applications, including online payments, virtual meetings, and social networking. Meanwhile, due to the unique requirement of capturing extremely subtle forgery artifacts for deepfake detection, state-of-the-art quantization techniques usually underperform for such a challenging task. These fine-grained cues are highly sensitive to model compression and can be easily degraded during quantization, leading to noticeable performance drops. This challenge highlights the need for quantization strategies specifically designed to preserve the discriminative features essential for reliable deepfake detection. To address this gap, we propose DefakeQ, the first quantization framework tailored for deepfake detectors, enabling real-time deployment on edge devices. Our approach introduces a novel adaptive bidirectional compression strategy that simultaneously leverages feature correlations and eliminates redundancy, achieving an effective balance between model compactness and detection performance. Extensive experiments across five benchmark datasets and eleven state-of-the-art backbone detectors demonstrate that DeFakeQ consistently surpasses existing quantization and model compression baselines. Furthermore, we deploy DefakeQ on mobile devices in real-world scenarios, demonstrating its capability for real-time deepfake detection and its practical applicability in edge environments.

</details>


### [79] [CatalogStitch: Dimension-Aware and Occlusion-Preserving Object Compositing for Catalog Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08836)
*Sanyam Jain,Pragya Kandari,Manit Singhal,He Zhang,Soo Ye Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CatalogStitch：自动化产品目录图像合成的模型无关技术，通过维度感知掩码计算和遮挡感知混合修复，减少手动干预


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成式对象合成方法在真实世界产品目录图像生成中需要大量手动干预：用户必须根据产品尺寸调整掩码，并在生成后费力修复被遮挡元素

Method: 1. 维度感知掩码计算算法：自动调整目标区域以适应不同尺寸产品；2. 遮挡感知混合修复方法：保证像素级完美保留遮挡元素；3. 创建CatalogStitch-Eval基准测试集（58个示例）

Result: 在三种最先进的合成模型（ObjectStitch、OmniPaint、InsertAnything）上评估，在多样化目录场景中展示了一致的改进效果

Conclusion: 通过减少手动干预和自动化繁琐修正，CatalogStitch将生成式合成转变为实用的、人性化的生产目录工作流程工具

Abstract: Generative object compositing methods have shown remarkable ability to seamlessly insert objects into scenes. However, when applied to real-world catalog image generation, these methods require tedious manual intervention: users must carefully adjust masks when product dimensions differ, and painstakingly restore occluded elements post-generation. We present CatalogStitch, a set of model-agnostic techniques that automate these corrections, enabling user-friendly content creation. Our dimension-aware mask computation algorithm automatically adapts the target region to accommodate products with different dimensions; users simply provide a product image and background, without manual mask adjustments. Our occlusion-aware hybrid restoration method guarantees pixel-perfect preservation of occluding elements, eliminating post-editing workflows. We additionally introduce CatalogStitch-Eval, a 58-example benchmark covering aspect-ratio mismatch and occlusion-heavy catalog scenarios, together with supplementary PDF and HTML viewers. We evaluate our techniques with three state-of-the-art compositing models (ObjectStitch, OmniPaint, and InsertAnything), demonstrating consistent improvements across diverse catalog scenarios. By reducing manual intervention and automating tedious corrections, our approach transforms generative compositing into a practical, human-friendly tool for production catalog workflows.

</details>


### [80] [SenBen: Sensitive Scene Graphs for Explainable Content Moderation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08819)
*Fatih Cagatay Akyon,Alptekin Temizel*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出SenBen基准，首个大规模敏感内容场景图数据集，并开发高效多任务模型，在敏感内容检测和场景图生成上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有内容审核系统只能分类图像是否安全，但缺乏空间定位和可解释性：无法解释检测到什么敏感行为、涉及谁、发生在哪里。

Method: 构建SenBen基准（13,999帧电影图像，含场景图标注）；使用多任务蒸馏方法将前沿VLM压缩为241M学生模型，采用后缀对象标识、词汇感知召回损失和解耦Query2Label标签头等技术。

Result: 学生模型在SenBen召回率上比标准交叉熵训练提升+6.4个百分点；在场景图指标上超越除Gemini外的所有VLM和商业安全API；物体检测和字幕生成得分最高，推理速度快7.6倍，GPU内存减少16倍。

Conclusion: SenBen基准填补了敏感内容场景图数据空白，提出的高效多任务模型在敏感内容检测和场景理解方面表现出色，为可解释内容审核提供了新方向。

Abstract: Content moderation systems classify images as safe or unsafe but lack spatial grounding and interpretability: they cannot explain what sensitive behavior was detected, who is involved, or where it occurs. We introduce the Sensitive Benchmark (SenBen), the first large-scale scene graph benchmark for sensitive content, comprising 13,999 frames from 157 movies annotated with Visual Genome-style scene graphs (25 object classes, 28 attributes including affective states such as pain, fear, aggression, and distress, 14 predicates) and 16 sensitivity tags across 5 categories. We distill a frontier VLM into a compact 241M student model using a multi-task recipe that addresses vocabulary imbalance in autoregressive scene graph generation through suffix-based object identity, Vocabulary-Aware Recall (VAR) Loss, and a decoupled Query2Label tag head with asymmetric loss, yielding a +6.4 percentage point improvement in SenBen Recall over standard cross-entropy training. On grounded scene graph metrics, our student model outperforms all evaluated VLMs except Gemini models and all commercial safety APIs, while achieving the highest object detection and captioning scores across all models, at $7.6\times$ faster inference and $16\times$ less GPU memory.

</details>


### [81] [Towards Responsible Multimodal Medical Reasoning via Context-Aligned Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08815)
*Sumra Khan,Sagar Chhabriya,Aizan Zafar,Sheeraz Arif,Amgad Muneer,Anas Zafar,Shaina Raza,Rizwan Qureshi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出上下文对齐推理框架，通过强制异质临床证据间的一致性来改善医学视觉语言模型的可靠性和可信度，减少幻觉并保持校准的不确定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学视觉语言模型在放射学任务中表现出色，但常因过度依赖主导模态而产生流畅但弱基础性的结论，需要提高其推理的可靠性和可信度。

Method: 在冻结的VLM基础上，引入从放射组学统计、可解释性激活和词汇基础语义线索中提取的结构化上下文信号，通过上下文验证整合这些信号，生成包含支持证据、不确定性估计、局限性和安全说明的结构化输出。

Result: 在胸部X光数据集上，上下文对齐将AUC从0.918提升至0.925，减少幻觉关键词（1.14至0.25），缩短推理解释（19.4至15.3词），同时保持校准的不确定性（0.70至0.68）。跨数据集评估显示模态信息性显著影响推理行为。

Conclusion: 强制多证据一致性可显著改善医学多模态推理的可靠性和可信度，同时保留底层模型架构，为构建更安全可靠的临床决策支持系统提供有效途径。

Abstract: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) show strong performance on radiology tasks but often produce fluent yet weakly grounded conclusions due to over-reliance on a dominant modality. We introduce a context-aligned reasoning framework that enforces agreement across heterogeneous clinical evidence before generating diagnostic conclusions. The proposed approach augments a frozen VLM with structured contextual signals derived from radiomic statistics, explainability activations, and vocabulary-grounded semantic cues. Instead of producing free-form responses, the model generates structured outputs containing supporting evidence, uncertainty estimates, limitations, and safety notes. We observe that auxiliary signals alone provide limited benefit; performance gains emerge only when these signals are integrated through contextual verification. Experiments on chest X-ray datasets demonstrate that context alignment improves discriminative performance (AUC 0.918 to 0.925) while maintaining calibrated uncertainty. The framework also substantially reduces hallucinated keywords (1.14 to 0.25) and produces more concise reasoning explanations (19.4 to 15.3 words) without increasing model confidence (0.70 to 0.68). Cross-dataset evaluation on CheXpert further reveals that modality informativeness significantly influences reasoning behavior. These results suggest that enforcing multi-evidence agreement improves both reliability and trustworthiness in medical multimodal reasoning, while preserving the underlying model architecture.

</details>


### [82] [R2G: A Multi-View Circuit Graph Benchmark Suite from RTL to GDSII](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08810)
*Zewei Zhou,Jiajun Zou,Jiajia Zhang,Ao Yang,Ruichao He,Haozheng Zhou,Ao Liu,Jiawei Liu,Leilei Jin,Shan Shen,Daying Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: R2G是一个多视图电路图基准套件，提供从RTL到GDSII的标准化电路表示，用于评估GNN在物理设计任务中的性能，解决了现有基准中表示不一致和评估协议缺失的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前GNN在物理设计任务（如拥塞预测和线长估计）中的应用受到两个主要限制：1）电路表示不一致，不同研究使用不同的图结构；2）缺乏受控的评估协议，难以公平比较不同方法。这阻碍了该领域的进展。

Method: R2G提供了从DEF到图的端到端流水线，覆盖综合、布局和布线阶段。它标准化了五个阶段感知的视图，确保信息对等（每个视图编码相同的属性集，仅在特征附着位置不同）。基准套件包含30个开源IP核（最多10^6个节点/边），并提供加载器、统一分割、领域指标和可复现基线。

Result: 通过使用GINE、GAT和ResGatedGCN进行系统研究，发现：1）视图选择比模型选择更重要，固定GNN在不同表示下的测试R²差异超过0.3；2）节点中心视图在布局和布线任务中泛化能力最好；3）解码器头深度（3-4层）是准确性的主要驱动因素，能将差异较大的训练结果转变为接近完美的预测（R²>0.99）。

Conclusion: R2G通过解耦表示选择与模型选择，隔离了先前EDA和图机器学习基准中未受控制的混杂因素。该基准套件为公平评估GNN在物理设计任务中的性能提供了标准化框架，揭示了电路表示选择对模型性能的关键影响。

Abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are increasingly applied to physical design tasks such as congestion prediction and wirelength estimation, yet progress is hindered by inconsistent circuit representations and the absence of controlled evaluation protocols. We present R2G (RTL-to-GDSII), a multi-view circuit-graph benchmark suite that standardizes five stage-aware views with information parity (every view encodes the same attribute set, differing only in where features attach) over 30 open-source IP cores (up to $10^6$ nodes/edges). R2G provides an end-to-end DEF-to-graph pipeline spanning synthesis, placement, and routing stages, together with loaders, unified splits, domain metrics, and reproducible baselines. By decoupling representation choice from model choice, R2G isolates a confound that prior EDA and graph-ML benchmarks leave uncontrolled. In systematic studies with GINE, GAT, and ResGatedGCN, we find: (i) view choice dominates model choice, with Test R$^2$ varying by more than 0.3 across representations for a fixed GNN; (ii) node-centric views generalize best across both placement and routing; and (iii) decoder-head depth (3--4 layers) is the primary accuracy driver, turning divergent training into near-perfect predictions (R$^2$$>$0.99). Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/ShenShan123/R2G.

</details>


### [83] [SIC3D: Style Image Conditioned Text-to-3D Gaussian Splatting Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08760)
*Ming He,Zhixiang Chen,Steve Maddock*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SIC3D是一个可控的图像条件文本到3D生成管道，使用3D高斯泼溅技术，通过两阶段方法实现文本生成3D对象并参考图像进行风格化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本到3D对象生成方法存在可控性有限和纹理模糊的问题，这源于文本模态的局限性。需要一种能够结合图像参考进行精确风格控制的方法。

Method: SIC3D采用两阶段管道：第一阶段使用文本到3DGS生成模型从文本生成3D对象内容；第二阶段通过变分风格化分数蒸馏（VSSD）损失将参考图像风格转移到3DGS，并应用缩放正则化防止伪影。

Result: 实验表明SIC3D在几何保真度和风格一致性方面优于先前方法，通过定性和定量评估验证了其有效性。

Conclusion: SIC3D通过结合文本生成和图像条件风格化，解决了文本到3D生成中的可控性和纹理模糊问题，实现了高质量的3D对象生成与风格控制。

Abstract: Recent progress in text-to-3D object generation enables the synthesis of detailed geometry from text input by leveraging 2D diffusion models and differentiable 3D representations. However, the approaches often suffer from limited controllability and texture ambiguity due to the limitation of the text modality. To address this, we present SIC3D, a controllable image-conditioned text-to-3D generation pipeline with 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS). There are two stages in SIC3D. The first stage generates the 3D object content from text with a text-to-3DGS generation model. The second stage transfers style from a reference image to the 3DGS. Within this stylization stage, we introduce a novel Variational Stylized Score Distillation (VSSD) loss to effectively capture both global and local texture patterns while mitigating conflicts between geometry and appearance. A scaling regularization is further applied to prevent the emergence of artifacts and preserve the pattern from the style image. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SIC3D enhances geometric fidelity and style adherence, outperforming prior approaches in both qualitative and quantitative evaluations.

</details>


### [84] [LPLCv2: An Expanded Dataset for Fine-Grained License Plate Legibility Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08741)
*Lucas Wojcik,Eduardo A. F. Machoski,Eduil Nascimento,Rayson Laroca,David Menotti*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LPLCv2数据集扩展了车牌识别基准，增加了数据规模、修正了标注错误，并引入了新的标注类别，同时提出了改进的训练方法和评估协议，显著提升了车牌识别性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有车牌识别系统在受控场景下表现良好，但在大规模实际应用中面临低质量图像设备、压缩伪影和相机安装不当等挑战。现有的车牌可读性基准数据集规模小且存在标注错误，限制了其影响力。

Method: 1. 扩展原始基准数据集至三倍规模，增加两个额外采集日；2. 修订标注并引入新标签：车牌级（边界框、文本、可读性级别）、车辆级（品牌、型号、类型、颜色）、图像级（相机标识、采集条件、时间、日ID）；3. 提出新的训练过程：基于指数移动平均的损失函数和细化的学习率调度器；4. 引入新的评估协议，明确处理训练和评估分割中的相机污染问题。

Result: 基线模型在测试集上达到89.5%的F1分数，显著超越先前最先进水平。新评估协议显示相机污染对结果影响较小。数据集和代码已公开。

Conclusion: LPLCv2数据集通过大规模扩展、标注改进和新评估协议，为车牌识别研究提供了更全面、可靠的基准。提出的训练方法有效提升了模型性能，为实际应用中的车牌识别挑战提供了解决方案。

Abstract: Modern Automatic License Plate Recognition (ALPR) systems achieve outstanding performance in controlled, well-defined scenarios. However, large-scale real-world usage remains challenging due to low-quality imaging devices, compression artifacts, and suboptimal camera installation. Identifying illegible license plates (LPs) has recently become feasible through a dedicated benchmark; however, its impact has been limited by its small size and annotation errors. In this work, we expand the original benchmark to over three times the size with two extra capture days, revise its annotations and introduce novel labels. LP-level annotations include bounding boxes, text, and legibility level, while vehicle-level annotations comprise make, model, type, and color. Image-level annotations feature camera identity, capture conditions (e.g., rain and faulty cameras), acquisition time, and day ID. We present a novel training procedure featuring an Exponential Moving Average-based loss function and a refined learning rate scheduler, addressing common mistakes in testing. These improvements enable a baseline model to achieve an 89.5% F1-score on the test set, considerably surpassing the previous state of the art. We further introduce a novel protocol to explicitly addresses camera contamination between training and evaluation splits, where results show a small impact. Dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/lmlwojcik/LPLCv2-Dataset.

</details>


### [85] [AI Driven Soccer Analysis Using Computer Vision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08722)
*Adrian Manchado,Tanner Cellio,Jonathan Keane,Yiyang Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出结合目标检测、分割跟踪和关键点检测的计算机视觉系统，用于足球比赛视频分析，将球员位置从摄像机视角转换到真实场地坐标，提供战术洞察数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 体育分析对团队表现至关重要，但传统视频分析难以提取复杂特征。需要计算机视觉模型从比赛录像中识别和跟踪关键实体，提供更精确的球员位置和战术数据。

Method: 1) 使用YOLO和Faster R-CNN等目标检测模型识别球员，结合SAM2进行分割和跟踪；2) 使用CNN模型检测场地关键点；3) 通过单应性变换将摄像机视角的位置转换为真实场地坐标；4) 计算球员速度、跑动距离、位置热图等战术指标。

Result: 系统能够将分割后的球员掩码从摄像机视角转换到真实世界场地坐标，无论摄像机角度或运动如何。转换后的坐标可用于计算球员速度、覆盖距离、位置热图等有价值的战术洞察。

Conclusion: 提出的计算机视觉系统能够为教练和球员提供传统视频分析无法获得的可操作性能数据，通过准确的目标检测、分割跟踪和单应性变换，实现从视频到真实场地坐标的精确转换。

Abstract: Sport analysis is crucial for team performance since it provides actionable data that can inform coaching decisions, improve player performance, and enhance team strategies. To analyze more complex features from game footage, a computer vision model can be used to identify and track key entities from the field. We propose the use of an object detection and tracking system to predict player positioning throughout the game. To translate this to positioning in relation to the field dimensions, we use a point prediction model to identify key points on the field and combine these with known field dimensions to extract actual distances. For the player-identification model, object detection models like YOLO and Faster R-CNN are evaluated on the accuracy of our custom video footage using multiple different evaluation metrics. The goal is to identify the best model for object identification to obtain the most accurate results when paired with SAM2 (Segment Anything Model 2) for segmentation and tracking. For the key point detection model, we use a CNN model to find consistent locations in the soccer field. Through homography, the positions of points and objects in the camera perspective will be transformed to a real-ground perspective. The segmented player masks from SAM2 are transformed from camera perspective to real-world field coordinates through homography, regardless of camera angle or movement. The transformed real-world coordinates can be used to calculate valuable tactical insights including player speed, distance covered, positioning heatmaps, and more complex team statistics, providing coaches and players with actionable performance data previously unavailable from standard video analysis.

</details>


### [86] [What Matters in Virtual Try-Off? Dual-UNet Diffusion Model For Garment Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08716)
*Loc-Phat Truong,Meysam Madadi,Sergio Escalera*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文研究了虚拟试穿的反问题——虚拟脱衣（VTOFF），通过系统分析扩散模型架构的三个设计维度（生成主干、条件化策略、损失函数与训练策略），在VITON-HD和DressCode数据集上实现了最先进的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虚拟试穿（VTON）领域已取得快速进展，但其反问题——从穿着图像重建规范服装的虚拟脱衣（VTOFF）——仍然是一个研究不足的领域。本文旨在为VTOFF建立一个稳健的架构基础，通过研究和适配VTON及潜在扩散模型中的各种策略。

Method: 采用Dual-UNet扩散模型架构，系统研究三个设计维度：(1) 生成主干：比较不同Stable Diffusion变体；(2) 条件化策略：消融不同掩码设计、掩码/非掩码输入条件化、高层语义特征的效用；(3) 损失函数与训练策略：评估辅助注意力损失、感知目标函数和多阶段课程学习计划的影响。

Result: 在VITON-HD和DressCode数据集上的广泛实验揭示了各种配置选项之间的权衡。该框架在主要指标DISTS上实现了9.5%的下降，在LPIPS、FID、KID和SSIM等指标上表现出竞争力，达到了最先进的性能水平。

Conclusion: 本研究为虚拟脱衣（VTOFF）领域建立了稳健的架构基础，通过系统分析扩散模型的关键设计维度，提供了更强的基准和指导未来研究的见解，填补了虚拟试穿反问题研究的空白。

Abstract: Virtual Try-On (VTON) has seen rapid advancements, providing a strong foundation for generative fashion tasks. However, the inverse problem, Virtual Try-Off (VTOFF)-aimed at reconstructing the canonical garment from a draped-on image-remains a less understood domain, distinct from the heavily researched field of VTON. In this work, we seek to establish a robust architectural foundation for VTOFF by studying and adapting various diffusion-based strategies from VTON and general Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs). We focus our investigation on the Dual-UNet Diffusion Model architecture and analyze three axes of design: (i) Generation Backbone: comparing Stable Diffusion variants; (ii) Conditioning: ablating different mask designs, masked/unmasked inputs for image conditioning, and the utility of high-level semantic features; and (iii) Losses and Training Strategies: evaluating the impact of the auxiliary attention-based loss, perceptual objectives and multi-stage curriculum schedules. Extensive experiments reveal trade-offs across various configuration options. Evaluated on VITON-HD and DressCode datasets, our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance with a drop of 9.5\% on the primary metric DISTS and competitive performance on LPIPS, FID, KID, and SSIM, providing both stronger baselines and insights to guide future Virtual Try-Off research.

</details>


### [87] [VGGT-SLAM++](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06830)
*Avilasha Mandal,Rajesh Kumar,Sudarshan Sunil Harithas,Chetan Arora*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: VGGT-SLAM++是基于视觉几何基础Transformer的完整SLAM系统，通过融合VGGT前馈变换器和Sim(3)解算、DEM图构建模块和空间校正后端，实现高精度大规模建图，显著减少短期漂移并保持全局一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决现有基于Transformer的SLAM系统（如VGGT-SLAM）主要依赖稀疏闭环或全局Sim(3)流形约束导致的短期姿态漂移问题，恢复高频局部束调整以稳定轨迹。

Method: 系统包含三个核心模块：1）融合VGGT前馈变换器和Sim(3)解算的视觉里程计前端；2）构建密集平面规范DEM并分区计算DINOv2嵌入的DEM图构建模块；3）通过视觉地点识别在共视窗口内检索空间邻居并触发频繁局部优化的空间校正后端。

Result: 在标准SLAM基准测试中达到最先进精度，显著减少短期漂移，加速图收敛，并通过紧凑DEM瓦片和亚线性检索保持全局一致性。

Conclusion: VGGT-SLAM++通过恢复高频局部束调整和空间校正后端，有效解决了Transformer-based SLAM系统的短期漂移问题，实现了高精度、大规模建图，同时保持内存边界。

Abstract: We introduce VGGT-SLAM++, a complete visual SLAM system that leverages the geometry-rich outputs of the Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT). The system comprises a visual odometry (front-end) fusing the VGGT feed-forward transformer and a Sim(3) solution, a Digital Elevation Map (DEM)-based graph construction module, and a back-end that jointly enable accurate large-scale mapping with bounded memory. While prior transformer-based SLAM pipelines such as VGGT-SLAM rely primarily on sparse loop closures or global Sim(3) manifold constraints - allowing short-horizon pose drift - VGGT-SLAM++ restores high-cadence local bundle adjustment (LBA) through a spatially corrective back-end. For each VGGT submap, we construct a dense planar-canonical DEM, partition it into patches, and compute their DINOv2 embeddings to integrate the submap into a covisibility graph. Spatial neighbors are retrieved using a Visual Place Recognition (VPR) module within the covisibility window, triggering frequent local optimization that stabilizes trajectories. Across standard SLAM benchmarks, VGGT-SLAM++ achieves state-of-the-art accuracy, substantially reducing short-term drift, accelerating graph convergence, and maintaining global consistency with compact DEM tiles and sublinear retrieval.

</details>


### [88] [RS-OVC: Open-Vocabulary Counting for Remote-Sensing Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08704)
*Tamir Shor,George Leifman,Genady Beryozkin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 首个面向遥感图像的开源词汇计数模型RS-OVC，能够基于文本和视觉条件对训练中未见的新物体类别进行准确计数


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有遥感物体计数方法局限于预定义的封闭类别集，需要昂贵的重新标注和模型重新训练才能适应新物体计数，限制了在动态实时监测场景中的应用

Method: 提出RS-OVC模型，首个面向遥感图像的开源词汇计数模型，能够基于文本和/或视觉条件进行计数

Result: 模型能够准确计数训练中未见的新物体类别，展示了在动态监测场景中的潜力

Conclusion: RS-OVC解决了遥感物体计数中的类别封闭性问题，为动态实时监测应用提供了更灵活的解决方案

Abstract: Object-Counting for remote-sensing (RS) imagery is attracting increasing research interest due to its crucial role in a wide and diverse set of applications. While several promising methods for RS object-counting have been proposed, existing methods focus on a closed, pre-defined set of object classes. This limitation necessitates costly re-annotation and model re-training to adapt current approaches for counting of novel objects that have not been seen during training, and severely inhibits their application in dynamic, real-world monitoring scenarios. To address this gap, in this work we propose RS-OVC - the first Open Vocabulary Counting (OVC) model for Remote-Sensing and aerial imagery. We show that our model is capable of accurate counting of novel object classes, that were unseen during training, based solely on textual and/or visual conditioning.

</details>


### [89] [Unified Multimodal Uncertain Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08701)
*Dengjia Zhang,Alexander Martin,William Jurayj,Kenton Murray,Benjamin Van Durme,Reno Kriz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出UMUI统一多模态不确定推理任务，涵盖文本、音频和视频，要求模型在任意模态或组合下对假设产生校准的概率估计，并引入CLUE方法实现校准预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有不确定推理研究主要局限于文本领域，其他模态仅涉及单模态二元蕴含判断，缺乏跨模态细粒度概率推理框架，需要建立统一的多模态不确定推理评估体系。

Method: 构建人工标注的多模态评估集（音频、视觉、视听），引入CLUE方法，结合自洽教师校准和基于分布的置信度探测来产生校准预测。

Result: 3B参数模型在所有模态上达到或优于32B参数基线的性能，在音频、视觉、视听设置中均表现出色，并在现有文本和音频基准测试中取得良好结果。

Conclusion: UMUI为多模态不确定推理提供了统一框架，CLUE方法通过校准技术显著提升了模型性能，证明了小参数模型通过适当校准可以实现与大模型相当甚至更好的多模态推理能力。

Abstract: We introduce Unified Multimodal Uncertain Inference (UMUI), a multimodal inference task spanning text, audio, and video, where models must produce calibrated probability estimates of hypotheses conditioned on a premise in any modality or combination. While uncertain inference has been explored in text, extension to other modalities has been limited to single-modality binary entailment judgments, leaving no framework for fine-grained probabilistic reasoning in or across other modalities. To address this, we curate a human-annotated evaluation set with scalar probability judgments across audio, visual, and audiovisual settings, and additionally evaluate on existing text and audio benchmarks. We introduce CLUE (Calibrated Latent Uncertainty Estimation), which combines self-consistent teacher calibration and distribution-based confidence probing to produce calibrated predictions. We demonstrate that our 3B-parameter model achieves equivalent or stronger performance than baselines up to 32B parameters across all modalities.

</details>


### [90] [EfficientSign: An Attention-Enhanced Lightweight Architecture for Indian Sign Language Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08694)
*Rishabh Gupta,Shravya R. Nalla*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EfficientSign：基于EfficientNet-B0和双注意力模块的轻量级印度手语字母识别模型，在手机端实现高效部署，参数量减少62%的同时达到99.94%准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发能够在手机上运行的轻量级手语识别系统，解决传统方法需要大规模模型或手动特征工程的限制，为印度手语字母识别提供高效部署方案。

Method: 提出EfficientSign模型，以EfficientNet-B0为基础架构，集成两个注意力模块：通道注意力（Squeeze-and-Excitation）和空间注意力层（专注于手势区域）。在12,637张印度手语字母图像（26个类别）上使用5折交叉验证进行评估，并与ResNet18等5种方法对比。同时将EfficientNet-B0池化层的1,280维深度特征输入传统分类器（SVM、逻辑回归、KNN）进行实验。

Result: EfficientSign达到99.94%准确率（±0.05%），与ResNet18的99.97%相当，但参数量减少62%（4.2M vs 11.2M）。深度特征结合传统分类器：SVM 99.63%、逻辑回归99.03%、KNN 96.33%，均显著超越2015年SURF方法的92%。

Conclusion: 注意力增强的轻量学习模型为印度手语识别提供了高效可部署的解决方案，无需大规模模型或手动特征工程，在手机端具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: How do you build a sign language recognizer that works on a phone? That question drove this work. We built EfficientSign, a lightweight model which takes EfficientNet-B0 and focuses on two attention modules (Squeeze-and-Excitation for channel focus, and a spatial attention layer that focuses on the hand gestures). We tested it against five other approaches on 12,637 images of Indian Sign Language alphabets, all 26 classes, using 5-fold cross-validation. EfficientSign achieves the accuracy of 99.94% (+/-0.05%), which matches the performance of ResNet18's 99.97% accuracy, but with 62% fewer parameters (4.2M vs 11.2M). We also experimented with feeding deep features (1,280-dimensional vectors pulled from EfficientNet-B0's pooling layer) into classical classifiers. SVM achieved the accuracy of 99.63%, Logistic Regression achieved the accuracy of 99.03% and KNN achieved accuracy of 96.33%. All of these blow past the 92% that SURF-based methods managed on a similar dataset back in 2015. Our results show that attention-enhanced learning model provides an efficient and deployable solution for ISL recognition without requiring a massive model or hand-tuned feature pipelines anymore.

</details>


### [91] [GaussiAnimate: Reconstruct and Rig Animatable Categories with Level of Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08547)
*Jiaxin Wang,Dongxin Lyu,Zeyu Cai,Zhiyang Dou,Cheng Lin,Anpei Chen,Yuliang Xiu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Skelebones：一种将4D形状动态层级压缩为可控自由形态骨骼的支架-皮肤绑定系统，通过高斯压缩、骨架提取和运动匹配实现非刚性变形的高质量重动画


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自由形态骨骼能有效捕捉非刚性变形但缺乏直观控制的运动学结构，需要一种既能保持表达力又具备可控性的骨骼系统

Method: 三步骤系统：1) 将时间一致的可变形高斯压缩为自由形态骨骼；2) 从规范高斯提取平均曲率骨架并时间细化；3) 通过非参数部件运动匹配绑定骨架和骨骼

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上验证，相比LBS提升17.3% PSNR，相比BoB提升21.7%，在低数据量（约1000帧）下运动匹配算法比鲁棒LBS提升48.4% RMSE

Conclusion: Skelebones系统成功将4D形状动态层级压缩为紧凑可控的骨骼表示，在保持重建保真度的同时显著提升重动画性能，特别适用于复杂非刚性表面动态的角色

Abstract: Free-form bones, that conform closely to the surface, can effectively capture non-rigid deformations, but lack a kinematic structure necessary for intuitive control. Thus, we propose a Scaffold-Skin Rigging System, termed "Skelebones", with three key steps: (1) Bones: compress temporally-consistent deformable Gaussians into free-form bones, approximating non-rigid surface deformations; (2) Skeleton: extract a Mean Curvature Skeleton from canonical Gaussians and refine it temporally, ensuring a category-agnostic, motion-adaptive, and topology-correct kinematic structure; (3) Binding: bind the skeleton and bones via non-parametric partwise motion matching (PartMM), synthesizing novel bone motions by matching, retrieving, and blending existing ones. Collectively, these three steps enable us to compress the Level of Dynamics of 4D shapes into compact skelebones that are both controllable and expressive. We validate our approach on both synthetic and real-world datasets, achieving significant improvements in reanimation performance across unseen poses-with 17.3% PSNR gains over Linear Blend Skinning (LBS) and 21.7% over Bag-of-Bones (BoB)-while maintaining excellent reconstruction fidelity, particularly for characters exhibiting complex non-rigid surface dynamics. Our Partwise Motion Matching algorithm demonstrates strong generalization to both Gaussian and mesh representations, especially under low-data regime (~1000 frames), achieving 48.4% RMSE improvement over robust LBS and outperforming GRU- and MLP-based learning methods by >20%. Code will be made publicly available for research purposes at cookmaker.cn/gaussianimate.

</details>


### [92] [When Numbers Speak: Aligning Textual Numerals and Visual Instances in Text-to-Video Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08546)
*Zhengyang Sun,Yu Chen,Xin Zhou,Xiaofan Li,Xiwu Chen,Dingkang Liang,Xiang Bai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: NUMINA是一个无需训练的身份识别-引导框架，用于改进文本到视频扩散模型中的数值对齐，通过识别提示-布局不一致性并调制交叉注意力来提升计数准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文本到视频扩散模型在生成提示中指定数量的对象时存在困难，需要改进数值对齐能力。

Method: NUMINA采用训练免费的识别-引导框架：1)通过选择判别性的自注意力和交叉注意力头来识别提示-布局不一致性，推导可计数的潜在布局；2)保守地细化布局并调制交叉注意力来引导重新生成。

Result: 在CountBench上，NUMINA将Wan2.1-1.3B的计数准确性提高了7.4%，在5B和14B模型上分别提高了4.9%和5.5%。同时改善了CLIP对齐并保持了时间一致性。

Conclusion: 结构引导补充了种子搜索和提示增强，为实现计数准确的文本到视频扩散提供了一条实用路径。

Abstract: Text-to-video diffusion models have enabled open-ended video synthesis, but often struggle with generating the correct number of objects specified in a prompt. We introduce NUMINA , a training-free identify-then-guide framework for improved numerical alignment. NUMINA identifies prompt-layout inconsistencies by selecting discriminative self- and cross-attention heads to derive a countable latent layout. It then refines this layout conservatively and modulates cross-attention to guide regeneration. On the introduced CountBench, NUMINA improves counting accuracy by up to 7.4% on Wan2.1-1.3B, and by 4.9% and 5.5% on 5B and 14B models, respectively. Furthermore, CLIP alignment is improved while maintaining temporal consistency. These results demonstrate that structural guidance complements seed search and prompt enhancement, offering a practical path toward count-accurate text-to-video diffusion. The code is available at https://github.com/H-EmbodVis/NUMINA.

</details>


### [93] [Seeing but Not Thinking: Routing Distraction in Multimodal Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08541)
*Haolei Xu,Haiwen Hong,Hongxing Li,Rui Zhou,Yang Zhang,Longtao Huang,Hui Xue,Yongliang Shen,Weiming Lu,Yueting Zhuang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 研究发现多模态MoE模型存在"见而不思"现象：模型能准确感知图像内容但在后续推理中失败，却能正确解决纯文本的相同问题。提出路由分心假说，并通过路由引导干预方法提升领域专家激活，在多个基准上取得显著改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态混合专家模型在视觉语言任务上表现出色，但作者发现了一个令人困惑的现象——"见而不思"：模型能准确感知图像内容，却在后续推理中失败，而相同的纯文本问题却能正确解决。这揭示了当前多模态MoE模型在视觉输入处理中的深层缺陷。

Method: 首先通过系统分析验证跨模态语义共享的存在，排除了语义对齐失败的唯一解释。然后揭示视觉专家和领域专家存在层间分离，图像输入在中间层（领域专家集中的层）引发显著的路由分歧。基于这些发现提出路由分心假说，并设计路由引导干预方法来增强领域专家激活。

Result: 在三个多模态MoE模型和六个基准上的实验显示了一致的改进，复杂视觉推理任务的性能提升高达3.17%。分析进一步表明，领域专家识别定位的是认知功能而非样本特定解决方案，使得能够有效跨任务转移。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了多模态MoE模型中视觉输入处理的路由分心问题，提出了有效的干预方法，并展示了领域专家识别在认知功能定位方面的潜力，为改进多模态推理模型提供了重要见解。

Abstract: Multimodal Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models have achieved remarkable performance on vision-language tasks. However, we identify a puzzling phenomenon termed Seeing but Not Thinking: models accurately perceive image content yet fail in subsequent reasoning, while correctly solving identical problems presented as pure text. Through systematic analysis, we first verify that cross-modal semantic sharing exists in MoE architectures, ruling out semantic alignment failure as the sole explanation. We then reveal that visual experts and domain experts exhibit layer-wise separation, with image inputs inducing significant routing divergence from text inputs in middle layers where domain experts concentrate. Based on these findings, we propose the Routing Distraction hypothesis: when processing visual inputs, the routing mechanism fails to adequately activate task-relevant reasoning experts. To validate this hypothesis, we design a routing-guided intervention method that enhances domain expert activation. Experiments on three multimodal MoE models across six benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements, with gains of up to 3.17% on complex visual reasoning tasks. Our analysis further reveals that domain expert identification locates cognitive functions rather than sample-specific solutions, enabling effective transfer across tasks with different information structures.

</details>


### [94] [Action Images: End-to-End Policy Learning via Multiview Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06168)
*Haoyu Zhen,Zixian Gao,Qiao Sun,Yilin Zhao,Yuncong Yang,Yilun Du,Tsun-Hsuan Wang,Yi-Ling Qiao,Chuang Gan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Action Images方法，将策略学习建模为多视角视频生成，通过将7-DoF机器人动作转换为像素基础的可解释动作图像，实现统一的世界动作模型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有世界动作模型（WAMs）通常依赖单独的动作模块或使用非像素基础的动作表示，难以充分利用视频模型的预训练知识，限制了跨视角和环境的迁移能力

Method: 将7-DoF机器人动作转换为可解释的动作图像——多视角动作视频，这些视频基于2D像素并显式跟踪机械臂运动。这种像素基础的动作表示使视频主干本身能够作为零样本策略，无需单独的策略头或动作模块

Result: 在RLBench和真实世界评估中，该模型实现了最强的零样本成功率，并在视频-动作联合生成质量上优于先前的视频空间世界模型

Conclusion: 可解释的动作图像是策略学习的有前景路径，统一的模型支持视频-动作联合生成、动作条件视频生成和动作标注等多种任务

Abstract: World action models (WAMs) have emerged as a promising direction for robot policy learning, as they can leverage powerful video backbones to model the future states. However, existing approaches often rely on separate action modules, or use action representations that are not pixel-grounded, making it difficult to fully exploit the pretrained knowledge of video models and limiting transfer across viewpoints and environments. In this work, we present Action Images, a unified world action model that formulates policy learning as multiview video generation. Instead of encoding control as low-dimensional tokens, we translate 7-DoF robot actions into interpretable action images: multi-view action videos that are grounded in 2D pixels and explicitly track robot-arm motion. This pixel-grounded action representation allows the video backbone itself to act as a zero-shot policy, without a separate policy head or action module. Beyond control, the same unified model supports video-action joint generation, action-conditioned video generation, and action labeling under a shared representation. On RLBench and real-world evaluations, our model achieves the strongest zero-shot success rates and improves video-action joint generation quality over prior video-space world models, suggesting that interpretable action images are a promising route to policy learning.

</details>


### [95] [AVGen-Bench: A Task-Driven Benchmark for Multi-Granular Evaluation of Text-to-Audio-Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08540)
*Ziwei Zhou,Zeyuan Lai,Rui Wang,Yifan Yang,Zhen Xing,Yuqing Yang,Qi Dai,Lili Qiu,Chong Luo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AVGen-Bench：首个面向真实场景的任务驱动型文本到音视频生成基准，包含11个类别的高质量提示，采用多粒度评估框架结合专家模型和MLLM，揭示了音视频美学质量与语义可靠性之间的显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前文本到音视频生成评估存在碎片化问题，现有基准大多孤立评估音频和视频，或依赖粗糙的嵌入相似度，无法捕捉真实提示所需的细粒度联合正确性。

Method: 提出AVGen-Bench基准，包含11个现实世界类别的高质量提示；设计多粒度评估框架，结合轻量级专家模型和多模态大语言模型，从感知质量到细粒度语义可控性进行全面评估。

Result: 评估揭示了音视频美学质量强与语义可靠性弱之间的显著差距，包括文本渲染、语音连贯性、物理推理方面的持续失败，以及在音乐音高控制方面的普遍崩溃。

Conclusion: AVGen-Bench为文本到音视频生成提供了首个任务驱动的综合评估基准，揭示了当前模型在语义可靠性方面的关键缺陷，为未来研究指明了改进方向。

Abstract: Text-to-Audio-Video (T2AV) generation is rapidly becoming a core interface for media creation, yet its evaluation remains fragmented. Existing benchmarks largely assess audio and video in isolation or rely on coarse embedding similarity, failing to capture the fine-grained joint correctness required by realistic prompts. We introduce AVGen-Bench, a task-driven benchmark for T2AV generation featuring high-quality prompts across 11 real-world categories. To support comprehensive assessment, we propose a multi-granular evaluation framework that combines lightweight specialist models with Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), enabling evaluation from perceptual quality to fine-grained semantic controllability. Our evaluation reveals a pronounced gap between strong audio-visual aesthetics and weak semantic reliability, including persistent failures in text rendering, speech coherence, physical reasoning, and a universal breakdown in musical pitch control. Code and benchmark resources are available at http://aka.ms/avgenbench.

</details>


### [96] [OpenVLThinkerV2: A Generalist Multimodal Reasoning Model for Multi-domain Visual Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08539)
*Wenbo Hu,Xin Chen,Yan Gao-Tian,Yihe Deng,Nanyun Peng,Kai-Wei Chang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: G²RPO是一种新的强化学习训练目标，通过非线性分布匹配将优势分布强制收敛到标准正态分布，解决了多模态模型中奖励拓扑方差大和感知-推理平衡问题，并提出了OpenVLThinkerV2模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将GRPO成功扩展到开源多模态通用模型面临两大挑战：1) 不同视觉任务间奖励拓扑的极端方差；2) 细粒度感知与多步推理能力平衡的内在困难。

Method: 提出Gaussian GRPO (G²RPO)，用非线性分布匹配替代标准线性缩放，强制任务优势分布收敛到N(0,1)；引入两种任务级塑形机制：响应长度塑形（动态激发复杂查询的推理链，强制直接输出以增强视觉基础）和熵塑形（严格限制模型探索区域，防止熵崩溃和爆炸）。

Result: 基于G²RPO开发了OpenVLThinkerV2模型，在18个多样化基准测试中表现出色，超越了强大的开源模型和领先的专有前沿模型。

Conclusion: G²RPO通过理论保证的跨任务梯度公平性、对重尾异常值的鲁棒性以及对称的正负奖励更新，显著提升了多模态模型的训练稳定性和性能，为开源多模态通用模型的发展提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has emerged as the de facto Reinforcement Learning (RL) objective driving recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models. However, extending this success to open-source multimodal generalist models remains heavily constrained by two primary challenges: the extreme variance in reward topologies across diverse visual tasks, and the inherent difficulty of balancing fine-grained perception with multi-step reasoning capabilities. To address these issues, we introduce Gaussian GRPO (G$^2$RPO), a novel RL training objective that replaces standard linear scaling with non-linear distributional matching. By mathematically forcing the advantage distribution of any given task to strictly converge to a standard normal distribution, $\mathcal{N}(0,1)$, G$^2$RPO theoretically ensures inter-task gradient equity, mitigates vulnerabilities to heavy-tail outliers, and offers symmetric update for positive and negative rewards. Leveraging the enhanced training stability provided by G$^2$RPO, we introduce two task-level shaping mechanisms to seamlessly balance perception and reasoning. First, response length shaping dynamically elicits extended reasoning chains for complex queries while enforce direct outputs to bolster visual grounding. Second, entropy shaping tightly bounds the model's exploration zone, effectively preventing both entropy collapse and entropy explosion. Integrating these methodologies, we present OpenVLThinkerV2, a highly robust, general-purpose multimodal model. Extensive evaluations across 18 diverse benchmarks demonstrate its superior performance over strong open-source and leading proprietary frontier models.

</details>


### [97] [RewardFlow: Generate Images by Optimizing What You Reward](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08536)
*Onkar Susladkar,Dong-Hwan Jang,Tushar Prakash,Adheesh Juvekar,Vedant Shah,Ayush Barik,Nabeel Bashir,Muntasir Wahed,Ritish Shrirao,Ismini Lourentzou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: RewardFlow：基于多奖励朗之万动力学的免反演框架，通过语言视觉推理引导预训练扩散和流匹配模型，实现语义对齐、感知保真、局部定位、对象一致性和人类偏好等多目标协调


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型和流匹配模型在推理时缺乏细粒度、多目标的引导机制，难以同时协调语义对齐、感知质量、局部编辑、对象一致性和人类偏好等异构目标

Method: 1. 提出免反演框架，通过多奖励朗之万动力学在推理时引导模型；2. 统一互补可微分奖励：语义对齐、感知保真、局部定位、对象一致性、人类偏好；3. 引入基于VQA的可微分奖励，通过语言视觉推理提供细粒度语义监督；4. 设计提示感知自适应策略：提取语义原语、推断编辑意图、动态调节奖励权重和步长

Result: 在多个图像编辑和组合生成基准测试中，RewardFlow实现了最先进的编辑保真度和组合对齐性能

Conclusion: RewardFlow通过多奖励朗之万动力学和提示感知自适应策略，有效协调异构目标，为预训练生成模型提供了强大的推理时引导框架，在图像编辑和组合生成任务中表现出色

Abstract: We introduce RewardFlow, an inversion-free framework that steers pretrained diffusion and flow-matching models at inference time through multi-reward Langevin dynamics. RewardFlow unifies complementary differentiable rewards for semantic alignment, perceptual fidelity, localized grounding, object consistency, and human preference, and further introduces a differentiable VQA-based reward that provides fine-grained semantic supervision through language-vision reasoning. To coordinate these heterogeneous objectives, we design a prompt-aware adaptive policy that extracts semantic primitives from the instruction, infers edit intent, and dynamically modulates reward weights and step sizes throughout sampling. Across several image editing and compositional generation benchmarks, RewardFlow delivers state-of-the-art edit fidelity and compositional alignment.

</details>


### [98] [Self-Improving 4D Perception via Self-Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08532)
*Nan Huang,Pengcheng Yu,Weijia Zeng,James M. Rehg,Angjoo Kanazawa,Haiwen Feng,Qianqian Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SelfEvo：一个自改进框架，通过无标签视频持续提升预训练多视角重建模型，无需外部标注即可显著改进4D感知性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大规模多视角重建模型依赖昂贵的3D/4D标注数据，特别是动态场景标注稀缺，限制了模型的可扩展性。需要一种无需外部标注的自改进方法来解决这一问题。

Method: 提出SelfEvo框架，采用时空上下文不对称的自蒸馏方案，系统研究了损失信号、不对称形式等设计选择，使预训练模型能够通过无标签视频进行持续自我改进。

Result: 在8个不同数据集和领域的基准测试中，SelfEvo持续改进预训练基线，在动态场景上获得显著提升：视频深度估计相对改进36.5%，相机估计改进20.1%，且无需任何标注数据。

Conclusion: SelfEvo证明了通过无监督自蒸馏实现多视角重建模型持续改进的可行性，为4D感知任务提供了一种可扩展的解决方案，减少了对昂贵标注数据的依赖。

Abstract: Large-scale multi-view reconstruction models have made remarkable progress, but most existing approaches still rely on fully supervised training with ground-truth 3D/4D annotations. Such annotations are expensive and particularly scarce for dynamic scenes, limiting scalability. We propose SelfEvo, a self-improving framework that continually improves pretrained multi-view reconstruction models using unlabeled videos. SelfEvo introduces a self-distillation scheme using spatiotemporal context asymmetry, enabling self-improvement for learning-based 4D perception without external annotations. We systematically study design choices that make self-improvement effective, including loss signals, forms of asymmetry, and other training strategies. Across eight benchmarks spanning diverse datasets and domains, SelfEvo consistently improves pretrained baselines and generalizes across base models (e.g. VGGT and $π^3$), with significant gains on dynamic scenes. Overall, SelfEvo achieves up to 36.5% relative improvement in video depth estimation and 20.1% in camera estimation, without using any labeled data. Project Page: https://self-evo.github.io/.

</details>


### [99] [FIT: A Large-Scale Dataset for Fit-Aware Virtual Try-On](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08526)
*Johanna Karras,Yuanhao Wang,Yingwei Li,Ira Kemelmacher-Shlizerman*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FIT数据集是首个大规模、包含精确身体和服装尺寸信息的虚拟试穿数据集，专门解决现有方法忽略服装合身度准确性的问题，通过合成方法生成超过113万张试穿图像三元组。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前虚拟试穿方法主要关注服装外观可视化，但忽视了试穿体验的关键方面——服装合身度的准确性。现有方法默认生成合身的试穿效果，无论服装或人体尺寸如何，缺乏处理"不合身"情况（如特大号衬衫穿在特小号人身上）的能力。主要障碍是缺乏提供精确服装和身体尺寸信息的数据集，特别是针对不合身情况的数据。

Method: 采用可扩展的合成策略：1) 使用GarmentCode程序化生成3D服装，通过物理模拟捕捉真实服装合身度；2) 开发新颖的重纹理框架，将合成渲染转换为逼真图像，同时严格保持几何形状；3) 在重纹理模型中引入人物身份保持，生成配对的人物图像（同一人物，不同服装）用于监督训练；4) 利用FIT数据集训练基线合身度感知虚拟试穿模型。

Result: 创建了包含超过113万试穿图像三元组的FIT数据集，每个样本都配有精确的身体和服装测量数据。基于该数据集训练的合身度感知虚拟试穿模型在合身度感知虚拟试穿方面达到了新的最先进水平，并为未来研究提供了稳健的基准。

Conclusion: FIT数据集首次解决了虚拟试穿中合身度准确性的开放性问题，通过大规模合成数据收集方法克服了数据获取挑战。该工作为合身度感知虚拟试穿设定了新的基准，所有数据和代码将公开提供以促进未来研究。

Abstract: Given a person and a garment image, virtual try-on (VTO) aims to synthesize a realistic image of the person wearing the garment, while preserving their original pose and identity. Although recent VTO methods excel at visualizing garment appearance, they largely overlook a crucial aspect of the try-on experience: the accuracy of garment fit -- for example, depicting how an extra-large shirt looks on an extra-small person. A key obstacle is the absence of datasets that provide precise garment and body size information, particularly for "ill-fit" cases, where garments are significantly too large or too small. Consequently, current VTO methods default to generating well-fitted results regardless of the garment or person size.
  In this paper, we take the first steps towards solving this open problem. We introduce FIT (Fit-Inclusive Try-on), a large-scale VTO dataset comprising over 1.13M try-on image triplets accompanied by precise body and garment measurements. We overcome the challenges of data collection via a scalable synthetic strategy: (1) We programmatically generate 3D garments using GarmentCode and drape them via physics simulation to capture realistic garment fit. (2) We employ a novel re-texturing framework to transform synthetic renderings into photorealistic images while strictly preserving geometry. (3) We introduce person identity preservation into our re-texturing model to generate paired person images (same person, different garments) for supervised training. Finally, we leverage our FIT dataset to train a baseline fit-aware virtual try-on model. Our data and results set the new state-of-the-art for fit-aware virtual try-on, as well as offer a robust benchmark for future research. We will make all data and code publicly available on our project page: https://johannakarras.github.io/FIT.

</details>


### [100] [UniversalVTG: A Universal and Lightweight Foundation Model for Video Temporal Grounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08522)
*Joungbin An,Agrim Jain,Kristen Grauman*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: UniversalVTG：通过大规模跨数据集预训练的统一视频时序定位模型，使用查询统一器规范化异构查询格式，在保持轻量化的同时实现多基准SOTA性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频时序定位方法存在数据集特异性强、跨域迁移能力差的问题；基于大语言模型的方法计算成本高且视频上下文有限，难以处理长视频定位

Method: 提出UniversalVTG框架：1) 离线查询统一器将异构查询格式规范化为共享声明空间；2) 高效定位头支持长未修剪视频；3) 大规模跨数据集预训练

Result: 在GoalStep-StepGrounding、Ego4D-NLQ、TACoS、Charades-STA、ActivityNet-Captions等多个基准上达到SOTA；相比MLLM方法参数量减少100倍以上，性能相当或更优

Conclusion: UniversalVTG通过统一监督和轻量化设计，解决了视频时序定位的泛化性问题，为参数密集型MLLM提供了实用替代方案

Abstract: Video temporal grounding (VTG) is typically tackled with dataset-specific models that transfer poorly across domains and query styles. Recent efforts to overcome this limitation have adapted large multimodal language models (MLLMs) to VTG, but their high compute cost and limited video context still hinder long-video grounding. We instead scale unified supervision while keeping the model lightweight. We present UniversalVTG, a single VTG model trained with large-scale cross-dataset pretraining. An offline Query Unifier canonicalizes heterogeneous query formats into a shared declarative space, reducing linguistic mismatch and preventing the negative transfer observed under naïve joint training. Combined with an efficient grounding head, UniversalVTG scales to long, untrimmed videos. Across diverse benchmarks-GoalStep-StepGrounding, Ego4D-NLQ, TACoS, Charades-STA, and ActivityNet-Captions-one UniversalVTG checkpoint achieves state-of-the-art performance versus dedicated VTG models. Moreover, despite being $>100\times$ smaller than recent MLLM-based approaches, UniversalVTG matches or exceeds their accuracy on multiple benchmarks, offering a practical alternative to parameter-heavy MLLMs.

</details>


### [101] [When Fine-Tuning Changes the Evidence: Architecture-Dependent Semantic Drift in Chest X-Ray Explanations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08513)
*Kabilan Elangovan,Daniel Ting*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究提出"语义漂移"概念，指在多类医学图像分类中，迁移学习与微调阶段间归因结构系统性变化，尽管分类性能稳定，但视觉证据基础可能发生改变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在医学图像多分类任务中，分类准确率的提升并不能保证模型预测所依赖的视觉证据保持稳定。研究者关注迁移学习与完全微调之间归因结构的系统性变化，即"语义漂移"，这反映了模型视觉推理基础的潜在变化。

Method: 使用五分类胸部X光任务，评估DenseNet201、ResNet50V2和InceptionV3三种架构在两阶段训练协议下的表现。通过无参考指标量化归因图的空间定位和结构一致性漂移，比较LayerCAM和GradCAM++两种归因方法。

Result: 粗粒度解剖定位保持稳定，但重叠IoU显示归因结构存在显著的架构依赖性重组。在收敛的预测性能下，不同归因方法（LayerCAM vs GradCAM++）的稳定性排名可能反转，表明解释稳定性是架构、优化阶段和归因目标的交互结果。

Conclusion: 解释稳定性不应仅基于单一归因方法评估，而应考虑架构、优化阶段和归因目标的交互作用。语义漂移概念为理解模型视觉推理的演化提供了新视角，对医学AI的可解释性评估具有重要意义。

Abstract: Transfer learning followed by fine-tuning is widely adopted in medical image classification due to consistent gains in diagnostic performance. However, in multi-class settings with overlapping visual features, improvements in accuracy do not guarantee stability of the visual evidence used to support predictions. We define semantic drift as systematic changes in the attribution structure supporting a model's predictions between transfer learning and full fine-tuning, reflecting potential shifts in underlying visual reasoning despite stable classification performance. Using a five-class chest X-ray task, we evaluate DenseNet201, ResNet50V2, and InceptionV3 under a two-stage training protocol and quantify drift with reference-free metrics capturing spatial localization and structural consistency of attribution maps. Across architectures, coarse anatomical localization remains stable, while overlap IoU reveals pronounced architecture-dependent reorganization of evidential structure. Beyond single-method analysis, stability rankings can reverse across LayerCAM and GradCAM++ under converged predictive performance, establishing explanation stability as an interaction between architecture, optimization phase, and attribution objective.

</details>


### [102] [Phantom: Physics-Infused Video Generation via Joint Modeling of Visual and Latent Physical Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08503)
*Ying Shen,Jerry Xiong,Tianjiao Yu,Ismini Lourentzou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Phantom是一个物理感知视频生成模型，通过联合建模视觉内容和潜在物理动力学，在生成视频时推断潜在物理属性，从而产生既视觉逼真又物理一致的视频序列。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前生成视频模型虽然视觉逼真，但缺乏对现实世界物理规律的理解，导致运动不自然。现有方法未能捕捉或强制执行物理一致性，需要开发能生成物理合理视频的模型。

Method: 提出Phantom模型，将潜在物理属性的推断直接集成到视频生成过程中。模型基于观测视频帧和推断的物理状态，联合预测潜在物理动力学并生成未来视频帧。使用物理感知视频表示作为底层物理的抽象嵌入，无需明确指定复杂的物理动力学和属性。

Result: 在标准视频生成和物理感知基准测试中，Phantom不仅在物理动力学遵循方面优于现有方法，而且在感知保真度方面也具有竞争力。定量和定性结果都证明了其有效性。

Conclusion: 通过将物理推断直接集成到视频生成过程中，Phantom能够生成既视觉逼真又物理一致的视频序列，为物理感知视频生成提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Recent advances in generative video modeling, driven by large-scale datasets and powerful architectures, have yielded remarkable visual realism. However, emerging evidence suggests that simply scaling data and model size does not endow these systems with an understanding of the underlying physical laws that govern real-world dynamics. Existing approaches often fail to capture or enforce such physical consistency, resulting in unrealistic motion and dynamics. In his work, we investigate whether integrating the inference of latent physical properties directly into the video generation process can equip models with the ability to produce physically plausible videos. To this end, we propose Phantom, a Physics-Infused Video Generation model that jointly models the visual content and latent physical dynamics. Conditioned on observed video frames and inferred physical states, Phantom jointly predicts latent physical dynamics and generates future video frames. Phantom leverages a physics-aware video representation that serves as an abstract yet informaive embedding of the underlying physics, facilitating the joint prediction of physical dynamics alongside video content without requiring an explicit specification of a complex set of physical dynamics and properties. By integrating the inference of physical-aware video representation directly into the video generation process, Phantom produces video sequences that are both visually realistic and physically consistent. Quantitative and qualitative results on both standard video generation and physics-aware benchmarks demonstrate that Phantom not only outperforms existing methods in terms of adherence to physical dynamics but also delivers competitive perceptual fidelity.

</details>


### [103] [Quantifying Explanation Consistency: The C-Score Metric for CAM-Based Explainability in Medical Image Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08502)
*Kabilan Elangovan,Daniel Ting*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出C-Score评估医学影像CAM解释的一致性而非正确性，发现AUC与一致性分离的三种机制，提供模型不稳定早期预警


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CAM评估框架主要关注解释的正确性（与放射科医生标注的定位保真度），而忽略了模型是否在不同患者间应用一致的空间推理策略。需要量化解释的一致性而非正确性。

Method: 提出C-Score（一致性分数），一种置信度加权、无需标注的指标，通过强调强度的成对软IoU量化正确分类实例的类内解释可重复性。评估六种CAM技术（GradCAM、GradCAM++、LayerCAM、EigenCAM、ScoreCAM、MS GradCAM++）在三种CNN架构（DenseNet201、InceptionV3、ResNet50V2）上，使用Kermany胸部X光数据集进行30个训练周期的实验。

Result: 识别出三种AUC-一致性分离机制：阈值介导的金标准列表崩溃、峰值AUC时的技术特定归因崩溃、全局聚合中的类级一致性掩蔽。C-Score提供模型不稳定的早期预警信号，ScoreCAM在ResNet50V2上的恶化可在AUC灾难性崩溃前一个完整检查点检测到，并基于解释质量而非仅预测排名提供架构特定的临床部署建议。

Conclusion: C-Score作为评估CAM解释一致性的新指标，揭示了标准分类指标无法检测的模型行为模式，为临床部署提供了基于解释质量而非仅预测性能的决策依据，并能提前预警模型不稳定。

Abstract: Class Activation Mapping (CAM) methods are widely used to generate visual explanations for deep learning classifiers in medical imaging. However, existing evaluation frameworks assess whether explanations are correct, measured by localisation fidelity against radiologist annotations, rather than whether they are consistent: whether the model applies the same spatial reasoning strategy across different patients with the same pathology. We propose the C-Score (Consistency Score), a confidence-weighted, annotation-free metric that quantifies intra-class explanation reproducibility via intensity-emphasised pairwise soft IoU across correctly classified instances. We evaluate six CAM techniques: GradCAM, GradCAM++, LayerCAM, EigenCAM, ScoreCAM, and MS GradCAM++ across three CNN architectures (DenseNet201, InceptionV3, ResNet50V2) over thirty training epochs on the Kermany chest X-ray dataset, covering transfer learning and fine-tuning phases. We identify three distinct mechanisms of AUC-consistency dissociation, invisible to standard classification metrics: threshold-mediated gold list collapse, technique-specific attribution collapse at peak AUC, and class-level consistency masking in global aggregation. C-Score provides an early warning signal of impending model instability. ScoreCAM deterioration on ResNet50V2 is detectable one full checkpoint before catastrophic AUC collapse and yields architecture-specific clinical deployment recommendations grounded in explanation quality rather than predictive ranking alone.

</details>


### [104] [Novel View Synthesis as Video Completion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08500)
*Qi Wu,Khiem Vuong,Minsik Jeon,Srinivasa Narasimhan,Deva Ramanan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FrameCrafter将稀疏多视角合成重新定义为低帧率视频补全任务，利用视频扩散模型中隐含的多视角知识，通过架构修改实现输入顺序不变性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于单图像训练的扩散模型缺乏多视角知识，而视频模型已隐含多视角信息，更适合适应稀疏多视角合成任务。需要解决稀疏无序输入集的排列不变性问题。

Method: 将稀疏多视角合成重新定义为低帧率视频补全任务，通过移除时间位置编码、引入逐帧潜在编码等架构修改，使视频模型能够"忘记"时间顺序，实现输入排列不变性。

Result: FrameCrafter在稀疏多视角合成基准测试中取得有竞争力的性能，表明视频模型只需最小监督就能适应多视角合成任务。

Conclusion: 视频扩散模型包含隐含的多视角知识，通过适当的架构修改可以轻松适应稀疏多视角合成任务，为利用预训练视频模型解决多视角问题提供了新途径。

Abstract: We tackle the problem of sparse novel view synthesis (NVS) using video diffusion models; given $K$ ($\approx 5$) multi-view images of a scene and their camera poses, we predict the view from a target camera pose. Many prior approaches leverage generative image priors encoded via diffusion models. However, models trained on single images lack multi-view knowledge. We instead argue that video models already contain implicit multi-view knowledge and so should be easier to adapt for NVS. Our key insight is to formulate sparse NVS as a low frame-rate video completion task. However, one challenge is that sparse NVS is defined over an unordered set of inputs, often too sparse to admit a meaningful order, so the models should be $\textit{invariant}$ to permutations of that input set. To this end, we present FrameCrafter, which adapts video models (naturally trained with coherent frame orderings) to permutation-invariant NVS through several architectural modifications, including per-frame latent encodings and removal of temporal positional embeddings. Our results suggest that video models can be easily trained to "forget" about time with minimal supervision, producing competitive performance on sparse-view NVS benchmarks. Project page: https://frame-crafter.github.io/

</details>


### [105] [What They Saw, Not Just Where They Looked: Semantic Scanpath Similarity via VLMs and NLP metric](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08494)
*Mohamed Amine Kerkouri,Marouane Tliba,Bin Wang,Aladine Chetouani,Ulas Bagci,Alessandro Bruno*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于语义的扫视路径相似性框架，利用视觉语言模型将注视点编码为文本描述，通过NLP指标计算语义相似度，补充传统空间对齐方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扫视路径相似性度量主要关注空间和时间对齐，忽略了注视图像区域之间的语义等价性。需要一种能够捕捉内容相似性的方法来补充传统几何对齐方法。

Method: 提出语义扫视路径相似性框架：1) 在受控视觉上下文下编码每个注视点（基于补丁和基于标记的策略）；2) 将注视点转换为简洁文本描述；3) 聚合成扫视路径级表示；4) 使用基于嵌入和词汇的NLP指标计算语义相似度；5) 与MultiMatch和DTW等传统空间度量进行比较。

Result: 实验表明：1) 语义相似性捕捉了与几何对齐部分独立的方差；2) 揭示了在空间差异情况下仍存在高内容一致性的案例；3) 分析了上下文编码对描述保真度和度量稳定性的影响。

Conclusion: 多模态基础模型能够实现经典扫视路径分析的可解释、内容感知扩展，为ETRA社区的眼动研究提供了补充维度。语义相似性框架能够捕捉传统空间方法忽略的内容一致性。

Abstract: Scanpath similarity metrics are central to eye-movement research, yet existing methods predominantly evaluate spatial and temporal alignment while neglecting semantic equivalence between attended image regions. We present a semantic scanpath similarity framework that integrates vision-language models (VLMs) into eye-tracking analysis. Each fixation is encoded under controlled visual context (patch-based and marker-based strategies) and transformed into concise textual descriptions, which are aggregated into scanpath-level representations. Semantic similarity is then computed using embedding-based and lexical NLP metrics and compared against established spatial measures, including MultiMatch and DTW. Experiments on free-viewing eye-tracking data demonstrate that semantic similarity captures partially independent variance from geometric alignment, revealing cases of high content agreement despite spatial divergence. We further analyze the impact of contextual encoding on description fidelity and metric stability. Our findings suggest that multimodal foundation models enable interpretable, content-aware extensions of classical scanpath analysis, providing a complementary dimension for gaze research within the ETRA community.

</details>


### [106] [On Semiotic-Grounded Interpretive Evaluation of Generative Art](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08641)
*Ruixiang Jiang,Changwen Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 论文提出SemJudge评估器，基于皮尔士符号学理论评估生成艺术中更深层的符号和索引意义，超越现有评估器只关注图像质量和提示符匹配的局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前生成艺术评估器只关注表面图像质量或提示符的字面匹配，无法评估创作者意图的深层符号或抽象意义，存在评估盲区。

Method: 提出基于皮尔士计算符号学理论的框架，将人-生成艺术交互建模为级联符号过程；设计SemJudge评估器，通过分层符号图（HSG）从提示到生成物重建意义生成过程，显式评估符号和索引意义。

Result: 大量定量实验显示SemJudge在解释密集型艺术基准上比先前评估器更接近人类判断；用户研究表明SemJudge能产生更深层、更有洞察力的艺术解释。

Conclusion: SemJudge为生成艺术从仅生成"漂亮"图像转向表达复杂人类经验的媒介铺平道路，通过符号学理论框架解决了现有评估器的结构盲区。

Abstract: Interpretation is essential to deciphering the language of art: audiences communicate with artists by recovering meaning from visual artifacts. However, current Generative Art (GenArt) evaluators remain fixated on surface-level image quality or literal prompt adherence, failing to assess the deeper symbolic or abstract meaning intended by the creator. We address this gap by formalizing a Peircean computational semiotic theory that models Human-GenArt Interaction (HGI) as cascaded semiosis. This framework reveals that artistic meaning is conveyed through three modes - iconic, symbolic, and indexical - yet existing evaluators operate heavily within the iconic mode, remaining structurally blind to the latter two. To overcome this structural blindness, we propose SemJudge. This evaluator explicitly assesses symbolic and indexical meaning in HGI via a Hierarchical Semiosis Graph (HSG) that reconstructs the meaning-making process from prompt to generated artifact. Extensive quantitative experiments show that SemJudge aligns more closely with human judgments than prior evaluators on an interpretation-intensive fine-art benchmark. User studies further demonstrate that SemJudge produces deeper, more insightful artistic interpretations, thereby paving the way for GenArt to move beyond the generation of "pretty" images toward a medium capable of expressing complex human experience. Project page: https://github.com/songrise/SemJudge.

</details>


### [107] [LAMP: Lift Image-Editing as General 3D Priors for Open-world Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08475)
*Jingjing Wang,Zhengdong Hong,Chong Bao,Yuke Zhu,Junhan Sun,Guofeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LAMP通过将图像编辑作为3D先验，提取物体间的3D变换作为连续、几何感知的表征，用于开放世界机器人操作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有学习方法（强化学习、模仿学习、VLA模型）在开放世界操作中面临泛化挑战，而LLM/VLM虽然具备语义推理能力但缺乏3D感知，限制了其在精细操作中的应用

Method: 提出LAMP方法，将图像编辑作为3D先验，提取隐含的2D空间线索并提升为3D变换，形成几何感知的连续表征

Result: 实验表明LAMP能够提供精确的3D变换，在开放世界操作中实现强大的零样本泛化能力

Conclusion: 通过利用图像编辑中的隐含空间线索并提升到3D变换，LAMP为开放世界机器人操作提供了一种几何感知的通用表征方法

Abstract: Human-like generalization in open-world remains a fundamental challenge for robotic manipulation. Existing learning-based methods, including reinforcement learning, imitation learning, and vision-language-action-models (VLAs), often struggle with novel tasks and unseen environments. Another promising direction is to explore generalizable representations that capture fine-grained spatial and geometric relations for open-world manipulation. While large-language-model (LLMs) and vision-language-model (VLMs) provide strong semantic reasoning based on language or annotated 2D representations, their limited 3D awareness restricts their applicability to fine-grained manipulation. To address this, we propose LAMP, which lifts image-editing as 3D priors to extract inter-object 3D transformations as continuous, geometry-aware representations. Our key insight is that image-editing inherently encodes rich 2D spatial cues, and lifting these implicit cues into 3D transformations provides fine-grained and accurate guidance for open-world manipulation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that \codename delivers precise 3D transformations and achieves strong zero-shot generalization in open-world manipulation. Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/LAMP/.

</details>


### [108] [Entropy-Gradient Grounding: Training-Free Evidence Retrieval in Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08456)
*Marcel Gröpl,Jaewoo Jung,Seungryong Kim,Marc Pollefeys,Sunghwan Hong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种无需训练、基于模型内在不确定性的视觉语言模型定位方法，通过熵梯度生成相关性图，支持多证据查询和迭代细化，在细节敏感和高分辨率任务上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练视觉语言模型在处理依赖微小视觉细节或需要跨多个区域组合线索的查询时仍存在困难，特别是在文档和组合式查询场景中。现有方法缺乏有效的证据检索机制来解析模糊性。

Method: 提出基于测试时证据检索的定位框架：1）计算模型下一个token分布的熵，反向传播到视觉token嵌入生成熵梯度相关性图；2）提取并排序多个连贯区域以支持多证据查询；3）引入带空间熵停止规则的迭代缩放和重新定位程序，避免过度细化。

Result: 在7个基准测试和4种VLM架构上的实验表明，该方法相比现有方法取得一致改进，在细节关键和高分辨率设置上提升最大，同时产生更可解释的证据定位。

Conclusion: 通过将定位框架化为测试时证据检索，利用模型内在不确定性作为监督，无需额外训练或辅助检测器，实现了对细节敏感查询的有效处理，为视觉语言模型提供了更精确和可解释的定位能力。

Abstract: Despite rapid progress, pretrained vision-language models still struggle when answers depend on tiny visual details or on combining clues spread across multiple regions, as in documents and compositional queries. We address this by framing grounding as test-time evidence retrieval: given a query, the model should actively identify where to look next to resolve ambiguity. To this end, we propose a training-free, model-intrinsic grounding method that uses uncertainty as supervision. Specifically, we compute the entropy of the model's next-token distribution and backpropagate it to the visual token embeddings to obtain an entropy-gradient relevance map, without auxiliary detectors or attention-map heuristics. We then extract and rank multiple coherent regions to support multi-evidence queries, and introduce an iterative zoom-and-reground procedure with a spatial-entropy stopping rule to avoid over-refinement. Experiments on seven benchmarks across four VLM architectures demonstrate consistent improvements over existing methods, with the largest gains on detail-critical and high-resolution settings, while also producing more interpretable evidence localizations.

</details>


### [109] [SyncBreaker:Stage-Aware Multimodal Adversarial Attacks on Audio-Driven Talking Head Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08405)
*Wenli Zhang,Xianglong Shi,Sirui Zhao,Xinqi Chen,Guo Cheng,Yifan Xu,Tong Xu,Yong Liao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SyncBreaker是一个针对扩散模型驱动的音频驱动说话头生成的多模态保护框架，通过联合扰动肖像和音频输入来防止滥用，同时保持输入感知质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的保护方法大多局限于单模态，无论是仅图像还是仅音频的攻击都无法有效抑制语音驱动的面部动态，存在欺诈和错误信息滥用的风险。

Method: 提出阶段感知的多模态保护框架：1) 图像流：通过多间隔采样(MIS)引入归零监督，引导生成朝向静态参考肖像；2) 音频流：提出跨注意力愚弄(CAF)，抑制特定间隔的音频条件跨注意力响应。两流独立优化，在推理时组合以实现灵活部署。

Result: 在白盒主动保护设置下的广泛实验表明，SyncBreaker比强单模态基线更有效地降低唇部同步和面部动态质量，同时保持输入感知质量并在净化攻击下保持鲁棒性。

Conclusion: SyncBreaker通过联合多模态扰动有效保护音频驱动说话头生成系统，为防范滥用提供了更全面的解决方案。

Abstract: Diffusion-based audio-driven talking-head generation enables realistic portrait animation, but also introduces risks of misuse, such as fraud and misinformation. Existing protection methods are largely limited to a single modality, and neither image-only nor audio-only attacks can effectively suppress speech-driven facial dynamics. To address this gap, we propose SyncBreaker, a stage-aware multimodal protection framework that jointly perturbs portrait and audio inputs under modality-specific perceptual constraints. Our key contributions are twofold. First, for the image stream, we introduce nullifying supervision with Multi-Interval Sampling (MIS) across diffusion stages to steer the generation toward the static reference portrait by aggregating guidance from multiple denoising intervals. Second, for the audio stream, we propose Cross-Attention Fooling (CAF), which suppresses interval-specific audio-conditioned cross-attention responses. Both streams are optimized independently and combined at inference time to enable flexible deployment. We evaluate SyncBreaker in a white-box proactive protection setting. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SyncBreaker more effectively degrades lip synchronization and facial dynamics than strong single-modality baselines, while preserving input perceptual quality and remaining robust under purification. Code: https://github.com/kitty384/SyncBreaker.

</details>


### [110] [WildDet3D: Scaling Promptable 3D Detection in the Wild](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08626)
*Weikai Huang,Jieyu Zhang,Sijun Li,Taoyang Jia,Jiafei Duan,Yunqian Cheng,Jaemin Cho,Mattew Wallingford,Rustin Soraki,Chris Dongjoo Kim,Donovan Clay,Taira Anderson,Winson Han,Ali Farhadi,Bharath Hariharan,Zhongzheng Ren,Ranjay Krishna*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: WildDet3D提出了一种统一的几何感知架构，支持文本、点和框提示，并能整合深度信号，同时构建了最大的开放3D检测数据集WildDet3D-Data，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单目3D目标检测需要超越封闭集类别、支持多样提示模态并利用几何线索，但现有方法存在两个瓶颈：仅支持单一提示类型且缺乏整合额外几何线索的机制，以及当前3D数据集覆盖类别有限、环境受控，限制了开放世界迁移。

Method: 提出WildDet3D统一几何感知架构，原生支持文本、点和框提示，可在推理时整合辅助深度信号；构建WildDet3D-Data数据集，通过从现有2D标注生成候选3D框并保留人工验证结果，包含超过100万张图像、13.5K个类别。

Result: 在开放世界设置中，WildDet3D在新引入的WildDet3D-Bench上达到22.6/24.8 AP3D（文本/框提示）；在Omni3D上达到34.2/36.4 AP3D；在零样本评估中，在Argoverse 2和ScanNet上达到40.3/48.9 ODS；整合深度线索在推理时带来平均+20.7 AP的显著增益。

Conclusion: WildDet3D通过统一的几何感知架构和大型开放数据集，解决了单目3D目标检测的泛化性和几何线索整合问题，在多个基准测试中建立了新的SOTA，显著推进了开放世界3D感知能力。

Abstract: Understanding objects in 3D from a single image is a cornerstone of spatial intelligence. A key step toward this goal is monocular 3D object detection--recovering the extent, location, and orientation of objects from an input RGB image. To be practical in the open world, such a detector must generalize beyond closed-set categories, support diverse prompt modalities, and leverage geometric cues when available. Progress is hampered by two bottlenecks: existing methods are designed for a single prompt type and lack a mechanism to incorporate additional geometric cues, and current 3D datasets cover only narrow categories in controlled environments, limiting open-world transfer. In this work we address both gaps. First, we introduce WildDet3D, a unified geometry-aware architecture that natively accepts text, point, and box prompts and can incorporate auxiliary depth signals at inference time. Second, we present WildDet3D-Data, the largest open 3D detection dataset to date, constructed by generating candidate 3D boxes from existing 2D annotations and retaining only human-verified ones, yielding over 1M images across 13.5K categories in diverse real-world scenes. WildDet3D establishes a new state-of-the-art across multiple benchmarks and settings. In the open-world setting, it achieves 22.6/24.8 AP3D on our newly introduced WildDet3D-Bench with text and box prompts. On Omni3D, it reaches 34.2/36.4 AP3D with text and box prompts, respectively. In zero-shot evaluation, it achieves 40.3/48.9 ODS on Argoverse 2 and ScanNet. Notably, incorporating depth cues at inference time yields substantial additional gains (+20.7 AP on average across settings).

</details>


### [111] [Phantasia: Context-Adaptive Backdoors in Vision Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08395)
*Nam Duong Tran,Phi Le Nguyen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文首次揭示现有VLM后门攻击的隐蔽性被高估，并提出Phantasia——一种上下文自适应的后门攻击方法，能生成语义连贯的恶意响应，显著提升隐蔽性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在多模态理解方面取得快速进展，但其安全性特别是后门攻击的脆弱性研究严重不足。现有VLM后门攻击方法仍处于早期阶段，大多依赖生成包含固定、易识别模式的污染响应，隐蔽性不足。

Method: 提出Phantasia——一种上下文自适应的后门攻击方法。该方法不生成静态污染模式，而是鼓励模型生成与每个输入语义动态对齐的上下文连贯但恶意的响应，保持响应合理性，从而显著提升隐蔽性和适应性。

Result: 实验表明：1）首次证明现有VLM后门攻击的隐蔽性被严重高估，通过适配其他领域的防御技术，多个最先进攻击能被轻易检测；2）Phantasia在多种VLM架构上实现最先进的攻击成功率，同时在各种防御设置下保持良性性能。

Conclusion: 该研究揭示了VLM后门攻击安全评估的重要缺陷，提出的Phantasia方法通过上下文自适应机制显著提升了攻击的隐蔽性和适应性，为VLM安全研究提供了新的视角和基准。
