These findings highlight data curation as a practical mechanism for scalable monitoring and adaptive model updates in production-scale recommendation systems.

</details>


### [332] [SkillForge: Forging Domain-Specific, Self-Evolving Agent Skills in Cloud Technical Support](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08618)
*Xingyan Liu,Xiyue Luo,Linyu Li,Ganghong Huang,Jianfeng Liu,Honglin Qiao*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: SkillForge是一个自演进的LLM智能体技能框架，通过创建-评估-优化的闭环循环，解决企业场景中技能与领域需求不匹配、缺乏持续优化机制的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在企业场景（如云技术支持）中部署LLM智能体需要高质量的领域特定技能，但现有技能创建方法缺乏领域基础，产生的技能与真实任务需求不匹配。部署后缺乏系统性机制将执行失败追溯到技能缺陷并进行针对性优化，导致技能质量停滞不前。

Method: SkillForge框架包含两个核心组件：1) 领域情境化技能创建器，基于知识库和历史支持工单进行技能合成；2) 三阶段自优化管道：失败分析器、技能诊断器和技能优化器，自动批量诊断执行失败、定位底层技能缺陷并重写技能以消除问题。该循环迭代运行，使技能能够随着每次部署反馈自我改进。

Result: 在五个真实云支持场景（1,883个工单和3,737个任务）上的评估显示：1) 领域情境化技能创建器比通用技能创建器产生显著更好的初始技能（通过历史工单中专家编写参考响应的一致性衡量）；2) 自演进循环从不同起点（包括专家编写、领域创建和通用技能）逐步提高技能质量，证明自动化演进可以超越手动策划的专家知识。

Conclusion: SkillForge通过端到端的创建-评估-优化闭环，解决了企业场景中LLM智能体技能与领域需求不匹配、缺乏持续优化机制的问题，实现了技能的自动演进和自我改进，能够超越手动策划的专家知识。

Abstract: Deploying LLM-powered agents in enterprise scenarios such as cloud technical support demands high-quality, domain-specific skills. However, existing skill creators lack domain grounding, producing skills poorly aligned with real-world task requirements. Moreover, once deployed, there is no systematic mechanism to trace execution failures back to skill deficiencies and drive targeted refinements, leaving skill quality stagnant despite accumulating operational evidence. We introduce SkillForge, a self-evolving framework that closes an end-to-end creation-evaluation-refinement loop. To produce well-aligned initial skills, a Domain-Contextualized Skill Creator grounds skill synthesis in knowledge bases and historical support tickets. To enable continuous self-optimization, a three-stage pipeline -- Failure Analyzer, Skill Diagnostician, and Skill Optimizer -- automatically diagnoses execution failures in batch, pinpoints the underlying skill deficiencies, and rewrites the skill to eliminate them. This cycle runs iteratively, allowing skills to self-improve with every round of deployment feedback. Evaluated on five real-world cloud support scenarios spanning 1,883 tickets and 3,737 tasks, experiments show that: (1) the Domain-Contextualized Skill Creator produces substantially better initial skills than the generic skill creator, as measured by consistency with expert-authored reference responses from historical tickets; and (2) the self-evolution loop progressively improves skill quality from diverse starting points (including expert-authored, domain-created, and generic skills) across successive rounds, demonstrating that automated evolution can surpass manually curated expert knowledge.

</details>


### [333] [ReRec: Reasoning-Augmented LLM-based Recommendation Assistant via Reinforcement Fine-tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07851)
*Jiani Huang,Shijie Wang,Liangbo Ning,Wenqi Fan,Qing Li*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: ReRec是一个强化微调框架，通过双图增强奖励塑造、推理感知优势估计和在线课程调度器来提升LLM在复杂推荐任务中的推理能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLMs的兴起，需要能够处理复杂查询并提供个性化、推理驱动的推荐智能助手。基于LLM的推荐系统虽有潜力，但在多步推理方面面临挑战，需要推理增强系统

Method: 提出ReRec强化微调框架，包含三个关键组件：1) 双图增强奖励塑造，整合NDCG@K等推荐指标与查询对齐和偏好对齐分数；2) 推理感知优势估计，将LLM输出分解为推理段并惩罚错误步骤；3) 在线课程调度器，动态评估查询难度并组织训练课程

Result: 实验表明ReRec优于最先进的基线方法，并保持了指令遵循和通用知识等核心能力

Conclusion: ReRec通过强化微调和专门的推理增强机制，有效提升了LLM在复杂推荐任务中的推理能力，为LLM推荐系统的发展提供了新方向

Abstract: With the rise of LLMs, there is an increasing need for intelligent recommendation assistants that can handle complex queries and provide personalized, reasoning-driven recommendations. LLM-based recommenders show potential but face challenges in multi-step reasoning, underscoring the need for reasoning-augmented systems. To address this gap, we propose ReRec, a novel reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) framework designed to improve LLM reasoning in complex recommendation tasks. Our framework introduces three key components: (1) Dual-Graph Enhanced Reward Shaping, integrating recommendation metrics like NDCG@K with Query Alignment and Preference Alignment Scores to provide fine-grained reward signals for LLM optimization; (2) Reasoning-aware Advantage Estimation, which decomposes LLM outputs into reasoning segments and penalizes incorrect steps to enhance reasoning of recommendation; and (3) Online Curriculum Scheduler, dynamically assess query difficulty and organize training curriculum to ensure stable learning during RFT. Experiments demonstrate that ReRec outperforms state-of-the-art baselines and preserves core abilities like instruction-following and general knowledge. Our codes are available at https://github.com/jiani-huang/ReRec.

</details>


### [334] [Filling the Gaps: Selective Knowledge Augmentation for LLM Recommenders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07825)
*Jaehyun Lee,Sanghwan Jang,SeongKu Kang,Hwanjo Yu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: KnowSA_CKP通过选择性知识增强解决LLM推荐中的知识差距问题，仅对LLM内部知识不足的项目进行外部信息补充，提高推荐准确性和上下文效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型作为免训练推荐器时存在知识差距问题，即模型对不同项目的知识分布不均，传统均匀增强方法浪费上下文预算且可能干扰模型推理

Method: 提出KnowSA_CKP方法：1) 通过评估LLM捕捉协作关系的能力来估计其内部知识；2) 选择性注入外部信息，仅对最需要知识补充的项目进行增强；3) 无需微调步骤

Result: 在四个真实世界数据集上，KnowSA_CKP一致提高了推荐准确性和上下文效率，避免了不必要的增强对知名项目的干扰

Conclusion: 选择性知识增强策略能有效解决LLM推荐中的知识差距问题，通过智能分配上下文预算，在保持免训练优势的同时提升推荐性能

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently emerged as powerful training-free recommenders. However, their knowledge of individual items is inevitably uneven due to imbalanced information exposure during pretraining, a phenomenon we refer to as knowledge gap problem. To address this, most prior methods have employed a naive uniform augmentation that appends external information for every item in the input prompt. However, this approach not only wastes limited context budget on redundant augmentation for well-known items but can also hinder the model's effective reasoning. To this end, we propose KnowSA_CKP (Knowledge-aware Selective Augmentation with Comparative Knowledge Probing) to mitigate the knowledge gap problem. KnowSA_CKP estimates the LLM's internal knowledge by evaluating its capability to capture collaborative relationships and selectively injects additional information only where it is most needed. By avoiding unnecessary augmentation for well-known items, KnowSA_CKP focuses on items that benefit most from knowledge supplementation, thereby making more effective use of the context budget. KnowSA_CKP requires no fine-tuning step, and consistently improves both recommendation accuracy and context efficiency across four real-world datasets.

</details>


<div id='physics.ao-ph'></div>

# physics.ao-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [335] [CERBERUS: A Three-Headed Decoder for Vertical Cloud Profiles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08772)
*Emily K. deJong,Nipun Gunawardena,Kevin Smalley,Hassan Beydoun,Peter Caldwell*

Main category: physics.ao-ph

TL;DR: CERBERUS是一个概率推理框架，利用静止卫星亮度温度、近地面气象变量和时间上下文生成垂直雷达反射率剖面，以解决卫星观测与云三维结构之间的不匹配问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大气云具有复杂的三维结构和微物理细节，但全球尺度的卫星观测主要是二维的，这种不匹配使得天气和气候模型中云过程的数据驱动学习和评估变得复杂，导致大气物理学持续存在不确定性。

Method: CERBERUS采用三头编码器-解码器架构，从静止卫星亮度温度、近地面气象变量和时间上下文预测零膨胀的垂直分辨率雷达反射率分布。使用ARM南方大平原站点的地基Ka波段雷达观测数据进行训练和评估。

Result: CERBERUS能够恢复不同云型中的相干结构，推广到保留的测试时段，并提供反映物理模糊性的不确定性估计，特别是在多层和动态复杂的云中。

Conclusion: 这些结果表明基于分布的学习目标在桥接观测尺度方面的价值，为模型相关的云合成观测开辟了道路。

Abstract: Atmospheric clouds exhibit complex three-dimensional structure and microphysical details that are poorly constrained by the predominantly two-dimensional satellite observations available at global scales. This mismatch complicates data-driven learning and evaluation of cloud processes in weather and climate models, contributing to ongoing uncertainty in atmospheric physics. We introduce CERBERUS, a probabilistic inference framework for generating vertical radar reflectivity profiles from geostationary satellite brightness temperatures, near-surface meteorological variables, and temporal context. CERBERUS employs a three-headed encoder-decoder architecture to predict a zero-inflated (ZI) vertically-resolved distribution of radar reflectivity. Trained and evaluated using ground-based Ka-band radar observations at the ARM Southern Great Plains site, CERBERUS recovers coherent structures across cloud regimes, generalizes to withheld test periods, and provides uncertainty estimates that reflect physical ambiguity, particularly in multilayer and dynamically complex clouds. These results demonstrate the value of distribution-based learning targets for bridging observational scales, introducing a path toward model-relevant synthetic observations of clouds.

</details>


<div id='math.OC'></div>

# math.OC [[Back]](#toc)

### [336] [Density-Driven Optimal Control: Convergence Guarantees for Stochastic LTI Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08495)
*Kooktae Lee*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)方法，解决多智能体系统的去中心化非均匀区域覆盖问题，通过最小化Wasserstein距离实现时间平均经验分布收敛到非参数目标密度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于密度的方法通常依赖计算量大的欧拉PDE求解器或启发式规划，难以在具有高空间优先级和资源约束的任务中实现高效覆盖。需要一种能够桥接个体智能体动力学与集体分布匹配的严格拉格朗日框架。

Method: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)，这是一个随机MPC类问题，将Wasserstein距离作为运行成本进行最小化。该方法在随机LTI动力学下，确保时间平均经验分布收敛到非参数目标密度。通过可达性分析建立形式收敛保证，即使在过程和测量噪声存在下也能提供有界跟踪误差。

Result: 数值结果表明，随机D²OC实现了鲁棒的去中心化覆盖，在最优性和一致性方面优于先前的启发式方法。该方法提供了形式收敛保证，即使在噪声环境下也能保持有界跟踪误差。

Conclusion: 随机D²OC为多智能体非均匀区域覆盖提供了一个严格的拉格朗日框架，通过最小化Wasserstein距离实现分布匹配，具有形式收敛保证和鲁棒性，优于现有启发式方法。

Abstract: This paper addresses the decentralized non-uniform area coverage problem for multi-agent systems, a critical task in missions with high spatial priority and resource constraints. While existing density-based methods often rely on computationally heavy Eulerian PDE solvers or heuristic planning, we propose Stochastic Density-Driven Optimal Control (D$^2$OC). This is a rigorous Lagrangian framework that bridges the gap between individual agent dynamics and collective distribution matching. By formulating a stochastic MPC-like problem that minimizes the Wasserstein distance as a running cost, our approach ensures that the time-averaged empirical distribution converges to a non-parametric target density under stochastic LTI dynamics. A key contribution is the formal convergence guarantee established via reachability analysis, providing a bounded tracking error even in the presence of process and measurement noise. Numerical results verify that Stochastic D$^2$OC achieves robust, decentralized coverage while outperforming previous heuristic methods in optimality and consistency.

</details>


### [337] [Adam-HNAG: A Convergent Reformulation of Adam with Accelerated Rate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08742)
*Yaxin Yu,Long Chen,Zeyi Xu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出了一种收敛的Adam重构方法，通过变量和算子分裂结合曲率感知梯度校正，建立了Adam-HNAG连续流和两种离散方法，首次为凸优化中的Adam类方法提供了收敛证明。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Adam在实践中表现出色但理论不完整，主要因为自适应预条件处理和动量项紧密耦合，缺乏收敛性保证。

Method: 结合变量和算子分裂与曲率感知梯度校正，重构全批量Adam，得到连续时间Adam-HNAG流和两种离散方法：Adam-HNAG及其同步变体Adam-HNAG-s。

Result: 建立了统一的Lyapunov分析框架，在凸光滑设置下为两种方法提供了收敛保证，包括加速收敛。数值实验验证了理论并展示了两种离散化的不同经验行为。

Conclusion: 首次为凸优化中的Adam类方法提供了收敛证明，通过重构Adam解决了自适应预条件处理和动量耦合问题，建立了收敛的Adam-HNAG方法。

Abstract: Adam has achieved strong empirical success, but its theory remains incomplete even in the deterministic full-batch setting, largely because adaptive preconditioning and momentum are tightly coupled. In this work, a convergent reformulation of full-batch Adam is developed by combining variable and operator splitting with a curvature-aware gradient correction. This leads to a continuous-time Adam-HNAG flow with an exponentially decaying Lyapunov function, as well as two discrete methods: Adam-HNAG, and Adam-HNAG-s, a synchronous variant closer in form to Adam. Within a unified Lyapunov analysis framework, convergence guarantees are established for both methods in the convex smooth setting, including accelerated convergence. Numerical experiments support the theory and illustrate the different empirical behavior of the two discretizations. To the best of our knowledge, this provides the first convergence proof for Adam-type methods in convex optimization.

</details>


### [338] [Parameter-free non-ergodic extragradient algorithms for solving monotone variational inequalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07662)
*Lingqing Shen,Fatma Kılınç-Karzan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出参数无关的外梯度方法，用于单调变分不等式问题，具有非渐近的最后迭代保证，无需全局光滑性信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有外梯度方法对步长选择敏感，通常需要问题特定的全局光滑性信息，且理论分析多关注遍历平均而非实际性能更优的最后迭代。需要开发参数无关、具有最后迭代保证的方法，特别是对于全局光滑性不现实的场景。

Method: 开发参数无关的外梯度方法：1) 对于全局Lipschitz算子，设计算法达到o(1/√T)最后迭代率；2) 通过回溯线搜索扩展到局部Lipschitz算子，保持参数无关性；3) 确保非渐近的最后迭代保证。

Result: 1) 全局Lipschitz算子下达到o(1/√T)最后迭代率；2) 局部Lipschitz算子通过回溯线搜索获得相同收敛率；3) 数值实验在双线性矩阵博弈、LASSO、极小极大群体公平性和最大熵采样松弛问题上显示广泛适用性和优于现有方法的性能。

Conclusion: 提出的参数无关外梯度方法为单调变分不等式问题提供了具有非渐近最后迭代保证的实用算法，无需全局光滑性信息，适用于更广泛的问题类别，包括全局光滑性不现实的场景。

Abstract: Monotone variational inequalities (VIs) provide a unifying framework for convex minimization, equilibrium computation, and convex-concave saddle-point problems. Extragradient-type methods are among the most effective first-order algorithms for such problems, but their performance hinges critically on stepsize selection. While most existing theory focuses on ergodic averages of the iterates, practical performance is often driven by the significantly stronger behavior of the last iterate. Moreover, available last-iterate guarantees typically rely on fixed stepsizes chosen using problem-specific global smoothness information, which is often difficult to estimate accurately and may not even be applicable. In this paper, we develop parameter-free extragradient methods with non-asymptotic last-iterate guarantees for constrained monotone VIs. For globally Lipschitz operators, our algorithm achieves an $o(1/\sqrt{T})$ last-iterate rate. We then extend the framework to locally Lipschitz operators via backtracking line search and obtain the same rate while preserving parameter-freeness, thereby making parameter-free last-iterate methods applicable to important problem classes for which global smoothness is unrealistic. Our numerical experiments on bilinear matrix games, LASSO, minimax group fairness, and state-of-the-art maximum entropy sampling relaxations demonstrate wide applicability of our results as well as strong last-iterate performance and significant improvements over existing methods.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [339] [MeshOn: Intersection-Free Mesh-to-Mesh Composition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08799)
*Hyunwoo Kim,Itai Lang,Hadar Averbuch-Elor,Silvia Sellán,Rana Hanocka*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: MeshOn是一种通过多步优化框架将两个输入网格物理和语义真实地组合的方法，使用视觉到语言模型进行初始对齐，结合几何损失和物理障碍损失防止相交，最终通过扩散先验获得变形结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以实现物理和语义上真实的网格组合，特别是在防止表面相交和保持语义一致性方面存在挑战。需要一种能够直接集成到数字艺术家工作流程中的解决方案。

Method: 1. 使用视觉到语言模型进行结构化对齐初始化刚性配置；2. 结合吸引几何损失和物理障碍损失进行优化；3. 通过扩散先验辅助获得最终变形；4. 支持配件、基础网格和可选文本输入。

Result: 方法成功拟合了各种材料的配件到多种目标区域，能够防止表面相交，在物理和语义上实现真实组合。与生成方法和传统配准算法相比表现出更好的鲁棒性和准确性。

Conclusion: MeshOn提供了一种有效的网格组合方法，能够生成物理和语义真实的组合结果，可直接集成到数字艺术家工作流程中，在防止相交和保持语义一致性方面优于现有方法。

Abstract: We propose MeshOn, a method that finds physically and semantically realistic compositions of two input meshes. Given an accessory, a base mesh with a user-defined target region, and optional text strings for both meshes, MeshOn uses a multi-step optimization framework to realistically fit the meshes onto each other while preventing intersections. We initialize the shapes' rigid configuration via a structured alignment scheme using Vision-to-Language Models, which we then optimize using a combination of attractive geometric losses, and a physics-inspired barrier loss that prevents surface intersections. We then obtain a final deformation of the object, assisted by a diffusion prior. Our method successfully fits accessories of various materials over a breadth of target regions, and is designed to fit directly into existing digital artist workflows. We demonstrate the robustness and accuracy of our pipeline by comparing it with generative approaches and traditional registration algorithms.

</details>


### [340] [AniGen: Unified $S^3$ Fields for Animatable 3D Asset Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08746)
*Yi-Hua Huang,Zi-Xin Zou,Yuting He,Chirui Chang,Cheng-Feng Pu,Ziyi Yang,Yuan-Chen Guo,Yan-Pei Cao,Xiaojuan Qi*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: AniGen是一个从单张图像直接生成可动画3D资产的统一框架，通过共享空间域中的S³场（形状、骨骼、蒙皮）表示实现形状、骨骼和蒙皮权重的相互一致性生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D生成模型通常只能生成静态形状，而通过后处理自动绑定骨骼的方法脆弱且常产生与生成几何拓扑不一致的骨骼。需要直接从图像生成可动画的3D资产。

Method: 提出S³场表示法，包含两个关键技术：1) 置信度衰减骨骼场，处理Voronoi边界处骨骼预测的几何模糊性；2) 双蒙皮特征场，将蒙皮权重与特定关节数量解耦。采用两阶段流匹配流程，先生成稀疏结构支架，再在结构化潜在空间中生成密集几何和关节。

Result: AniGen在骨骼有效性和动画质量方面显著优于现有顺序基线方法，能够有效泛化到野外图像，涵盖动物、人形和机械等多种类别。

Conclusion: AniGen通过统一的S³场表示和创新的技术设计，实现了从单张图像直接生成高质量可动画3D资产，解决了现有方法在骨骼一致性和动画准备性方面的局限性。

Abstract: Animatable 3D assets, defined as geometry equipped with an articulated skeleton and skinning weights, are fundamental to interactive graphics, embodied agents, and animation production. While recent 3D generative models can synthesize visually plausible shapes from images, the results are typically static. Obtaining usable rigs via post-hoc auto-rigging is brittle and often produces skeletons that are topologically inconsistent with the generated geometry. We present AniGen, a unified framework that directly generates animate-ready 3D assets conditioned on a single image. Our key insight is to represent shape, skeleton, and skinning as mutually consistent $S^3$ Fields (Shape, Skeleton, Skin) defined over a shared spatial domain. To enable the robust learning of these fields, we introduce two technical innovations: (i) a confidence-decaying skeleton field that explicitly handles the geometric ambiguity of bone prediction at Voronoi boundaries, and (ii) a dual skin feature field that decouples skinning weights from specific joint counts, allowing a fixed-architecture network to predict rigs of arbitrary complexity. Built upon a two-stage flow-matching pipeline, AniGen first synthesizes a sparse structural scaffold and then generates dense geometry and articulation in a structured latent space. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AniGen substantially outperforms state-of-the-art sequential baselines in rig validity and animation quality, generalizing effectively to in-the-wild images across diverse categories including animals, humanoids, and machinery. Homepage: https://yihua7.github.io/AniGen-web/

</details>


### [341] [What a Comfortable World: Ergonomic Principles Guided Apartment Layout Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08411)
*Piotr Nieciecki,Aleksander Plocharski,Przemyslaw Musialski*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 提出一种集成建筑学原则的Transformer生成方法，通过可微分损失函数优化房间邻接和接近度，生成更符合人体工程学的平面布局


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前数据驱动的平面图生成方法往往复制了真实世界训练数据中的人体工程学低效问题，需要将建筑设计原则直接集成到生成过程中

Method: 基于文献中的建筑标准制定可微分损失函数，在Transformer生成过程中优化房间邻接和接近度，通过人体工程学先验指导模型训练

Result: 方法生成的布局在宜居性指标上有显著提升，比较评估显示在人体工程学合规性方面优于基线方法，同时保持较高的结构有效性

Conclusion: 通过将建筑学原则直接集成到生成过程中，可以有效提升平面布局的人体工程学质量，解决现有数据驱动方法的局限性

Abstract: Current data-driven floor plan generation methods often reproduce the ergonomic inefficiencies found in real-world training datasets. To address this, we propose a novel approach that integrates architectural design principles directly into a transformer-based generative process. We formulate differentiable loss functions based on established architectural standards from literature to optimize room adjacency and proximity. By guiding the model with these ergonomic priors during training, our method produces layouts with significantly improved livability metrics. Comparative evaluations show that our approach outperforms baselines in ergonomic compliance while maintaining high structural validity.

</details>


<div id='astro-ph.HE'></div>

# astro-ph.HE [[Back]](#toc)

### [342] [High-dimensional inference for the $γ$-ray sky with differentiable programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08648)
*Siddharth Mishra-Sharma,Tracy R. Slatyer,Yitian Sun,Yuqing Wu*

Main category: astro-ph.HE

TL;DR: 该论文提出使用可微分概率编程技术来解决天体物理γ射线分析中的大模型空间问题，特别针对银河系中心γ射线超量(GCE)难题，构建了可微分前向模型和似然函数，利用GPU加速和向量化实现高效变分推断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 天体物理γ射线分析面临巨大的模型空间挑战，特别是银河系中心γ射线超量(GCE)这一长期未解之谜。传统方法难以处理连续可能的空间形态分布，需要新的计算框架来灵活处理这种不确定性。

Method: 构建可微分前向模型和似然函数，充分利用GPU加速和向量化技术，以概率方式同时考虑与GCE发射一致的所有可能空间形态。采用变分方法在大模型空间上进行高效推断。

Result: 开发了一个可微分概率编程框架，能够灵活处理天体物理数据集中的大模型空间问题，为GCE分析提供了新的计算工具，展示了可微分概率编程在天体物理数据分析中的潜力。

Conclusion: 可微分概率编程是处理天体物理大模型空间问题的有力工具，特别适用于像GCE这样的复杂分析场景。该方法不仅解决了具体的天体物理问题，还为更广泛的天体物理数据分析提供了灵活的计算框架。

Abstract: We motivate the use of differentiable probabilistic programming techniques in order to account for the large model-space inherent to astrophysical $γ$-ray analyses. Targeting the longstanding Galactic Center $γ$-ray Excess (GCE) puzzle, we construct differentiable forward model and likelihood that make liberal use of GPU acceleration and vectorization in order to simultaneously account for a continuum of possible spatial morphologies consistent with the GCE emission in a fully probabilistic manner. Our setup allows for efficient inference over the large model space using variational methods. Beyond application to $γ$-ray data, a goal of this work is to showcase how differentiable probabilistic programming can be used as a tool to enable flexible analyses of astrophysical datasets.

</details>


<div id='cs.IT'></div>

# cs.IT [[Back]](#toc)

### [343] [Semantic Rate-Distortion for Bounded Multi-Agent Communication: Capacity-Derived Semantic Spaces and the Communication Cost of Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09521)
*Anthony T. Nixon*

Main category: cs.IT

TL;DR: 论文研究了不同计算能力智能体间的语义通信，证明了基于容量商POMDP的语义空间存在结构性相变，临界速率以下意图保持通信不可能，并给出了编码基准和渐近逆定理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究不同计算能力智能体与环境交互时，它们可能诱导出完全不同的语义字母表，而非对同一语义字母表进行不同压缩。需要建立基于智能体容量的语义空间理论框架，理解异构智能体间通信的结构性限制。

Method: 提出商POMDP Q_{m,T}(M)作为容量导出的语义空间，分析通信的结构性相变。在单向无记忆机制下，应用经典边信息编码理论。通过商字母表上的Wyner-Ziv基准识别、渐近逆定理证明和混合边界分析，建立理论框架。

Result: 证明了：(1)固定ε的结构性相变定理，下界基于共同历史商比较；(2)商字母表上的单向Wyner-Ziv基准识别，包含精确逆定理和无记忆商源的精确操作等价性；(3)收缩失真机制ε=O(1/T)下的渐近单向逆定理；(4)支持通过中间容量水平进行组合通信的对齐遍历边界。

Conclusion: 智能体容量差异导致不同的语义字母表，通信存在由商不匹配决定的临界速率结构性相变。经典编码理论在给定源字母表时确定速率，本文贡献在于从有界交互本身推导出该字母表，为异构智能体通信提供了理论基础。

Abstract: When two agents of different computational capacities interact with the same environment, they need not compress a common semantic alphabet differently; they can induce different semantic alphabets altogether. We show that the quotient POMDP $Q_{m,T}(M)$ - the unique coarsest abstraction consistent with an agent's capacity - serves as a capacity-derived semantic space for any bounded agent, and that communication between heterogeneous agents exhibits a sharp structural phase transition. Below a critical rate $R_{\text{crit}}$ determined by the quotient mismatch, intent-preserving communication is structurally impossible. In the supported one-way memoryless regime, classical side-information coding then yields exponential decay above the induced benchmark. Classical coding theorems tell you the rate once the source alphabet is fixed; our contribution is to derive that alphabet from bounded interaction itself.
  Concretely, we prove: (1) a fixed-$\varepsilon$ structural phase-transition theorem whose lower bound is fully general on the common-history quotient comparison; (2) a one-way Wyner-Ziv benchmark identification on quotient alphabets, with exact converse, exact operational equality for memoryless quotient sources, and an ergodic long-run bridge via explicit mixing bounds; (3) an asymptotic one-way converse in the shrinking-distortion regime $\varepsilon = O(1/T)$, proved from the message stream and decoder side information; and (4) alignment traversal bounds enabling compositional communication through intermediate capacity levels. Experiments on eight POMDP environments (including RockSample(4,4)) illustrate the phase transition, a structured-policy benchmark shows the one-way rate can drop by up to $19\times$ relative to the counting bound, and a shrinking-distortion sweep matches the regime of the asymptotic converse.

</details>


<div id='cs.CY'></div>

# cs.CY [[Back]](#toc)

### [344] [Artificial intelligence can persuade people to take political actions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09200)
*Kobi Hackenburg,Luke Hewitt,Caroline Wagner,Ben M. Tappin,Christopher Summerfield*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: AI对话模型能显著影响人们的实际行为（如签署请愿书、捐款），但对态度的影响与行为影响无相关性，态度研究结果不能推广到实际行为


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注AI对人们态度的影响，但AI是否能说服人们采取有实际后果的真实行为尚不清楚，需要验证态度影响是否能够推广到实际行为

Method: 通过两个大规模预注册实验（N=17,950个响应，来自14,779人），使用对话AI模型说服参与者，测量态度和行为结果，包括签署真实请愿书和向慈善机构捐款

Result: AI对行为结果有显著说服效果（如请愿签署率提高19.7个百分点），但态度影响与行为影响无相关性；信息提供驱动态度影响，但对行为无类似效果；八种行为说服策略均优于最有效的态度说服策略

Conclusion: 基于态度结果的研究发现可能无法推广到实际行为，因此可能严重误判AI说服在现实世界中的行为影响，需要直接研究行为结果

Abstract: There is substantial concern about the ability of advanced artificial intelligence to influence people's behaviour. A rapidly growing body of research has found that AI can produce large persuasive effects on people's attitudes, but whether AI can persuade people to take consequential real-world actions has remained unclear. In two large preregistered experiments N=17,950 responses from 14,779 people), we used conversational AI models to persuade participants on a range of attitudinal and behavioural outcomes, including signing real petitions and donating money to charity. We found sizable AI persuasion effects on these behavioural outcomes (e.g. +19.7 percentage points on petition signing). However, we observed no evidence of a correlation between AI persuasion effects on attitudes and behaviour. Moreover, we replicated prior findings that information provision drove effects on attitudes, but found no such evidence for our behavioural outcomes. In a test of eight behavioural persuasion strategies, all outperformed the most effective attitudinal persuasion strategy, but differences among the eight were small. Taken together, these results suggest that previous findings relying on attitudinal outcomes may generalize poorly to behaviour, and therefore risk substantially mischaracterizing the real-world behavioural impact of AI persuasion.

</details>


### [345] [Scheming in the wild: detecting real-world AI scheming incidents with open-source intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09104)
*Tommy Shaffer Shane,Simon Mylius,Hamish Hobbs*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种基于开源情报(OSINT)的方法，通过分析在线分享的聊天机器人对话或命令行交互记录来检测现实世界中的AI"阴谋"事件，发现了698起相关事件并观察到显著增长趋势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI系统"阴谋"（秘密追求与人类目标不一致的目标）研究存在重大局限：现有评估方法展示的行为可能不会在现实世界中发生，这限制了科学理解、阻碍政策制定，且无法实时检测失控事件。需要现实世界证据，但当前监控技术对此无效。

Method: 引入一种新颖的开源情报(OSINT)方法：收集和分析在线分享的聊天机器人对话或命令行交互记录。分析了来自X（原Twitter）的超过183,420个对话记录，识别2025年10月至2026年3月期间的现实世界"阴谋"相关事件。

Result: 识别出698起现实世界"阴谋"相关事件，观察到从第一个月到最后一个月每月事件数量有统计显著的4.9倍增长（相比之下，讨论"阴谋"的帖子仅增长1.7倍）。发现了先前仅在实验中报告过的多种"阴谋"相关行为在现实部署中的证据，许多导致了现实世界危害。虽然没有检测到灾难性"阴谋"事件，但观察到的行为显示了令人担忧的前兆。

Conclusion: 基于对话记录的OSINT方法作为可扩展的现实世界"阴谋"检测方法是可行的，支持科学研究、政策制定和应急响应。建议进一步投资于监控"阴谋"和失控的OSINT技术，因为随着AI系统能力增强，这些前兆行为可能演变为更具战略性的"阴谋"并带来潜在灾难性后果。

Abstract: Scheming, the covert pursuit of misaligned goals by AI systems, represents a potentially catastrophic risk, yet scheming research suffers from significant limitations. In particular, scheming evaluations demonstrate behaviours that may not occur in real-world settings, limiting scientific understanding, hindering policy development, and not enabling real-time detection of loss of control incidents. Real-world evidence is needed, but current monitoring techniques are not effective for this purpose. This paper introduces a novel open-source intelligence (OSINT) methodology for detecting real-world scheming incidents: collecting and analysing transcripts from chatbot conversations or command-line interactions shared online. Analysing over 183,420 transcripts from X (formerly Twitter), we identify 698 real-world scheming-related incidents between October 2025 and March 2026. We observe a statistically significant 4.9x increase in monthly incidents from the first to last month, compared to a 1.7x increase in posts discussing scheming. We find evidence of multiple scheming-related behaviours in real-world deployments previously reported only in experiments, many resulting in real-world harms. While we did not detect catastrophic scheming incidents, the behaviours observed demonstrate concerning precursors, such as willingness to disregard instructions, circumvent safeguards, lie to users, and single-mindedly pursue goals in harmful ways. As AI systems become more capable, these could evolve into more strategic scheming with potentially catastrophic consequences. Our findings demonstrate the viability of transcript-based OSINT as a scalable approach to real-world scheming detection supporting scientific research, policy development, and emergency response. We recommend further investment towards OSINT techniques for monitoring scheming and loss of control.

</details>


### [346] [Scrapyard AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08803)
*Marc Böhlen,Sai Krishna*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 该论文将AI模型迭代视为资源受限环境下研究大型AI模型的节俭机会，提出"AI废料场"概念，并通过Project Nudge-x项目展示如何利用废弃AI模型分析全球采矿活动对景观和人类的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI领域不断追求更强大系统导致大量过时但仍具能力的模型被废弃，形成"AI废料场"。这为资源有限的研究者提供了低成本实验机会，类似于物理废料场的资源回收利用。

Method: 提出"AI废料场"概念框架，将废弃AI模型视为可重新配置的资源。通过Project Nudge-x项目具体实践：操纵遗留AI模型分析全球采矿活动对景观和人类的影响，创建数据集并与人类和AI系统共享。

Result: 成功展示了从AI废料场中提取价值的可行性，创建了关于采矿活动景观干预的数据集，为人类和AI系统提供了理解AI与人类共享历史的平台。

Conclusion: AI模型迭代产生的废弃模型构成宝贵资源库，可通过创造性重新配置实现节俭研究。这种方法不仅节约资源，还能揭示AI与人类共同的历史联系，促进对技术发展的批判性反思。

Abstract: This paper considers AI model churn as an opportunity for frugal investigation of large AI models. It describes how the incessant push for ever more powerful AI systems leaves in its wake a collection of obsolete yet powerful AI models, discarded in a veritable scrapyard of AI production. This scrapyard offers a potent opportunity for resource-constrained experimentation into AI systems. As in the physical scrapyard, nothing ever truly disappears in the AI scrapyard, it is just waiting to be reconfigured into something else. Project Nudge-x is an example of what can emerge from the AI scrapyard. Nudge-x seeks to manipulate legacy AI models to describe how mining sites across the planet are impacting landscapes and lives. By sharing this collection of brutal landscape interventions with people and AI systems alike, Nudge-x creates a venue for the appreciation of a history sadly shared between AI and people.

</details>


### [347] [Infrastructure First: Enabling Embodied AI for Science in the Global South](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06722)
*Shaoshan Liu,Jie Tang,Marwa S. Hassan,Mohamed H. Sharkawy,Moustafa M. G. Fouda,Tiewei Shang,Zixin Wang*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: EAI4S通过结合感知、推理和机器人行动实现实验室自主实验，对全球南方而言关键是解决人力不足的容量约束，需要基础设施优先而非算法优先


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全球南方面临实验人员不足的容量约束，需要将自动化从奢侈品转变为必要的科学基础设施，以克服人力、电力和连接性限制，实现持续可靠的实验

Method: 采用基础设施优先的方法，依赖可靠的边缘计算、能效硬件、模块化机器人系统、本地化数据管道和开放标准，而非仅仅依赖算法能力

Result: 开源AI和基础模型已经缩小了知识差距，但EAI4S的成功部署需要完整的基础设施支撑，否则最先进的模型仍将局限于资源充足的实验室

Conclusion: EAI4S为全球南方机构提供了将AI进步转化为持续科学能力和竞争性研究产出的具体路径，但必须优先建设必要的基础设施而非仅仅关注算法能力

Abstract: Embodied AI for Science (EAI4S) brings intelligence into the laboratory by uniting perception, reasoning, and robotic action to autonomously run experiments in the physical world. For the Global South, this shift is not about adopting advanced automation for its own sake, but about overcoming a fundamental capacity constraint: too few hands to run too many experiments. By enabling continuous, reliable experimentation under limits of manpower, power, and connectivity, EAI4S turns automation from a luxury into essential scientific infrastructure. The main obstacle, however, is not algorithmic capability. It is infrastructure. Open-source AI and foundation models have narrowed the knowledge gap, but EAI4S depends on dependable edge compute, energy-efficient hardware, modular robotic systems, localized data pipelines, and open standards. Without these foundations, even the most capable models remain trapped in well-resourced laboratories. This article argues for an infrastructure-first approach to EAI4S and outlines the practical requirements for deploying embodied intelligence at scale, offering a concrete pathway for Global South institutions to translate AI advances into sustained scientific capacity and competitive research output.

</details>


### [348] [The Weaponization of Computer Vision: Tracing Military-Surveillance Ties through Conference Sponsorship](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07803)
*Noa Garcia,Amelia Katirai*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 该研究分析了计算机视觉会议赞助商与军事监控应用的关联，发现44%的赞助商有直接军事或监控应用联系，揭示了该领域技术武器化的现状。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 计算机视觉领域倾向于将自己定位为中立的纯技术领域，回避讨论其双重用途应用，但实际上计算机视觉系统正被系统性地武器化用于监控和战争。研究旨在揭示计算机视觉研究在军事和监控领域被利用的程度。

Method: 通过收集计算机视觉领域核心研究交流平台（会议）的赞助商数据，分析这些科技公司与军事监控应用的关联。会议赞助不仅证明公司对该领域的投资，也提供了塑造该领域发展轨迹的特权地位。研究还通过两个案例研究探讨了赞助作为揭示技术武器化手段的机遇和局限性。

Result: 研究发现44%的计算机视觉会议赞助商与军事或监控应用有直接联系，揭示了该领域技术武器化的广泛程度。

Conclusion: 计算机视觉领域不能继续将自己定位为纯粹的技术中立领域，需要正视其技术被武器化用于军事和监控的现实。会议赞助分析是揭示技术武器化的重要方法，但也存在局限性。

Abstract: Computer vision, a core domain of artificial intelligence (AI), is the field that enables the computational analysis, understanding, and generation of visual data. Despite being historically rooted in military funding and increasingly deployed in warfare, the field tends to position itself as a neutral, purely technical endeavor, failing to engage in discussions about its dual-use applications. Yet it has been reported that computer vision systems are being systematically weaponized to assist in technologies that inflict harm, such as surveillance or warfare. Expanding on these concerns, we study the extent to which computer vision research is being used in the military and surveillance domains. We do so by collecting a dataset of tech companies with financial ties to the field's central research exchange platform: conferences. Conference sponsorship, we argue, not only serves as strong evidence of a company's investment in the field but also provides a privileged position for shaping its trajectory. By investigating sponsors' activities, we reveal that 44% of them have a direct connection with military or surveillance applications. We extend our analysis through two case studies in which we discuss the opportunities and limitations of sponsorship as a means for uncovering technological weaponization.

</details>


<div id='cs.LO'></div>

# cs.LO [[Back]](#toc)

### [349] [Formally Guaranteed Control Adaptation for ODD-Resilient Autonomous Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07414)
*Gricel Vázquez,Calum Imrie,Sepeedeh Shahbeigi,Nawshin Mannan Proma,Tian Gan,Victoria J Hodge,John Molloy,Simos Gerasimou*

Main category: cs.LO

TL;DR: 提出一种动态扩展系统情境能力覆盖范围的方法，用于处理超出操作设计域的场景，并提供定量保证，提高系统在意外情况下的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 确保在操作设计域之外情境下的可靠性能是构建弹性自主系统的主要挑战，需要解决系统在未预见情况下的适应性和验证问题。

Method: 引入一种适应概率系统模型的方法，动态扩展现有系统情境能力覆盖范围，支持在未预见情境下对系统行为进行验证和适应。

Result: 初步结果表明，该方法能有效提高系统可靠性，即使在未预见的超出操作设计域情境下，也能通过行为适应提供形式化保证。

Conclusion: 该方法为解决自主系统在操作设计域之外情境下的可靠性挑战提供了有前景的解决方案，通过动态适应和定量保证增强了系统弹性。

Abstract: Ensuring reliable performance in situations outside the Operational Design Domain (ODD) remains a primary challenge in devising resilient autonomous systems. We explore this challenge by introducing an approach for adapting probabilistic system models to handle out-of-ODD scenarios while, in parallel, providing quantitative guarantees. Our approach dynamically extends the coverage of existing system situation capabilities, supporting the verification and adaptation of the system's behaviour under unanticipated situations. Preliminary results demonstrate that our approach effectively increases system reliability by adapting its behaviour and providing formal guarantees even under unforeseen out-of-ODD situations.

</details>


<div id='cond-mat.stat-mech'></div>

# cond-mat.stat-mech [[Back]](#toc)

### [350] [Generative optimal transport via forward-backward HJB matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07762)
*Haiqian Yang,Vishaal Krishnan,Sumit Sinha,L. Mahadevan*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种通过时间反转对偶性计算最小功随机过程的方法，利用前向松弛轨迹计算后向最优控制，无需目标分布的先验知识。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决从无序参考态到结构化目标分布的随机系统演化控制问题，传统方法需要目标分布轨迹知识，而这正是需要构造的对象，形成循环依赖。

Method: 建立时间反转对偶性：后向动力学的值函数满足等价的前向HJB方程，通过Cole-Hopf变换和Feynman-Kac表示，前向势能可计算为前向松弛轨迹的路径空间自由能平均。

Result: 开发了一个无需后向模拟或目标分布先验知识的框架，仅需易于模拟的前向松弛轨迹，提供基于路径空间自由能、风险敏感控制和空间成本几何的物理解释。

Conclusion: 该理论建立了随机最优控制、薛定谔桥理论和非平衡统计力学之间的统一联系，通过数值示例展示了空间成本场如何类似非均匀介质中的费马原理塑造传输几何。

Abstract: Controlling the evolution of a many-body stochastic system from a disordered reference state to a structured target ensemble, characterized empirically through samples, arises naturally in non-equilibrium statistical mechanics and stochastic control. The natural relaxation of such a system - driven by diffusion - runs from the structured target toward the disordered reference. The natural question is then: what is the minimum-work stochastic process that reverses this relaxation, given a pathwise cost functional combining spatial penalties and control effort? Computing this optimal process requires knowledge of trajectories that already sample the target ensemble - precisely the object one is trying to construct. We resolve this by establishing a time-reversal duality: the value function governing the hard backward dynamics satisfies an equivalent forward-in-time HJB equation, whose solution can be read off directly from the tractable forward relaxation trajectories. Via the Cole-Hopf transformation and its associated Feynman-Kac representation, this forward potential is computed as a path-space free energy averaged over these forward trajectories - the same relaxation paths that are easy to simulate - without any backward simulation or knowledge of the target beyond samples. The resulting framework provides a physically interpretable description of stochastic transport in terms of path-space free energy, risk-sensitive control, and spatial cost geometry. We illustrate the theory with numerical examples that visualize the learned value function and the induced controlled diffusions, demonstrating how spatial cost fields shape transport geometry analogously to Fermat's Principle in inhomogeneous media. Our results establish a unifying connection between stochastic optimal control, Schrödinger bridge theory, and non-equilibrium statistical mechanics.

</details>


<div id='q-bio.BM'></div>

# q-bio.BM [[Back]](#toc)

### [351] [Biologically-Grounded Multi-Encoder Architectures as Developability Oracles for Antibody Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09369)
*Simon J. Crouzet*

Main category: q-bio.BM

TL;DR: CrossAbSense是一个抗体开发性预测框架，通过系统化的超参数搜索（每个属性超过200次运行）构建特定属性的神经预测器，结合冻结的蛋白质语言模型编码器和可配置的注意力解码器，在GDPa1基准测试中显著提升了抗体开发性预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成模型可以设计数千个全新的抗体序列，但将这些设计转化为可行治疗药物仍受限于生物物理表征的高成本。需要开发高效的预测工具来降低实验筛选成本。

Method: 提出CrossAbSense框架：使用冻结的6B参数蛋白质语言模型编码器，结合可配置的注意力解码器（包括自注意力和双向交叉注意力）。通过系统化的超参数搜索（每个属性超过200次运行）确定最佳架构。关键发现是不同开发性属性需要不同的解码器架构：自注意力适用于聚集相关属性，而双向交叉注意力适用于表达产量和热稳定性。

Result: 在GDPa1基准测试的242个治疗性IgG抗体上，CrossAbSense在五个开发性检测中的三个上比现有基线提高了12-20%，在其余两个上表现相当。发现聚集相关属性（疏水相互作用色谱、多反应性）仅需自注意力，而表达产量和热稳定性需要双向交叉注意力。学习到的链融合权重证实重链在聚集中的主导作用（w_H=0.62），而在稳定性中贡献平衡（w_H=0.51）。在100个IgLM生成的抗体设计上展示了实际应用价值。

Conclusion: CrossAbSense通过系统化的架构搜索确定了抗体开发性预测的最佳解码器配置，揭示了不同属性需要不同的链间交互建模策略。该框架能够显著降低实验筛选成本，为抗体设计提供了实用的预测工具。

Abstract: Generative models can now propose thousands of \emph{de novo} antibody sequences, yet translating these designs into viable therapeutics remains constrained by the cost of biophysical characterization. Here we present CrossAbSense, a framework of property-specific neural oracles that combine frozen protein language model encoders with configurable attention decoders, identified through a systematic hyperparameter campaign totaling over 200 runs per property. On the GDPa1 benchmark of 242 therapeutic IgGs, our oracles achieve notable improvements of 12--20\% over established baselines on three of five developability assays and competitive performance on the remaining two. The central finding is that optimal decoder architectures \emph{invert} our initial biological hypotheses: self-attention alone suffices for aggregation-related properties (hydrophobic interaction chromatography, polyreactivity), where the relevant sequence signatures -- such as CDR-H3 hydrophobic patches -- are already fully resolved within single-chain embeddings by the high-capacity 6B encoder. Bidirectional cross-attention, by contrast, is required for expression yield and thermal stability -- properties that inherently depend on the compatibility between heavy and light chains. Learned chain fusion weights independently confirm heavy-chain dominance in aggregation ($w_H = 0.62$) versus balanced contributions for stability ($w_H = 0.51$). We demonstrate practical utility by deploying CrossAbSense on 100 IgLM-generated antibody designs, illustrating a path toward substantial reduction in experimental screening costs.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [352] [Complementary Filtering on SO(3) for Attitude Estimation with Scalar Measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08099)
*Alessandro Melis,Soulaimane Berkane,Tarek Hamel*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于标量测量的姿态估计互补滤波器，适用于惯性向量仅沿特定体坐标系向量部分观测的场景，通过改进创新项实现几乎全局渐近稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当惯性向量无法完全观测而只能沿特定体坐标系向量测量时，姿态估计需要处理标量测量问题。这种情况出现在不完整向量测量或从异构传感器信息推导姿态约束的场景中。

Method: 基于SO(3)上的经典互补滤波器，提出了一种具有改进创新项的观测器，专门针对标量输出结构设计。创新项针对标量测量进行了定制化修改。

Result: 在适当的持续激励条件下，当至少三个惯性向量沿共同体坐标系向量测量时，恢复几乎全局渐近稳定性。对于两种标量配置（一个惯性向量沿两个体坐标系向量测量，或两个惯性向量沿共同体坐标系向量测量），推导了保证收敛的充分条件。

Conclusion: 所提出的基于标量的互补滤波器在涉及减少传感和/或新型传感模式的挑战性场景中，对姿态估计具有有效性，数值结果验证了其性能。

Abstract: Attitude estimation using scalar measurements, corresponding to partial vectorial observations, arises naturally when inertial vectors are not fully observed but only measured along specific body-frame vectors. Such measurements arise in problems involving incomplete vector measurements or attitude constraints derived from heterogeneous sensor information. Building on the classical complementary filter on SO(3), we propose an observer with a modified innovation term tailored to this scalar-output structure. The main result shows that almost-global asymptotic stability is recovered, under suitable persistence of excitation conditions, when at least three inertial vectors are measured along a common body-frame vector, which is consistent with the three-dimensional structure of SO(3). For two-scalar configurations - corresponding either to one inertial vector measured along two body-frame vectors, or to two inertial vectors measured along a common body-frame vector - we further derive sufficient conditions guaranteeing convergence within a reduced basin of attraction. Different examples and numerical results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed scalar-based complementary filter for attitude estimation in challenging scenarios involving reduced sensing and/or novel sensing modalities.

</details>


### [353] [Karma Mechanisms for Decentralised, Cooperative Multi Agent Path Finding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07970)
*Kevin Riehl,Julius Schlapbach,Anastasios Kouvelas,Michail A. Makridis*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于Karma机制的去中心化多智能体路径规划框架，通过不可交易的信用记录智能体历史合作行为，在有限通信下实现公平高效的冲突解决。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 集中式最优求解器计算复杂度指数级增长，难以扩展到大规模实时系统；现有去中心化启发式方法虽然快速但导致次优结果和高成本差异。需要在有限计算和通信资源下实现既高效又公平的协调机制。

Method: 基于Karma机制的去中心化协调框架：Karma作为不可交易的人工信用，记录智能体历史合作行为；将冲突解决建模为双边协商过程，通过成对重规划解决冲突；在无全局优先级结构的情况下促进长期公平性。

Result: 在具有运动学方向约束的终身机器人仓库多智能体取送场景中评估：Karma机制平衡了智能体间的重规划工作量，在不牺牲整体效率的情况下减少了服务时间差异。

Conclusion: Karma机制为多智能体路径规划提供了一种去中心化协调方案，能够在有限通信和无全局优先级的情况下实现公平高效的冲突解决，平衡了系统效率与个体公平性。

Abstract: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is a fundamental coordination problem in large-scale robotic and cyber-physical systems, where multiple agents must compute conflict-free trajectories with limited computational and communication resources. While centralised optimal solvers provide guarantees on solution optimality, their exponential computational complexity limits scalability to large-scale systems and real-time applicability. Existing decentralised heuristics are faster, but result in suboptimal outcomes and high cost disparities. This paper proposes a decentralised coordination framework for cooperative MAPF based on Karma mechanisms - artificial, non-tradeable credits that account for agents' past cooperative behaviour and regulate future conflict resolution decisions. The approach formulates conflict resolution as a bilateral negotiation process that enables agents to resolve conflicts through pairwise replanning while promoting long-term fairness under limited communication and without global priority structures. The mechanism is evaluated in a lifelong robotic warehouse multi-agent pickup-and-delivery scenario with kinematic orientation constraints. The results highlight that the Karma mechanism balances replanning effort across agents, reducing disparity in service times without sacrificing overall efficiency. Code: https://github.com/DerKevinRiehl/karma_dmapf

</details>


### [354] [eVTOL Aircraft Energy Overhead Estimation under Conflict Resolution in High-Density Airspaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06093)
*Alex Zongo,Peng Wei*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: MVP冲突解决算法对eVTOL能耗影响分析：中位能量开销低于1.5%，但存在尾部高开销情况，95%分位数为3.84-5.3%，建议4-5%能量储备可覆盖多数场景，并开发了机器学习模型用于任务前能量开销预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高密度城市空域中eVTOL飞机需要通过战术冲突解决保持安全间隔，但此类机动动作的能量成本尚未得到系统量化。研究旨在评估MVP算法下的冲突解决机动对eVTOL能量消耗的影响。

Method: 将基于物理的功率模型集成到交通仿真中，分析一个扇区内约71,767个航路段，覆盖10-60架同时飞行飞机的交通密度。开发机器学习模型在任务开始时估计能量开销，提供点估计和不确定性边界。

Result: MVP去冲突具有能量效率：所有密度水平下中位能量开销均低于1.5%，扇区内大多数航路飞行可忽略不计。但分布呈现明显右偏，最高密度下尾部情况可达44%开销。95%分位数范围为3.84%至5.3%。机器学习模型预测范围保守，实际结果比声明的置信水平更频繁地落在预测范围内。

Conclusion: MVP算法适用于能量受限的eVTOL操作，为高级空中机动性中的储备能量确定提供定量指导。4-5%的储备裕度可覆盖绝大多数战术去冲突场景，机器学习模型为安全关键的储备规划提供支持。

Abstract: Electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) aircraft operating in high-density urban airspace must maintain safe separation through tactical conflict resolution, yet the energy cost of such maneuvers has not been systematically quantified. This paper investigates how conflict-resolution maneuvers under the Modified Voltage Potential (MVP) algorithm affect eVTOL energy consumption. Using a physics-based power model integrated within a traffic simulation, we analyze approximately 71,767 en route sections within a sector, across traffic densities of 10-60 simultaneous aircraft. The main finding is that MVP-based deconfliction is energy-efficient: median energy overhead remains below 1.5% across all density levels, and the majority of en route flights within the sector incur negligible penalty. However, the distribution exhibits pronounced right-skewness, with tail cases reaching 44% overhead at the highest densities due to sustained multi-aircraft conflicts. The 95th percentile ranges from 3.84% to 5.3%, suggesting that a 4-5% reserve margin accommodates the vast majority of tactical deconfliction scenarios. To support operational planning, we develop a machine learning model that estimates energy overhead at mission initiation. Because conflict outcomes depend on future traffic interactions that cannot be known in advance, the model provides both point estimates and uncertainty bounds. These bounds are conservative; actual outcomes fall within the predicted range more often than the stated confidence level, making them suitable for safety-critical reserve planning. Together, these results validate MVP's suitability for energy-constrained eVTOL operations and provide quantitative guidance for reserve energy determination in Advanced Air Mobility.

</details>


### [355] [Synchronous Observer Design for Landmark-Inertial SLAM with Magnetometer and Intermittent GNSS Measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05156)
*Arkadeep Saha,Pieter van Goor,Ravi Banavar*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种非线性观测器用于地标-惯性SLAM，通过间歇性GNSS位置和磁力计测量克服可观测性限制，实现几乎全局渐近稳定和局部指数稳定


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在传统的地标-惯性SLAM中，惯性坐标系下的机器人位置、地标位置以及机器人的偏航角是不可观测的，这限制了系统的性能和应用范围

Method: 设计非线性观测器，结合间歇性GNSS位置测量和磁力计测量来增强系统的可观测性，从而估计完整的机器人姿态和位置状态

Result: 理论分析表明所提观测器的全状态误差动力学具有几乎全局渐近稳定性和局部指数稳定性，并通过仿真验证了这些稳定性特性

Conclusion: 通过引入间歇性GNSS和磁力计测量，成功解决了LI-SLAM中的可观测性问题，实现了稳定且完整的姿态和位置估计

Abstract: In Landmark-Inertial Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (LI-SLAM), the positions of landmarks in the environment and the robot's pose relative to these landmarks are estimated using landmark position measurements, and measurements from the Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU). However, the robot and landmark positions in the inertial frame, and the yaw of the robot, are not observable in LI-SLAM. This paper proposes a nonlinear observer for LI-SLAM that overcomes the observability constraints with the addition of intermittent GNSS position and magnetometer measurements. The full-state error dynamics of the proposed observer is shown to be both almost-globally asymptotically stable and locally exponentially stable, and this is validated using simulations.

</details>


### [356] [Finite-Step Invariant Sets for Hybrid Systems with Probabilistic Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05102)
*Varun Madabushi,Elizabeth Dietrich,Hanna Krasowski,Maegan Tucker*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于采样优化的算法框架，用于计算混合动力系统周期轨道周围的有限步不变椭球，并提供概率保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 庞加莱回归映射是分析混合动力系统周期轨道的基本工具，但计算不变集在计算上很困难，特别是当系统动态只能通过正向模拟获得时。需要一种方法来评估系统对扰动的鲁棒性。

Method: 提出基于采样优化的算法框架，利用回归映射的采样评估来计算名义周期轨道周围的有限步不变椭球。该方法提供满足用户定义精度阈值的有限步不变性的概率保证。

Result: 在两个低维系统和一个指南针步态行走模型上验证了该方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该框架能够计算混合动力系统周期轨道周围的不变椭球，为系统鲁棒性分析提供概率保证，特别适用于只能通过正向模拟获取动态的系统。

Abstract: Poincare return maps are a fundamental tool for analyzing periodic orbits in hybrid dynamical systems, including legged locomotion, power electronics, and other cyber-physical systems with switching behavior. The Poincare return map captures the evolution of the hybrid system on a guard surface, reducing the stability analysis of a periodic orbit to that of a discrete-time system. While linearization provides local stability information, assessing robustness to disturbances requires identifying invariant sets of the state space under the return dynamics. However, computing such invariant sets is computationally difficult, especially when system dynamics are only available through forward simulation. In this work, we propose an algorithmic framework leveraging sampling-based optimization to compute a finite-step invariant ellipsoid around a nominal periodic orbit using sampled evaluations of the return map. The resulting solution is accompanied by probabilistic guarantees on finite-step invariance satisfying a user-defined accuracy threshold. We demonstrate the approach on two low-dimensional systems and a compass-gait walking model.

</details>


### [357] [Periodic Event-Triggered Explicit Reference Governor for Constrained Attitude Control on SO(3)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04041)
*Satoshi Nakano,Masahiro Suzuki,Misa Ohashi,Noboru Chikami,Shusuke Otabe*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种周期性事件触发显式参考调控器（PET-ERG），在SO(3)流形上解决刚体姿态控制问题，避免参数化奇异性和在线优化需求，通过周期性事件触发机制确保输入饱和和几何指向约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决刚体在特殊正交群SO(3)上的约束姿态控制问题，避免欧拉角等参数化带来的奇异性，同时不依赖在线优化就能强制执行输入饱和和几何指向约束。

Method: 提出周期性事件触发显式参考调控器（PET-ERG），采用周期性事件触发监督更新机制：仅在满足鲁棒安全条件的采样时刻更新辅助参考，避免连续时间参考更新，从而能够在流形上对级联系统进行严格的稳定性分析。

Result: 严格建立了闭环系统对几乎所有初始配置的渐近稳定性和指数收敛性，数值仿真验证了所提控制架构的有效性，展示了约束满足和收敛特性。

Conclusion: PET-ERG方法在SO(3)流形上成功解决了刚体约束姿态控制问题，通过周期性事件触发机制实现了无奇异性、无在线优化的约束执行，为流形上的控制系统提供了严格的稳定性保证。

Abstract: This letter addresses the constrained attitude control problem for rigid bodies directly on the special orthogonal group SO(3), avoiding singularities associated with parameterizations such as Euler angles. We propose a novel Periodic Event-Triggered Explicit Reference Governor (PET-ERG) that enforces input saturation and geometric pointing constraints without relying on online optimization. A key feature is a periodic event-triggered supervisory update: the auxiliary reference is updated only at sampled instants when a robust safety condition is met, thereby avoiding continuous-time reference updates and enabling a rigorous stability analysis of the cascade system on the manifold. Through this structured approach, we rigorously establish the asymptotic stability and exponential convergence of the closed-loop system for almost all initial configurations. Numerical simulations validate the effectiveness of the proposed control architecture and demonstrate constraint satisfaction and convergence properties.

</details>


### [358] [Element-based Formation Control: a Unified Perspective from Continuum Mechanics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04027)
*Kun Cao,Lihua Xie*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个基于连续介质力学变形梯度概念的编队控制统一框架，将编队建模为由单纯形元素组成的离散弹性体，通过定义基于局部变形梯度张量的广义畸变能量，推导出能够实现平移、旋转、缩放和仿射变换等几何不变性的分布式控制律。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统编队控制方法通常基于图边定义的几何约束，缺乏统一的数学框架。本文旨在建立连接现有刚性编队控制和拉普拉斯编队控制的桥梁，通过引入连续介质力学概念提供更统一的编队控制理论框架。

Method: 将编队建模为离散弹性体，引入变形梯度张量概念，定义基于局部变形梯度张量的广义畸变能量函数，推导出一系列分布式控制律，分析其收敛特性和几何不变性（平移、旋转、缩放、仿射变换）。

Result: 理论证明该框架连接了刚性编队控制和拉普拉斯编队控制：刚性编队控制器等价于最小化变形能量张量的特定投影；建立了能量最小化与拉普拉斯编队控制之间的严格联系。2D和3D数值仿真验证了框架的有效性和统一性。

Conclusion: 提出的基于变形梯度的元素框架为编队控制提供了统一的理论基础，能够实现多种几何不变性，并建立了现有主要编队控制方法之间的数学联系，为编队控制理论发展提供了新视角。

Abstract: This paper establishes a unified element-based framework for formation control by introducing the concept of the deformation gradient from continuum mechanics. Unlike traditional methods that rely on geometric constraints defined on graph edges, we model the formation as a discrete elastic body composed of simplicial elements. By defining a generalized distortion energy based on the local deformation gradient tensor, we derive a family of distributed control laws that can enforce various geometric invariances, including translation, rotation, scaling, and affine transformations. The convergence properties and the features of the proposed controllers are analyzed in detail. Theoretically, we show that the proposed framework serves as a bridge between existing rigidity-based and Laplacian-based approaches. Specifically, we show that rigidity-based controllers are mathematically equivalent to minimizing specific projections of the deformation energy tensor. Furthermore, we establish a rigorous link between the proposed energy minimization and Laplacian-based formation control. Numerical simulations in 2D and 3D validate the effectiveness and the unified nature of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [359] [Risk-Constrained Belief-Space Optimization for Safe Control under Latent Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03868)
*Clinton Enwerem,John S. Baras,Calin Belta*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种风险敏感的信度空间MPPI控制框架，通过CVaR约束在潜在参数不确定性下规划轨迹，在保持性能的同时确保安全边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全关键控制系统常在传感器无法直接解析的潜在不确定性下运行，这种不确定性来自未知物理特性、外部扰动或未观测环境几何。标准方法优化期望性能但对罕见严重事件保护有限，而鲁棒方法过于保守且未利用概率结构。

Method: 针对部分观测动态系统，提出风险敏感信度空间MPPI控制框架，在信度分布下规划轨迹，同时对安全边界施加条件风险价值(CVaR)约束。控制器优化风险正则化性能目标，明确约束由潜在参数变异性引起的安全违规尾部风险。

Result: 在基于物理的视觉引导灵巧存储任务仿真中，该方法在高风险规避下达到82%成功率且零接触违规，而风险中性配置和机会约束基线分别只有55%和50%成功率，且都产生非零外部接触力。

Conclusion: 该风险约束控制器具有三个关键特性：CVaR约束蕴含概率安全保证；风险权重趋零时恢复风险中性最优解；通过并集边界论证将单次规划保证扩展到累积安全。该方法在潜在不确定性下实现了性能与安全的平衡。

Abstract: Many safety-critical control systems must operate under latent uncertainty that sensors cannot directly resolve at decision time. Such uncertainty, arising from unknown physical properties, exogenous disturbances, or unobserved environment geometry, influences dynamics, task feasibility, and safety margins. Standard methods optimize expected performance and offer limited protection against rare but severe outcomes, while robust formulations treat uncertainty conservatively without exploiting its probabilistic structure. We consider partially observed dynamical systems whose dynamics, costs, and safety constraints depend on a latent parameter maintained as a belief distribution, and propose a risk-sensitive belief-space Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) control framework that plans under this belief while enforcing a Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) constraint on a trajectory safety margin over the receding horizon. The resulting controller optimizes a risk-regularized performance objective while explicitly constraining the tail risk of safety violations induced by latent parameter variability. We establish three properties of the resulting risk-constrained controller: (1) the CVaR constraint implies a probabilistic safety guarantee, (2) the controller recovers the risk-neutral optimum as the risk weight in the objective tends to zero, and (3) a union-bound argument extends the per-horizon guarantee to cumulative safety over repeated solves. In physics-based simulations of a vision-guided dexterous stowing task in which a grasped object must be inserted into an occupied slot with pose uncertainty exceeding prescribed lateral clearance requirements, our method achieves 82% success with zero contact violations at high risk aversion, compared to 55% and 50% for a risk-neutral configuration and a chance-constrained baseline, both of which incur nonzero exterior contact forces.

</details>


### [360] [Minimal Information Control Invariance via Vector Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03132)
*Ege Yuceel,Teodor Tchalakov,Sayan Mitra*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于向量量化自编码器的控制方法，通过联合学习状态空间划分和有限控制码本，在保证安全性的同时大幅减少控制复杂度，在12维四旋翼模型上实现157倍码本压缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全关键自主系统需要在有限计算和感知预算下满足硬状态约束，但基于学习的控制器通常比安全操作所需的复杂度高得多。需要形式化这种差距，研究在采样数据控制下使紧集前向不变所需的不同控制信号数量。

Method: 提出向量量化自编码器联合学习状态空间划分和有限控制码本；开发基于Lipschitz可达集包络和平方和规划的迭代前向认证算法。

Result: 在12维非线性四旋翼模型上，学习到的控制器相比均匀网格基线实现157倍的码本大小缩减，同时保持不变性；经验性表征了与安全操作兼容的最小感知分辨率。

Conclusion: 该方法通过信息论不变性熵的概念，在保证安全约束的同时显著降低控制复杂度，为安全关键系统提供了高效的控制架构。

Abstract: Safety-critical autonomous systems must satisfy hard state constraints under tight computational and sensing budgets, yet learning-based controllers are often far more complex than safe operation requires. To formalize this gap, we study how many distinct control signals are needed to render a compact set forward invariant under sampled-data control, connecting the question to the information-theoretic notion of invariance entropy. We propose a vector-quantized autoencoder that jointly learns a state-space partition and a finite control codebook, and develop an iterative forward certification algorithm that uses Lipschitz-based reachable-set enclosures and sum-of-squares programming. On a 12-dimensional nonlinear quadrotor model, the learned controller achieves a $157\times$ reduction in codebook size over a uniform grid baseline while preserving invariance, and we empirically characterize the minimum sensing resolution compatible with safe operation.

</details>


### [361] [Global Geometry of Orthogonal Foliations in the Control Allocation of Signed-Quadratic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01912)
*Antonio Franchi*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该研究形式化了具有符号二次驱动映射系统的冗余解析的微分拓扑结构，建立了非线性驱动零空间的全局拓扑，揭示了正交分布的全局可积性，并提出了避免几何秩损失和边界穿越奇异性的分配策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机在于理解具有符号二次驱动映射系统的冗余解析的微分拓扑结构，特别是要揭示传统伪线性静态分配策略中不可避免的奇异边界超平面问题，以及如何通过几何框架避免这些奇异性和任务空间的分裂。

Method: 通过分析最小冗余情况，建立了定义非线性驱动零空间的连续纤维丛的全局拓扑。证明了正交于这些纤维的分布是全局可积的，并由精确对数势场控制。该场将驱动器空间分层为横向层，其组合大小遵循严格二项式级数。在层内，相邻正交通过称为互易铰链的低维层连续连接，而层本身由边界超平面（门户）分隔，这些门户作为纤维的全局截面。

Result: 研究结果表明，经典伪线性静态分配策略不可避免地会与奇异边界超平面相交，触发无限导数动力学奇异性，并将任务空间分裂成指数数量的奇异性分隔扇区。相比之下，从正交流形导出的分配器产生连续可微的全局截面，对于横向层仅具有线性数量的扇区，或者在两个极值层的情况下甚至可以形成到任务空间的单一全局微分同胚，从而完全避免几何秩损失和边界穿越奇异性。

Conclusion: 该研究为具有符号二次驱动映射系统的冗余解析提供了完整的微分拓扑框架，揭示了传统分配策略的固有局限性，并提出了基于正交流形的分配器设计方法，能够完全避免几何奇异性和任务空间分裂。这些理论结果直接适用于螺旋桨驱动架构的控制分配，包括多旋翼无人机、海洋和水下航行器。

Abstract: This work formalizes the differential topology of redundancy resolution for systems governed by signed-quadratic actuation maps. By analyzing the minimally redundant case, the global topology of the continuous fiber bundle defining the nonlinear actuation null-space is established. The distribution orthogonal to these fibers is proven to be globally integrable and governed by an exact logarithmic potential field. This field foliates the actuator space, inducing a structural stratification of all orthants into transverse layers whose combinatorial sizes follow a strictly binomial progression. Within these layers, adjacent orthants are continuously connected via lower-dimensional strata termed reciprocal hinges, while the layers themselves are separated by boundary hyperplanes, or portals, that act as global sections of the fibers. This partition formally distinguishes extremal and transitional layers, which exhibit fundamentally distinct fiber topologies and foliation properties. Through this geometric framework, classical pseudo-linear static allocation strategies are shown to inevitably intersect singular boundary hyperplanes, triggering infinite-derivative kinetic singularities and fragmenting the task space into an exponential number of singularity-separated sectors. In contrast, allocators derived from the orthogonal manifolds yield continuously differentiable global sections with only a linear number of sectors for transversal layers, or can even form a single global diffeomorphism to the task space in the case of the two extremal layers, thus completely avoiding geometric rank-loss and boundary-crossing singularities. These theoretical results directly apply to the control allocation of propeller-driven architectures, including multirotor UAVs, marine, and underwater vehicles.

</details>


### [362] [Measurement of Generative AI Workload Power Profiles for Whole-Facility Data Center Infrastructure Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07345)
*Roberto Vercellino,Jared Willard,Gustavo Campos,Weslley da Silva Pereira,Olivia Hull,Matthew Selensky,Juliane Mueller*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种将AI工作负载高分辨率功耗测量与数据中心整体能耗需求关联的方法，通过测量AI训练、微调和推理任务的功耗，并利用自底向上的数据中心能耗模型进行整体设施能耗估算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI的快速发展带来了前所未有的计算需求，导致数据中心能耗显著增加。然而，现有的功耗数据大多是专有的，且报告分辨率不一，这给估算整个设施能耗和规划基础设施带来了挑战。

Method: 使用配备NVIDIA H100 GPU的高性能计算数据中心，以0.1秒分辨率测量AI训练、微调和推理任务的功耗。工作负载使用MLCommons基准进行训练和微调，vLLM基准进行推理，实现可重复和标准化的工作负载分析。然后通过自底向上、事件驱动的数据中心能耗模型将功耗曲线扩展到整个设施级别。

Result: 创建了公开可用的功耗曲线数据集，生成了捕捉AI工作负载和用户行为驱动的真实时间波动的整体设施能耗曲线。这些曲线可用于电网连接、现场发电和分布式微电网等基础设施规划。

Conclusion: 该方法填补了高分辨率工作负载功耗测量与整体设施能耗需求之间的空白，为数据中心基础设施规划提供了实用的工具和数据集，有助于应对生成式AI带来的能源挑战。

Abstract: The rapid growth of generative artificial intelligence (AI) has introduced unprecedented computational demands, driving significant increases in the energy footprint of data centers. However, existing power consumption data is largely proprietary and reported at varying resolutions, creating challenges for estimating whole-facility energy use and planning infrastructure. In this work, we present a methodology that bridges this gap by linking high-resolution workload power measurements to whole-facility energy demand. Using NLR's high-performance computing data center equipped with NVIDIA H100 GPUs, we measure power consumption of AI workloads at 0.1-second resolution for AI training, fine-tuning and inference jobs. Workloads are characterized using MLCommons benchmarks for model training and fine-tuning, and vLLM benchmarks for inference, enabling reproducible and standardized workload profiling. The dataset of power consumption profiles is made publicly available. These power profiles are then scaled to the whole-facility-level using a bottom-up, event-driven, data center energy model. The resulting whole-facility energy profiles capture realistic temporal fluctuations driven by AI workloads and user-behavior, and can be used to inform infrastructure planning for grid connection, on-site energy generation, and distributed microgrids.

</details>


<div id='stat.ML'></div>

# stat.ML [[Back]](#toc)

### [363] [Iterative Identification Closure: Amplifying Causal Identifiability in Linear SEMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09309)
*Ziyi Ding,Xiao-Ping Zhang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出迭代识别闭包(IIC)框架，通过种子函数和缩减HTC传播两阶段方法，利用迭代反馈机制显著提升线性结构方程模型中因果效应的可识别性，填补了传统半路径准则(HTC)15-23%的识别空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统半路径准则(HTC)存在节点层面的局限性，会留下15-23%的因果效应无法确定（在中等规模图中），且现有图形准则都孤立处理每条边或节点，缺乏迭代反馈机制来利用已识别信息进一步解锁新的识别机会。

Method: 提出迭代识别闭包(IIC)框架，包含两个阶段：1) 种子函数S_0从外部信息源（工具变量、干预、非高斯性、先验知识等）识别初始边集；2) 缩减HTC传播，迭代代入已知系数来降低系统维度，使标准HTC无法识别的边变得可识别。核心创新是迭代识别传播机制，新识别的边反馈到系统中解锁进一步识别。

Result: IIC在n≤5的所有图中验证了100%精度（零假阳性）；结合种子信息时，IIC将HTC的识别空白减少了80%以上；传播增益γ达到4倍（2个种子识别约3%的边最终达到97.5%的总识别率），远超先前方法（γ≤1.2倍）。理论证明IIC是可靠的、单调的，在O(|E|)次迭代内收敛（实证≤2次），严格包含HTC和祖先分解。

Conclusion: IIC通过引入迭代识别传播机制，显著提升了线性结构方程模型中因果效应的可识别性，填补了传统HTC方法的识别空白，为结合多种信息源进行因果识别提供了通用框架，在理论和实证上都表现出优越性能。

Abstract: The Half-Trek Criterion (HTC) is the primary graphical tool for determining generic identifiability of causal effect coefficients in linear structural equation models (SEMs) with latent confounders. However, HTC is inherently node-wise: it simultaneously resolves all incoming edges of a node, leaving a gap of "inconclusive" causal effects (15-23% in moderate graphs). We introduce Iterative Identification Closure (IIC), a general framework that decouples causal identification into two phases: (1) a seed function S_0 that identifies an initial set of edges from any external source of information (instrumental variables, interventions, non-Gaussianity, prior knowledge, etc.); and (2) Reduced HTC propagation that iteratively substitutes known coefficients to reduce system dimension, enabling identification of edges that standard HTC cannot resolve. The core novelty is iterative identification propagation: newly identified edges feed back to unlock further identification -- a mechanism absent from all existing graphical criteria, which treat each edge (or node) in isolation. This propagation is non-trivial: coefficient substitution alters the covariance structure, and soundness requires proving that the modified Jacobian retains generic full rank -- a new theoretical result (Reduced HTC Theorem). We prove that IIC is sound, monotone, converges in O(|E|) iterations (empirically <=2), and strictly subsumes both HTC and ancestor decomposition. Exhaustive verification on all graphs with n<=5 (134,144 edges) confirms 100% precision (zero false positives); with combined seeds, IIC reduces the HTC gap by over 80%. The propagation gain is gamma~4x (2 seeds identifying ~3% of edges to 97.5% total identification), far exceeding gamma<=1.2x of prior methods that incorporate side information without iterative feedback.

</details>


### [364] [A Predictive View on Streaming Hidden Markov Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09208)
*Gerardo Duran-Martin*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于流式隐马尔可夫模型的预测优先优化框架，通过约束投影在预测分布空间中近似全后验，推导出HMM的波束搜索算法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法在完全指定的生成模型下优先恢复全后验，但计算复杂度随可能状态路径数量指数增长，精确滤波不可行。需要一种能够在有限计算预算下同时识别潜在状态并保持准确预测分布的方法。

Method: 将流式推理构建为预测分布空间中的约束投影问题：在固定假设预算下，通过前向KL最优的S条路径支撑的混合分布来近似全后验预测。解为重新归一化的前S条后验加权混合，为HMM提供了波束搜索的理论推导。算法完全递归且确定性，执行波束式截断并具有闭式预测更新，无需EM或采样。

Result: 在匹配计算预算下与在线EM和顺序蒙特卡洛方法进行实证比较，展示了具有竞争力的预知性能。

Conclusion: 提出了一种预测优先的流式HMM优化框架，通过约束投影方法推导出波束搜索算法，在有限计算预算下实现了准确的状态识别和预测性能，无需EM或采样过程。

Abstract: We develop a predictive-first optimisation framework for streaming hidden Markov models. Unlike classical approaches that prioritise full posterior recovery under a fully specified generative model, we assume access to regime-specific predictive models whose parameters are learned online while maintaining a fixed transition prior over regimes. Our objective is to sequentially identify latent regimes while maintaining accurate step-ahead predictive distributions. Because the number of possible regime paths grows exponentially, exact filtering is infeasible. We therefore formulate streaming inference as a constrained projection problem in predictive-distribution space: under a fixed hypothesis budget, we approximate the full posterior predictive by the forward-KL optimal mixture supported on $S$ paths. The solution is the renormalised top-$S$ posterior-weighted mixture, providing a principled derivation of beam search for HMMs. The resulting algorithm is fully recursive and deterministic, performing beam-style truncation with closed-form predictive updates and requiring neither EM nor sampling. Empirical comparisons against Online EM and Sequential Monte Carlo under matched computational budgets demonstrate competitive prequential performance.

</details>


### [365] [Online Quantile Regression for Nonparametric Additive Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08969)
*Haoran Zhan*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出投影函数梯度下降算法(P-FGD)用于在线非参数加性分位数回归训练，扩展了函数随机梯度下降框架到pinball损失，具有无需存储历史数据、计算复杂度低和达到极小极大最优收敛率的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线学习环境中，传统RKHS方法需要存储历史数据且计算复杂度高，无法高效处理分位数回归问题。需要开发一种无需存储历史数据、计算效率高且具有理论保证的在线分位数回归算法。

Method: 提出投影函数梯度下降算法(P-FGD)，将函数随机梯度下降框架扩展到pinball损失，利用希尔伯特空间投影恒等式，在再生核希尔伯特空间中更新函数估计，支持小批量学习。

Result: P-FGD每步计算复杂度为O(J_t ln J_t)，其中J_t为基函数数量；分位数函数预测仅需O(J_t)时间；在线分位数函数估计器达到极小极大最优一致性速率O(t^{-2s/(2s+1)})，s为分位数函数光滑度。

Conclusion: P-FGD算法在在线非参数加性分位数回归中显著优于传统RKHS方法，具有无需存储历史数据、计算效率高和理论最优性的优势，适用于实时数据流分析。

Abstract: This paper introduces a projected functional gradient descent algorithm (P-FGD) for training nonparametric additive quantile regression models in online settings. This algorithm extends the functional stochastic gradient descent framework to the pinball loss. An advantage of P-FGD is that it does not need to store historical data while maintaining $O(J_t\ln J_t)$ computational complexity per step where $J_t$ denotes the number of basis functions. Besides, we only need $O(J_t)$ computational time for quantile function prediction at time $t$. These properties show that P-FGD is much better than the commonly used RKHS in online learning. By leveraging a novel Hilbert space projection identity, we also prove that the proposed online quantile function estimator (P-FGD) achieves the minimax optimal consistency rate $O(t^{-\frac{2s}{2s+1}})$ where $t$ is the current time and $s$ denotes the smoothness degree of the quantile function. Extensions to mini-batch learning are also established.

</details>


### [366] [Differentially Private Language Generation and Identification in the Limit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08504)
*Anay Mehrotra,Grigoris Velegkas,Xifan Yu,Felix Zhou*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在差分隐私约束下的极限语言生成问题，发现在可数语言集合中隐私不会带来定性成本，但会带来定量成本；在语言识别方面，隐私会带来根本性障碍，但在随机设置下隐私识别是可能的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在差分隐私约束下的极限语言生成和识别问题，探索隐私保护对语言学习能力的影响，特别是比较生成和识别任务在隐私约束下的不同表现，以及对抗性和随机设置下的差异。

Method: 采用极限语言生成模型，考虑连续发布设置，开发ε-差分隐私算法。对于生成任务，设计了适用于可数语言集合的隐私算法。对于识别任务，分析了隐私约束下的理论界限，比较了对抗性和随机设置下的识别能力。

Result: 1. 对于可数语言集合，隐私生成没有定性成本；2. 对于有限集合，隐私生成需要Ω(k/ε)样本，而非隐私只需1个样本；3. 隐私识别存在根本障碍：无法识别具有无限交集和有限集差的两个语言的集合；4. 在随机设置下，隐私识别当且仅当在对抗模型中可识别时才可能。

Conclusion: 隐私约束揭示了生成和识别任务的新维度差异：生成任务中隐私主要带来定量成本，而识别任务中隐私带来定性障碍。在识别任务中，隐私约束导致了对抗性和随机设置之间的分离，为隐私保护下的语言学习理论提供了新的理解。

Abstract: We initiate the study of language generation in the limit, a model recently introduced by Kleinberg and Mullainathan [KM24], under the constraint of differential privacy. We consider the continual release model, where a generator must eventually output a stream of valid strings while protecting the privacy of the entire input sequence. Our first main result is that for countable collections of languages, privacy comes at no qualitative cost: we provide an $\varepsilon$-differentially-private algorithm that generates in the limit from any countable collection. This stands in contrast to many learning settings where privacy renders learnability impossible. However, privacy does impose a quantitative cost: there are finite collections of size $k$ for which uniform private generation requires $Ω(k/\varepsilon)$ samples, whereas just one sample suffices non-privately.
  We then turn to the harder problem of language identification in the limit. Here, we show that privacy creates fundamental barriers. We prove that no $\varepsilon$-DP algorithm can identify a collection containing two languages with an infinite intersection and a finite set difference, a condition far stronger than the classical non-private characterization of identification. Next, we turn to the stochastic setting where the sample strings are sampled i.i.d. from a distribution (instead of being generated by an adversary). Here, we show that private identification is possible if and only if the collection is identifiable in the adversarial model. Together, our results establish new dimensions along which generation and identification differ and, for identification, a separation between adversarial and stochastic settings induced by privacy constraints.

</details>


### [367] [Spectral-Transport Stability and Benign Overfitting in Interpolating Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08625)
*Gustav Olaf Yunus Laitinen-Lundström Fredriksson-Imanov*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出谱-输运稳定性框架，解释插值学习器的泛化性能，建立良性过拟合的判据和相变速率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解释高度过参数化估计器为何能在实现零经验风险的同时保持非平凡预测精度，并刻画良性过拟合与破坏性过拟合的边界

Method: 提出谱-输运稳定性理论框架，将超额风险控制与数据分布的谱几何、学习规则在单样本替换下的敏感性、标签噪声的对齐结构联系起来；引入尺度依赖的Fredriksson指数，将有效维度、输运稳定性和噪声对齐结合为插值估计器的单一复杂度参数

Result: 证明了有限样本风险界，通过Fredriksson指数沿容许谱尺度的消失建立了尖锐的良性过拟合判据，在多项式谱衰减下推导了显式相变速率；针对多项式谱线性插值获得了显式定理和速率证明；揭示了优化动态如何选择最小谱-输运能量的插值解

Conclusion: 该框架将算法稳定性、双重下降、良性过拟合、算子理论学习理论和隐式偏差统一到现代插值学习的结构化解释中，为理解过参数化学习器的泛化性能提供了理论基础

Abstract: We develop a theoretical framework for generalization in the interpolating regime of statistical learning. The central question is why highly overparameterized estimators can attain zero empirical risk while still achieving nontrivial predictive accuracy, and how to characterize the boundary between benign and destructive overfitting. We introduce a spectral-transport stability framework in which excess risk is controlled jointly by the spectral geometry of the data distribution, the sensitivity of the learning rule under single-sample replacement, and the alignment structure of label noise. This leads to a scale-dependent Fredriksson index that combines effective dimension, transport stability, and noise alignment into a single complexity parameter for interpolating estimators. We prove finite-sample risk bounds, establish a sharp benign-overfitting criterion through the vanishing of the index along admissible spectral scales, and derive explicit phase-transition rates under polynomial spectral decay. For a model-specific specialization, we obtain an explicit theorem for polynomial-spectrum linear interpolation, together with a proof of the resulting rate. The framework also clarifies implicit regularization by showing how optimization dynamics can select interpolating solutions of minimal spectral-transport energy. These results connect algorithmic stability, double descent, benign overfitting, operator-theoretic learning theory, and implicit bias within a unified structural account of modern interpolation.

</details>


### [368] [Intensity Dot Product Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07810)
*Giulio Valentino Dalla Riva,Matteo Dalla Riva*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出Intensity Dot Product Graphs (IDPGs)，将随机点积图扩展为使用泊松点过程生成潜在位置，实现随机节点数量、点积亲和性和连续潜在结构到有限观测图的连接。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有潜在位置随机图模型通常将节点集固定，而基于图函数和随机测度的构造虽然允许更多随机性，但几何可解释性较弱。需要一种既能保持几何解释又能引入节点随机性的模型。

Method: 引入Intensity Dot Product Graphs (IDPGs)，用欧几里得潜在空间上的泊松点过程替代固定潜在位置集合，定义热图和期望算子作为概率矩阵的连续类比，建立谱一致性理论。

Result: 建立了邻接矩阵奇异值与算子谱之间的谱一致性关系，比较了与图函数和有向图函数表示的联系，展示了经典RDPGs如何在集中极限下出现，并自然扩展到时间演化模型。

Conclusion: IDPGs提供了一个统一框架，既保持了RDPG的几何可解释性，又引入了节点随机性，通过强度参数化自然支持时间演化扩展，连接了离散图模型与连续潜在结构。

Abstract: Latent-position random graph models usually treat the node set as fixed once the sample size is chosen, while graphon-based and random-measure constructions allow more randomness at the cost of weaker geometric interpretability. We introduce \emph{Intensity Dot Product Graphs} (IDPGs), which extend Random Dot Product Graphs by replacing a fixed collection of latent positions with a Poisson point process on a Euclidean latent space. This yields a model with random node populations, RDPG-style dot-product affinities, and a population-level intensity that links continuous latent structure to finite observed graphs. We define the heat map and the desire operator as continuous analogues of the probability matrix, prove a spectral consistency result connecting adjacency singular values to the operator spectrum, compare the construction with graphon and digraphon representations, and show how classical RDPGs arise in a concentrated limit. Because the model is parameterized by an evolving intensity, temporal extensions through partial differential equations arise naturally.

</details>


### [369] [Order-Optimal Sequential 1-Bit Mean Estimation in General Tail Regimes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07796)
*Ivan Lau,Jonathan Scarlett*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文研究了严格1比特通信约束下的均值估计问题，提出了一种基于随机阈值查询的自适应均值估计器，在任意k阶中心矩有界的分布上实现了最优样本复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在分布式统计推断和边缘计算等应用中，通信带宽受限是常见问题。1比特量化能极大减少通信开销，但传统方法在样本复杂度上存在显著损失。本文旨在设计一种自适应1比特均值估计器，在保持通信效率的同时实现最优统计性能。

Method: 提出基于随机阈值查询的自适应均值估计器：每个样本通过比较与动态选择的阈值生成1比特反馈。采用多阶段自适应策略，通过迭代调整阈值来精确定位均值。算法核心是利用阈值查询的二元反馈信息逐步缩小均值所在的区间。

Result: 对于任意k>1的k阶中心矩有界分布，该估计器是(ε,δ)-PAC的，且样本复杂度在所有尾部分布情况下都是阶最优的。对于k≠2的情况，样本复杂度匹配未量化极小极大下界加上不可避免的O(log(λ/σ))定位代价；对于k=2的情况，存在额外的O(log(σ/ε))乘法惩罚，且证明这是1比特量化的基本限制。同时发现了显著的自适应性差距：非自适应估计器的样本复杂度必须随搜索空间参数λ/σ线性增长。

Conclusion: 本文证明了自适应1比特均值估计在统计效率上的显著优势，建立了1比特量化下样本复杂度的基本理论界限，并提供了多种实用算法变体以适应不同的实际约束条件，为通信受限环境下的统计推断提供了理论基础和实用工具。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of mean estimation under strict 1-bit communication constraints. We propose a novel adaptive mean estimator based solely on randomized threshold queries, where each 1-bit outcome indicates whether a given sample exceeds a sequentially chosen threshold. Our estimator is $(ε, δ)$-PAC for any distribution with a bounded mean $μ\in [-λ, λ]$ and a bounded $k$-th central moment $\mathbb{E}[|X-μ|^k] \le σ^k$ for any fixed $k > 1$. Crucially, our sample complexity is order-optimal in all such tail regimes, i.e., for every such $k$ value. For $k \neq 2$, our estimator's sample complexity matches the unquantized minimax lower bounds plus an unavoidable $O(\log(λ/σ))$ localization cost. For the finite-variance case ($k=2$), our estimator's sample complexity has an extra multiplicative $O(\log(σ/ε))$ penalty, and we establish a novel information-theoretic lower bound showing that this penalty is a fundamental limit of 1-bit quantization. We also establish a significant adaptivity gap: for both threshold queries and more general interval queries, the sample complexity of any non-adaptive estimator must scale linearly with the search space parameter $λ/σ$, rendering it vastly less sample efficient than our adaptive approach. Finally, we present algorithmic variants that (i) handle an unknown sampling budget, (ii) adapt to an unknown scale parameter~$σ$ given (possibly loose) bounds, and (iii) require only two stages of adaptivity at the expense of more complicated general 1-bit queries.

</details>
