### [370] [Sparse $ε$ insensitive zone bounded asymmetric elastic net support vector machines for pattern classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07748)
*Haiyan Du,Hu Yang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出ε-BAEN-SVM模型，结合弹性网损失与鲁棒损失框架，构建稀疏ε不敏感有界非对称弹性网损失，解决传统SVM对噪声敏感和缺乏稀疏性的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SVM模型对噪声敏感且缺乏稀疏性，限制了其性能。需要开发既稀疏又鲁棒的SVM变体来应对噪声环境。

Method: 构建稀疏ε不敏感有界非对称弹性网损失，将其与SVM结合形成ε-BAEN-SVM。使用基于剪裁双坐标下降的半二次算法解决非凸优化问题，将问题转化为一系列加权子问题，通过ε参数提高计算效率。

Result: ε-BAEN-SVM在模拟和真实数据集上优于传统和现有鲁棒SVM。在稀疏性和鲁棒性之间取得良好平衡，在高斯核下获得更好的准确性和噪声不敏感性。统计测试证实了其优越性。

Conclusion: ε-BAEN-SVM是一种既稀疏又鲁棒的SVM模型，通过理论证明和实验验证了其在噪声环境中的有效性，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Existing support vector machines(SVM) models are sensitive to noise and lack sparsity, which limits their performance. To address these issues, we combine the elastic net loss with a robust loss framework to construct a sparse $\varepsilon$-insensitive bounded asymmetric elastic net loss, and integrate it with SVM to build $\varepsilon$ Insensitive Zone Bounded Asymmetric Elastic Net Loss-based SVM($\varepsilon$-BAEN-SVM). $\varepsilon$-BAEN-SVM is both sparse and robust. Sparsity is proven by showing that samples inside the $\varepsilon$-insensitive band are not support vectors. Robustness is theoretically guaranteed because the influence function is bounded. To solve the non-convex optimization problem, we design a half-quadratic algorithm based on clipping dual coordinate descent. It transforms the problem into a series of weighted subproblems, improving computational efficiency via the $\varepsilon$ parameter. Experiments on simulated and real datasets show that $\varepsilon$-BAEN-SVM outperforms traditional and existing robust SVMs. It balances sparsity and robustness well in noisy environments. Statistical tests confirm its superiority. Under the Gaussian kernel, it achieves better accuracy and noise insensitivity, validating its effectiveness and practical value.

</details>


### [371] [The Condition-Number Principle for Prototype Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07744)
*Romano Li,Jianfei Cao*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出几何框架连接聚类目标精度与结构恢复，定义聚类条件数，证明小条件数下小目标次优性必然导致小分类误差，揭示鲁棒性与簇不平衡敏感性的权衡


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建立原型聚类中目标函数精度与结构恢复之间的理论联系，为解释低目标函数值作为有意义聚类结构的可靠证据提供几何原理

Method: 开发算法无关的几何框架，定义聚类条件数（比较簇内尺度与跨越簇边界所需的最小损失增加），分析不同目标函数下的精确恢复相变

Result: 证明当聚类条件数小时，任何具有小次优性间隙的解相对于基准划分也具有小误分类误差；误差集中在簇边界附近，足够深的簇核心在增强局部边界下可精确恢复

Conclusion: 该框架提供了将低目标值解释为有意义聚类结构可靠证据的几何原理，分离了算法精度与实例内在几何难度的作用，为原型聚类提供了确定性非渐近保证

Abstract: We develop a geometric framework that links objective accuracy to structural recovery in prototype-based clustering. The analysis is algorithm-agnostic and applies to a broad class of admissible loss functions. We define a clustering condition number that compares within-cluster scale to the minimum loss increase required to move a point across a cluster boundary. When this quantity is small, any solution with a small suboptimality gap must also have a small misclassification error relative to a benchmark partition. The framework also clarifies a fundamental trade-off between robustness and sensitivity to cluster imbalance, leading to sharp phase transitions for exact recovery under different objectives. The guarantees are deterministic and non-asymptotic, and they separate the role of algorithmic accuracy from the intrinsic geometric difficulty of the instance. We further show that errors concentrate near cluster boundaries and that sufficiently deep cluster cores are recovered exactly under strengthened local margins. Together, these results provide a geometric principle for interpreting low objective values as reliable evidence of meaningful clustering structure.

</details>


### [372] [On the Unique Recovery of Transport Maps and Vector Fields from Finite Measure-Valued Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07671)
*Jonah Botvinick-Greenhouse,Yunan Yang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文建立了从有限测度值数据中唯一恢复向量场和传输映射的理论保证，为生成模型、数据驱动动力系统和PDE反问题提供了新见解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究如何从有限数量的密度函数推前数据中唯一确定微分同胚映射，以及从有限数量的加权散度观测中唯一确定向量场。这解决了生成模型、动力系统学习和PDE反问题中的关键理论问题。

Method: 利用Whitney和Takens嵌入定理建立理论框架，分析微分同胚通过其推前作用在有限密度函数上的可辨识性。提出新的度量来比较微分同胚，并证明在无穷小设置下的类似结果。通过Perron-Frobenius和Koopman算子解释结果，并应用于PDE反问题的适定性分析。

Result: 建立了微分同胚可以从有限推前密度数据中唯一识别的充分条件，并给出了所需密度数量m的估计（仅依赖于问题的内在维度）。提出了比较微分同胚的新度量，证明了向量场可以从有限加权散度观测中唯一确定。展示了这些结果在连续性、平流、Fokker-Planck和平流-扩散-反应方程等PDE反问题适定性中的应用。

Conclusion: 该研究为从有限测度值数据中唯一恢复向量场和传输映射提供了严格的理论保证，建立了连接生成模型、动力系统学习和PDE反问题的统一框架，并通过数值实验验证了理论结果的实际可行性。

Abstract: We establish guarantees for the unique recovery of vector fields and transport maps from finite measure-valued data, yielding new insights into generative models, data-driven dynamical systems, and PDE inverse problems. In particular, we provide general conditions under which a diffeomorphism can be uniquely identified from its pushforward action on finitely many densities, i.e., when the data $\{(ρ_j,f_\#ρ_j)\}_{j=1}^m$ uniquely determines $f$. As a corollary, we introduce a new metric which compares diffeomorphisms by measuring the discrepancy between finitely many pushforward densities in the space of probability measures. We also prove analogous results in an infinitesimal setting, where derivatives of the densities along a smooth vector field are observed, i.e., when $\{(ρ_j,\text{div} (ρ_j v))\}_{j=1}^m$ uniquely determines $v$. Our analysis makes use of the Whitney and Takens embedding theorems, which provide estimates on the required number of densities $m$, depending only on the intrinsic dimension of the problem. We additionally interpret our results through the lens of Perron--Frobenius and Koopman operators and demonstrate how our techniques lead to new guarantees for the well-posedness of certain PDE inverse problems related to continuity, advection, Fokker--Planck, and advection-diffusion-reaction equations. Finally, we present illustrative numerical experiments demonstrating the unique identification of transport maps from finitely many pushforward densities, and of vector fields from finitely many weighted divergence observations.

</details>


### [373] [Variational Approximated Restricted Maximum Likelihood Estimation for Spatial Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07635)
*Debjoy Thakur*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出VREML框架，通过变分近似解决空间数据高斯ICAR模型的大规模计算问题，相比传统REML和INLA方法具有计算优势


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统REML方法在处理空间数据高斯ICAR模型时需要重复计算大规模稀疏精度矩阵的逆和分解，计算成本高昂，需要更高效的推断方法

Method: 提出变分限制最大似然(VREML)框架，使用高斯变分分布近似难处理的边际似然，构建限制似然的证据下界(ELBO)，开发坐标上升算法联合估计空间随机效应和方差分量

Result: 理论上证明了ELBO的单调收敛性，并数学上展示了在高斯ICAR设置下变分族是精确的，表明后验层面的近似误差为零；实证上VREML优于MLE和INLA方法

Conclusion: VREML为空间数据高斯ICAR模型提供了可扩展的高效推断框架，在保持理论精确性的同时显著降低了计算复杂度

Abstract: This research considers a scalable inference for spatial data modeled through Gaussian intrinsic conditional autoregressive (ICAR) structures. The classical estimation method, restricted maximum likelihood (REML), requires repeated inversion and factorization of large, sparse precision matrices, which makes this computation costly. To sort this problem out, we propose a variational restricted maximum likelihood (VREML) framework that approximates the intractable marginal likelihood using a Gaussian variational distribution. By constructing an evidence lower bound (ELBO) on the restricted likelihood, we derive a computationally efficient coordinate-ascent algorithm for jointly estimating the spatial random effects and variance components. In this article, we theoretically establish the monotone convergence of ELBO and mathematically exhibit that the variational family is exact under Gaussian ICAR settings, which is an indication of nullifying approximation error at the posterior level. We empirically establish the supremacy of our VREML over MLE and INLA.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [374] [SafeMind: A Risk-Aware Differentiable Control Framework for Adaptive and Safe Quadruped Locomotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09474)
*Zukun Zhang,Kai Shu,Mingqiao Mo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SafeMind：一种可微分随机安全控制框架，将概率控制屏障函数与语义上下文理解和元自适应风险校准相结合，为四足机器人提供形式化安全保证


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于学习的四足机器人控制器虽然具有出色的敏捷性，但在模型不确定性、感知噪声和非结构化接触条件下通常缺乏形式化的安全保证。现有方法难以在保持高性能的同时确保安全性。

Method: 1. 使用可微分随机安全控制框架统一概率控制屏障函数与语义上下文理解；2. 通过方差感知屏障约束嵌入可微分二次规划，保持端到端训练的梯度流；3. 语义到约束编码器利用感知或语言线索调节安全裕度；4. 元自适应学习器在不同环境中持续调整风险敏感性

Result: 在Unitree A1和ANYmal C平台上以200Hz部署，验证了12种地形类型、动态障碍物、形态扰动和语义定义任务。相比最先进的CBF、MPC和混合RL基线，安全违规减少3-10倍，能耗降低10-15%，同时保持实时控制性能

Conclusion: SafeMind为四足机器人提供了在不确定性条件下的形式化安全保证，通过语义上下文理解和自适应风险校准实现了安全性与性能的平衡，在实际部署中表现出显著优势

Abstract: Learning-based quadruped controllers achieve impressive agility but typically lack formal safety guarantees under model uncertainty, perception noise, and unstructured contact conditions. We introduce SafeMind, a differentiable stochastic safety-control framework that unifies probabilistic Control Barrier Functions with semantic context understanding and meta-adaptive risk calibration. SafeMind explicitly models epistemic and aleatoric uncertainty through a variance-aware barrier constraint embedded in a differentiable quadratic program, thereby preserving gradient flow for end-to-end training. A semantics-to-constraint encoder modulates safety margins using perceptual or language cues, while a meta-adaptive learner continuously adjusts risk sensitivity across environments. We provide theoretical conditions for probabilistic forward invariance, feasibility, and stability under stochastic dynamics. SafeMind is deployed on Unitree A1 and ANYmal C at 200~Hz and validated across 12 terrain types, dynamic obstacles, morphology perturbations, and semantically defined tasks. Experiments show that SafeMind reduces safety violations by 3--10x and energy consumption by 10--15% relative to state-of-the-art CBF, MPC, and hybrid RL baselines, while maintaining real-time control performance.

</details>


### [375] [Adaptor: Advancing Assistive Teleoperation with Few-Shot Learning and Cross-Operator Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09462)
*Yu Liu,Yihang Yin,Tianlv Huang,Fei Yan,Yuan Xu,Weinan Hong,Wei Han,Yue Cao,Xiangyu Chen,Zipei Fan,Xuan Song*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Adaptor：一个用于鲁棒跨操作者意图识别的少样本框架，通过噪声注入和几何感知关键帧提取处理轨迹不确定性，结合意图专家编码和预训练视觉语言模型进行动作生成


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 辅助遥操作通过共享控制提高效率，但不同操作者因习惯和专业知识差异产生高度异质的轨迹分布，这削弱了意图识别的稳定性，需要解决跨操作者泛化问题

Method: Adaptor框架包含两个阶段：(1)预处理：通过噪声注入合成轨迹扰动来建模意图不确定性，并进行几何感知关键帧提取；(2)策略学习：使用意图专家编码处理后的轨迹，将其与预训练视觉语言模型上下文融合，条件化动作专家进行动作生成

Result: 在真实世界和模拟基准测试中，Adaptor实现了最先进的性能，提高了成功率和效率。该方法在不同专业水平的操作者间表现出低方差，展示了鲁棒的跨操作者泛化能力

Conclusion: Adaptor框架有效解决了辅助遥操作中因操作者差异导致的意图识别不稳定问题，通过少样本学习实现了鲁棒的跨操作者泛化，为异构操作者环境下的共享控制系统提供了实用解决方案

Abstract: Assistive teleoperation enhances efficiency via shared control, yet inter-operator variability, stemming from diverse habits and expertise, induces highly heterogeneous trajectory distributions that undermine intent recognition stability. We present Adaptor, a few-shot framework for robust cross-operator intent recognition. The Adaptor bridges the domain gap through two stages: (i) preprocessing, which models intent uncertainty by synthesizing trajectory perturbations via noise injection and performs geometry-aware keyframe extraction; and (ii) policy learning, which encodes the processed trajectories with an Intention Expert and fuses them with the pre-trained vision-language model context to condition an Action Expert for action generation. Experiments on real-world and simulated benchmarks demonstrate that Adaptor achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving success rates and efficiency over baselines. Moreover, the method exhibits low variance across operators with varying expertise, demonstrating robust cross-operator generalization.

</details>


### [376] [VAG: Dual-Stream Video-Action Generation for Embodied Data Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09330)
*Xiaolei Lang,Yang Wang,Yukun Zhou,Chaojun Ni,Kerui Li,Jiagang Zhu,Tianze Liu,Jiajun Lv,Xingxing Zuo,Yun Ye,Guan Huang,Xiaofeng Wang,Zheng Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: VAG：基于流匹配的双流框架，联合生成视频和动作，改善跨模态一致性，为具身数据合成提供实用的世界-动作模型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人基础模型需要大量任务特定演示数据，但数据收集成本高昂。现有世界模型不提供配对动作轨迹，世界-动作模型视频-动作对齐不足，两阶段流水线效率低且误差累积

Method: 提出VAG统一框架：基于流匹配的双流架构，在视觉和语言条件下联合生成视频和动作；通过同步两个分支的去噪过程，使用自适应3D池化机制将紧凑的全局视频上下文传递到动作分支

Result: 在仿真和真实世界环境中，VAG生成对齐的视频-动作对，具有竞争力的预测质量；支持可执行轨迹回放，提供有用的合成预训练数据，改善下游策略泛化能力

Conclusion: VAG作为实用的世界-动作模型，在具身数据合成方面具有潜力，通过联合生成对齐的视频-动作对，解决了现有方法的局限性

Abstract: Recent advances in robot foundation models trained on large-scale human teleoperation data have enabled robots to perform increasingly complex real-world tasks. However, scaling these systems remains difficult because collecting task-specific demonstrations is expensive and labor-intensive. Synthetic data, especially generated videos, offer a promising direction, but existing World Models (WMs) are not directly suitable for policy learning since they do not provide paired action trajectories. World-Action (WA) models partially address this by predicting actions with visual outputs, yet often lack strong video-action alignment, while two-stage pipelines that generate video first and then infer actions introduce inefficiency and error accumulation. To address these limitations, we propose VAG, a unified flow-matching-based dual-stream framework that jointly generates video and action under visual and language conditioning. By synchronizing denoising in both branches and using an adaptive 3D pooling mechanism to transfer compact global video context to the action branch, VAG improves cross-modal consistency during generation. Across both simulated and real-world settings, VAG produces aligned video-action pairs with competitive prediction quality, supports executable trajectory replay, and provides useful synthetic pretraining data that improves downstream policy generalization, indicating its potential as a practical world-action model for embodied data synthesis.

</details>


### [377] [Musculoskeletal Motion Imitation for Learning Personalized Exoskeleton Control Policy in Impaired Gait](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09431)
*Itak Choi,Ilseung Park,Eni Halilaj,Inseung Kang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于生理合理肌肉骨骼模拟与强化学习的设备无关框架，用于为健全和临床人群生成可扩展的个性化外骨骼辅助控制策略，无需大量物理试验。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统下肢外骨骼控制策略设计依赖大量数据收集或迭代优化，限制了临床人群的可及性，需要一种更高效、可扩展的个性化辅助方法。

Method: 结合生理合理的肌肉骨骼模拟与强化学习，构建设备无关框架，生成外骨骼控制策略，无需任务特定调优，适用于健全和受损步态模型。

Result: 控制策略生成与人类实验验证的最先进辅助扭矩曲线一致的髋关节和踝关节扭矩，在不同步行速度下持续降低代谢成本；对于受损步态模型，产生不对称、缺陷特定的外骨骼辅助，改善能量效率和双侧运动对称性。

Conclusion: 生理合理的肌肉骨骼模拟结合强化学习可作为跨健全和临床人群的个性化外骨骼控制的可扩展基础，消除了对大量物理试验的需求。

Abstract: Designing generalizable control policies for lower-limb exoskeletons remains fundamentally constrained by exhaustive data collection or iterative optimization procedures, which limit accessibility to clinical populations. To address this challenge, we introduce a device-agnostic framework that combines physiologically plausible musculoskeletal simulation with reinforcement learning to enable scalable personalized exoskeleton assistance for both able-bodied and clinical populations. Our control policies not only generate physiologically plausible locomotion dynamics but also capture clinically observed compensatory strategies under targeted muscular deficits, providing a unified computational model of both healthy and pathological gait. Without task-specific tuning, the resulting exoskeleton control policies produce assistive torque profiles at the hip and ankle that align with state-of-the-art profiles validated in human experiments, while consistently reducing metabolic cost across walking speeds. For simulated impaired-gait models, the learned control policies yield asymmetric, deficit-specific exoskeleton assistance that improves both energetic efficiency and bilateral kinematic symmetry without explicit prescription of the target gait pattern. These results demonstrate that physiologically plausible musculoskeletal simulation via reinforcement learning can serve as a scalable foundation for personalized exoskeleton control across both able-bodied and clinical populations, eliminating the need for extensive physical trials.

</details>


### [378] [Multimodal Anomaly Detection for Human-Robot Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09326)
*Guilherme Ribeiro,Iordanis Antypas,Leonardo Bizzaro,João Bimbo,Nuno Cruz Garcia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MADRI框架通过将视频流转换为语义特征向量，并结合机器人内部传感器数据和场景图，进行基于重构的异常检测，提高人机协作中的异常检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在人机交互中，及时检测可能导致系统故障或不安全行为的意外事件对于确保安全性和可靠性至关重要。虽然重构模型在人机交互中已被积极研究，但直接在特征向量上操作的方法仍未被充分探索。

Method: 提出MADRI框架：1) 将视频流转换为语义上有意义的特征向量；2) 使用基于重构的异常检测方法；3) 将视觉特征向量与机器人内部传感器读数和场景图相结合，以捕捉视觉环境中的外部异常和机器人内部的故障。

Result: 实验结果表明：仅基于视觉特征向量的重构就能有效检测异常，而结合其他模态进一步提高了检测性能，突显了多模态特征重构在人机协作中实现鲁棒异常检测的优势。

Conclusion: MADRI框架通过多模态特征重构，为人类-机器人协作中的异常检测提供了有效解决方案，能够同时检测外部视觉异常和内部机器人故障，提高了系统的安全性和可靠性。

Abstract: Ensuring safety and reliability in human-robot interaction (HRI) requires the timely detection of unexpected events that could lead to system failures or unsafe behaviours. Anomaly detection thus plays a critical role in enabling robots to recognize and respond to deviations from normal operation during collaborative tasks. While reconstruction models have been actively explored in HRI, approaches that operate directly on feature vectors remain largely unexplored. In this work, we propose MADRI, a framework that first transforms video streams into semantically meaningful feature vectors before performing reconstruction-based anomaly detection. Additionally, we augment these visual feature vectors with the robot's internal sensors' readings and a Scene Graph, enabling the model to capture both external anomalies in the visual environment and internal failures within the robot itself. To evaluate our approach, we collected a custom dataset consisting of a simple pick-and-place robotic task under normal and anomalous conditions. Experimental results demonstrate that reconstruction on vision-based feature vectors alone is effective for detecting anomalies, while incorporating other modalities further improves detection performance, highlighting the benefits of multimodal feature reconstruction for robust anomaly detection in human-robot collaboration.

</details>


### [379] [Robust Adaptive Backstepping Impedance Control of Robots in Unknown Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09323)
*Reza Nazmara,Alap Kshirsagar,Jan Peters,A. Pedro Aguiar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种鲁棒自适应反步阻抗控制(RABIC)策略，用于接触丰富和不确定环境中的机器人操作，该策略考虑了系统完整的耦合动力学，并显式处理外部扰动和未建模动态等不确定性，无需机器人动态参数即可实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对机器人在接触丰富和不确定环境中操作时面临的挑战，需要一种能够处理系统耦合动力学、外部扰动和未建模动态等不确定性的控制策略，同时确保安全性能和轨迹跟踪能力。

Method: 提出基于反步法的自适应阻抗控制方案作为内环跟踪参考阻抗模型；采用基于泰勒级数的系统动力学估计器和自适应估计器处理外部力上界；通过稳定性分析证明系统的半全局实际有限时间稳定性。

Result: 通过移动机械臂仿真场景和Franka Emika Panda机器人实验验证，相比PD控制展现出更安全的性能，同时确保轨迹跟踪和力监测能力。

Conclusion: RABIC框架为未来耦合移动和固定串联机械臂的自适应和学习型阻抗控制研究提供了坚实基础。

Abstract: This paper presents a Robust Adaptive Backstepping Impedance Control (RABIC) strategy for robots operating in contact-rich and uncertain environments. The proposed control strategy considers the complete coupled dynamics of the system and explicitly accounts for key sources of uncertainty, including external disturbances and unmodeled dynamics, while not requiring the robot's dynamic parameters in implementation. We propose a backstepping-based adaptive impedance control scheme for the inner loop to track the reference impedance model. To handle uncertainties, we employ a Taylor series-based estimator for system dynamics and an adaptive estimator for determining the upper bound of external forces. Stability analysis demonstrates the semi-global practical finite-time stability of the overall system. To demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method, a simulated mobile manipulator scenario and experimental evaluations on a real Franka Emika Panda robot were conducted. The proposed approach exhibits safer performance compared to PD control while ensuring trajectory tracking and force monitoring. Overall, the RABIC framework provides a solid basis for future research on adaptive and learning-based impedance control for coupled mobile and fixed serially linked manipulators.

</details>


### [380] [Online Intention Prediction via Control-Informed Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09303)
*Tianyu Zhou,Zihao Liang,Zehui Lu,Shaoshuai Mou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出在线意图预测框架，用于实时估计自主系统的目标状态，即使意图随时间变化且系统动态或目标包含未知参数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主系统在复杂环境中需要实时预测其他智能体的意图，但现有方法难以处理时变意图和未知系统参数，限制了实际应用的适应性和准确性。

Method: 将问题建模为逆最优控制/逆强化学习任务，将意图视为目标函数中的参数。采用移动时域策略折扣过时信息，结合在线控制感知学习实现高效梯度计算和在线参数更新。

Result: 在不同噪声水平下的仿真和四旋翼无人机硬件实验中，该方法在复杂环境中实现了准确、自适应的意图预测。

Conclusion: 提出的在线意图预测框架能够有效处理时变意图和未知参数，为自主系统在动态环境中的实时决策提供了可靠的技术支持。

Abstract: This paper presents an online intention prediction framework for estimating the goal state of autonomous systems in real time, even when intention is time-varying, and system dynamics or objectives include unknown parameters. The problem is formulated as an inverse optimal control / inverse reinforcement learning task, with the intention treated as a parameter in the objective. A shifting horizon strategy discounts outdated information, while online control-informed learning enables efficient gradient computation and online parameter updates. Simulations under varying noise levels and hardware experiments on a quadrotor drone demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves accurate, adaptive intention prediction in complex environments.

</details>


### [381] [A Benchmark of Dexterity for Anthropomorphic Robotic Hands](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09294)
*Davide Liconti,Yuning Zhou,Yasunori Toshimitsu,Ronan Hinchet,Robert K. Katzschmann*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: POMDAR是一个基于任务性能的机器人灵巧性基准测试，通过结构化操作和抓取任务集合来形式化定义灵巧性，提供客观、可重复的评估框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器人灵巧性概念定义模糊且使用不一致，不同系统在不同标准下评估，导致设计间难以进行有意义的比较。需要基于可测量结果的统一性能定义。

Method: 从人类运动控制分类学系统推导出结构化操作和抓取任务集合，实现真实世界和仿真环境。包含四种操作配置：垂直和水平配置、连续旋转、纯抓取。任务设计包含机械支架以约束任务运动、抑制补偿策略，并实现无歧义的度量。

Result: 定义了结合任务正确性和执行速度的定量评分指标，将灵巧性测量为吞吐量。提供了开源、标准化、基于分类学的基准测试，支持不同手设计的客观、可重复和可解释评估。

Conclusion: POMDAR为拟人机器人手提供了一致的比较和评估基准，促进了灵巧操作平台的系统化发展。所有资源（CAD、仿真文件、评估视频）均已公开。

Abstract: Dexterity is a central yet ambiguously defined concept in the design and evaluation of anthropomorphic robotic hands. In practice, the term is often used inconsistently, with different systems evaluated under disparate criteria, making meaningful comparisons across designs difficult. This highlights the need for a unified, performance-based definition of dexterity grounded in measurable outcomes rather than proxy metrics. In this work, we introduce POMDAR, a comprehensive dexterity benchmark that formalizes dexterity as task performance across a structured set of manipulation and grasping motions. The benchmark was systematically derived from established taxonomies in human motor control. It is implemented in both real-world and simulation and includes four manipulation configurations: vertical and horizontal configurations, continuous rotation, and pure grasping. The task designs contain mechanical scaffolding to constrain task motion, suppress compensatory strategies, and enable metrics to be measured unambiguously. We define a quantitative scoring metric combining task correctness and execution speed, effectively measuring dexterity as throughput. This enables objective, reproducible, and interpretable evaluation across different hand designs. POMDAR provides an open-source, standardized, and taxonomy-grounded benchmark for consistent comparison and evaluation of anthropomorphic robot hands to facilitate a systematic advancement of dexterous manipulation platforms. CAD, simulation files, and evaluation videos are publicly available at https://srl-ethz.github.io/POMDAR/.

</details>


### [382] [Characterizing Lidar Range-Measurement Ambiguity due to Multiple Returns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09282)
*Jason H. Rife,Yifan Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 分析激光雷达数据集以表征特定射线路径上存在概率性返回的情况，为两个不同机械旋转激光雷达单元提供代表性累积分布函数，并评估概率性多返回情况对激光雷达定位的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 激光雷达在自动驾驶车辆姿态估计系统中应用日益广泛，但其在道路环境中的性能尚未得到充分理解。现有激光雷达定位算法通常假设每条射线路径上激光雷达总能识别唯一表面，但实际中当激光雷达锥形光束内出现多个散射表面时，可能产生概率性测量结果。

Method: 分析激光雷达数据集以表征特定射线路径上存在概率性返回的情况。为两个不同机械旋转激光雷达单元（固定基座）提供代表性累积分布函数。提出定性方法来评估概率性多返回情况对激光雷达定位的影响。

Result: 提供了两个不同机械旋转激光雷达单元在特定射线路径上的代表性累积分布函数，展示了概率性返回的统计特性。通过定性分析揭示了概率性多返回情况对激光雷达定位精度和可靠性的潜在影响。

Conclusion: 激光雷达在道路环境中确实存在概率性多返回现象，这对基于激光雷达的定位算法提出了挑战。需要更精确的传感器模型来考虑这些概率性行为，以提高自动驾驶车辆的定位可靠性。

Abstract: Reliable position and attitude sensing is critical for highly automated vehicles that operate on conventional roadways. Lidar sensors are increasingly incorporated into pose-estimation systems. Despite its great utility, lidar is a complex sensor, and its performance in roadway environments is not yet well understood. For instance, it is often assumed in lidar-localization algorithms that a lidar will always identify a unique surface along a given raypath. However, this assumption is not always true, as ample prior evidence exists to suggest that lidar units may generate measurements probabilistically when more than one scattering surface appears within the lidar's conical beam. In this paper, we analyze lidar datasets to characterize cases with probabilistic returns along particular raypaths. Our contribution is to present representative cumulative distribution functions (CDFs) for raypaths observed by two different mechanically rotating lidar units with stationary bases. In subsequent discussion, we outline a qualitative methodology to assess the effect of probabilistic multi-return cases on lidar-based localization.

</details>


### [383] [Soft Electroadhesive Feet for Micro Aerial Robots Perching on Smooth and Curved Surfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09270)
*Chen Liu,Sonu Feroz,Ketao Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究开发了用于微型飞行机器人栖息的软可拉伸电粘附垫，通过实验比较了剪切与法向粘附力，并在Crazyflie四旋翼上成功演示了在平滑表面的可重复附着与快速脱离。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电粘附技术为微型飞行机器人提供了电控可切换的粘附能力，是实现平滑表面栖息的有前景机制。然而，目前用于空中栖息的软可拉伸电粘附垫的实际应用仍然有限，需要开发更实用的制造方法和验证其在实际飞行器上的性能。

Method: 1) 开发了高效制造工作流程，制备具有正弦波和同心圆电极的软可拉伸电粘附垫；2) 使用Instron测试装置在非激活(0 kV)和激活(4.8 kV)条件下，系统比较法向和剪切粘附力；3) 在配备电粘附脚的Crazyflie四旋翼上进行栖息演示，测试其在平坦和弯曲基板上的性能。

Result: 实验结果显示剪切粘附力占主导地位，在部分垫接触情况下可达约3 N，而法向粘附力相对较小且强烈依赖于基板特性。Crazyflie原型机在平滑塑料表面（包括弯曲几何形状）上展示了可重复的附着能力，并在电压移除时实现快速脱离。

Conclusion: 软电粘附脚为微型飞行器提供了轻量且可靠的栖息解决方案，剪切粘附力在栖息应用中起关键作用，该技术在实际飞行器上的成功演示验证了其在微型空中机器人应用中的潜力。

Abstract: Electroadhesion (EA) provides electrically switchable adhesion and is a promising mechanism for perching micro aerial robots on smooth surfaces. However, practical implementations of soft and stretchable EA pads for aerial perching remain limited. This work presents (i) an efficient workflow for fabricating soft, stretchable electroadhesive pads with sinusoidal wave and concentric-circle electrodes in multiple sizes, (ii) a controlled experimental comparison of normal and shear adhesion under inactive (0 kV) and active (4.8 kV) conditions using an Instron-based setup, and (iii) a perching demonstration using a Crazyflie quadrotor equipped with electroadhesive feet on flat and curved substrates. Experimental results show that shear adhesion dominates, reaching forces on the order of 3 N with partial pad contact, while normal adhesion is comparatively small and strongly dependent on substrate properties. The Crazyflie prototype demonstrates repeatable attachment on smooth plastic surfaces, including curved geometries, as well as rapid detachment when the voltage is removed. These results highlight the potential of soft electroadhesive feet for lightweight and reliable perching in micro aerial vehicles (MAVs).

</details>


### [384] [On the Terminology and Geometric Aspects of Redundant Parallel Manipulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09156)
*Andreas Mueller*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文为并联机器人提出统一的冗余分类术语，强调构型空间在区分运动学冗余与驱动冗余中的核心作用，并引入驱动度概念对并联机器人进行系统分类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 并联机器人存在运动学冗余和驱动冗余两种不同类型，但文献中对驱动冗余的分类不一致，需要建立统一的术语体系来清晰区分这两种冗余概念。

Method: 提出以构型空间为核心的动力学模型，区分构型空间、输出和输入奇异点；引入构型空间上演化的非线性控制系统，定义驱动度作为独立控制向量场的数量，将并联机器人分为全驱动和欠驱动两类。

Result: 建立了并联机器人冗余分类的统一框架，通过驱动度与自由度的关系来分类驱动冗余，从几何角度证明冗余驱动方案可以避免输入奇异点。

Conclusion: 构型空间几何结构对理解并联机器人冗余至关重要，提出的驱动度概念为系统分类驱动冗余提供了理论基础，有助于区分运动学冗余和驱动冗余这两种不同概念。

Abstract: Parallel kinematics machines (PKM) can exhibit kinematic as well as actuation redundancy. While the meaning of kinematic redundancy has been clarified already for serial manipulators, actuation redundancy, that is only possible in PKM, is differently classified in the literature. In this paper a consistent terminology for general redundant PKM is proposed. A kinematic model is introduced with the configuration space (c-space) as central part. The notion of kinematic redundancy is recalled for PKM. C-space, output, and input singularities are distinguished. The significance of the c-space geometry is emphasized, and it is pointed out geometrically that input singularities can be avoided by redundant actuation schemes. In order to distinguish different actuation schemes of PKM a non-linear control system is introduced whose dynamics evolves on the c-space. The degree of actuation (DOA) is introduced as the number of independent control vector fields, and PKM are classified as full-actuated and underactuated. Relating this DOA to the degree of freedom (DOF) allows to classify the actuation redundancy.

</details>


### [385] [Towards Lifelong Aerial Autonomy: Geometric Memory Management for Continual Visual Place Recognition in Dynamic Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09038)
*Xingyu Shao,Zhiqiang Yan,Liangzheng Sun,Mengfan He,Chao Chen,Jinhui Zhang,Chunyu Li,Ziyang Meng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出用于空中视觉地点识别的异构记忆框架，通过解耦地理知识为静态卫星锚点和动态经验回放缓冲区，解决持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 空中视觉地点识别在变化环境条件下的鲁棒性对长期自主飞行至关重要。现有持续学习方法在处理地理特征严重类内变化时效果不佳，需要解决灾难性遗忘问题

Method: 将空中VPR建模为基于任务的域增量学习问题，提出异构记忆框架。采用"学习与处置"管道，将地理知识解耦为静态卫星锚点（保留全局几何先验）和动态经验回放缓冲区（保留域特定特征）。引入空间约束分配策略，基于样本难度或特征空间多样性优化缓冲区选择

Result: 在21个多样化任务序列的基准测试中，该架构显著提升了空间泛化能力。多样性驱动的缓冲区选择比随机基线在知识保留上高出7.8%。最大化结构多样性实现了更好的可塑性-稳定性平衡，确保在随机序列中的顺序无关鲁棒性

Conclusion: 在终身空中自主系统中，维持结构特征覆盖比样本难度对解决灾难性遗忘更为关键。结构多样性方法在非结构化环境中优于类均值保持方法，实现了优越的性能平衡

Abstract: Robust geo-localization in changing environmental conditions is critical for long-term aerial autonomy. While visual place recognition (VPR) models perform well when airborne views match the training domain, adapting them to shifting distributions during sequential missions triggers catastrophic forgetting. Existing continual learning (CL) methods often fail here because geographic features exhibit severe intra-class variations. In this work, we formulate aerial VPR as a mission-based domain-incremental learning (DIL) problem and propose a novel heterogeneous memory framework. To respect strict onboard storage constraints, our "Learn-and-Dispose" pipeline decouples geographic knowledge into static satellite anchors (preserving global geometric priors) and a dynamic experience replay buffer (retaining domain-specific features). We introduce a spatially-constrained allocation strategy that optimizes buffer selection based on sample difficulty or feature space diversity. To facilitate systematic assessment, we provide three evaluation criteria and a comprehensive benchmark derived from 21 diverse mission sequences. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our architecture significantly boosts spatial generalization; our diversity-driven buffer selection outperforms the random baseline by 7.8% in knowledge retention. Unlike class-mean preservation methods that fail in unstructured environments, maximizing structural diversity achieves a superior plasticity-stability balance and ensures order-agnostic robustness across randomized sequences. These results prove that maintaining structural feature coverage is more critical than sample difficulty for resolving catastrophic forgetting in lifelong aerial autonomy.

</details>


### [386] [V-CAGE: Vision-Closed-Loop Agentic Generation Engine for Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09036)
*Yaru Liu,Ao-bo Wang,Nanyang Ye*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: V-CAGE是一个用于自主机器人数据合成的智能体框架，通过上下文感知的场景构建、闭环验证和感知驱动压缩，解决现有方法缺乏语义连贯性和物理可行性的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型需要大规模数据集，但传统场景生成方法缺乏上下文感知能力，导致生成的环境语义信息贫乏且物理上不可行，经常产生无法到达的目标位置，使任务过早失败。

Method: 提出V-CAGE智能体框架：1) 引入修复引导的场景构建，系统安排上下文感知的布局；2) 集成功能元数据与基于视觉语言模型的闭环验证机制，作为视觉批评器过滤失败案例；3) 实现感知驱动的压缩算法，减少90%以上文件大小。

Result: V-CAGE实现了端到端自动化管道，能够高度可扩展地合成多样化、高质量的机器人操作数据集，同时保持下游VLA训练效果不受影响。

Conclusion: V-CAGE通过集中语义布局规划和视觉自验证，解决了现有数据合成方法在语义连贯性和物理可行性方面的局限性，为大规模VLA模型训练提供了高效的数据生成解决方案。

Abstract: Scaling Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models requires massive datasets that are both semantically coherent and physically feasible. However, existing scene generation methods often lack context-awareness, making it difficult to synthesize high-fidelity environments embedded with rich semantic information, frequently resulting in unreachable target positions that cause tasks to fail prematurely. We present V-CAGE (Vision-Closed-loop Agentic Generation Engine), an agentic framework for autonomous robotic data synthesis. Unlike traditional scripted pipelines, V-CAGE operates as an embodied agentic system, leveraging foundation models to bridge high-level semantic reasoning with low-level physical interaction. Specifically, we introduce Inpainting-Guided Scene Construction to systematically arrange context-aware layouts, ensuring that the generated scenes are both semantically structured and kinematically reachable. To ensure trajectory correctness, we integrate functional metadata with a Vision-Language Model based closed-loop verification mechanism, acting as a visual critic to rigorously filter out silent failures and sever the error propagation chain. Finally, to overcome the storage bottleneck of massive video datasets, we implement a perceptually-driven compression algorithm that achieves over 90\% filesize reduction without compromising downstream VLA training efficacy. By centralizing semantic layout planning and visual self-verification, V-CAGE automates the end-to-end pipeline, enabling the highly scalable synthesis of diverse, high-quality robotic manipulation datasets.

</details>


### [387] [AssemLM: Spatial Reasoning Multimodal Large Language Models for Robotic Assembly](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08983)
*Zhi Jing,Jinbin Qiao,Ouyang Lu,Jicong Ao,Shuang Qiu,Yu-Gang Jiang,Chenjia Bai*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AssemLM：面向机器人装配的空间多模态大语言模型，通过整合装配手册、点云和文本指令，实现任务关键的6D装配姿态预测，填补了现有具身AI基准在3D几何推理方面的空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉语言模型主要依赖粗粒度的2D感知，缺乏对3D几何的精确推理能力，而这是精确装配操作的关键。需要开发能够进行准确3D空间推理的模型来支持机器人装配任务。

Method: 提出AssemLM空间多模态大语言模型，集成装配手册、点云和文本指令。采用专门的点云编码器捕获细粒度的几何和旋转特征，并将其整合到多模态语言模型中，支持装配任务的准确3D空间推理。

Result: 构建了AssemBench大规模数据集和基准，包含超过90万个多模态样本和精确的6D姿态标注。实验表明AssemLM在多种装配场景下实现了6D姿态推理的最先进性能。真实机器人评估显示模型能够支持现实环境中的细粒度和多步装配执行。

Conclusion: AssemLM通过整合3D几何理解与高级推理，显著提升了机器人装配任务的空间推理能力，为具身智能在精细操作任务中的应用提供了有效解决方案，展示了在真实机器人装配应用中的潜力。

Abstract: Spatial reasoning is a fundamental capability for embodied intelligence, especially for fine-grained manipulation tasks such as robotic assembly. While recent vision-language models (VLMs) exhibit preliminary spatial awareness, they largely rely on coarse 2D perception and lack the ability to perform accurate reasoning over 3D geometry, which is crucial for precise assembly operations. To address this limitation, we propose AssemLM, a spatial multimodal large language model tailored for robotic assembly. AssemLM integrates assembly manuals, point clouds, and textual instructions to reason about and predict task-critical 6D assembly poses, enabling explicit geometric understanding throughout the assembly process. To effectively bridge raw 3D perception and high-level reasoning, we adopt a specialized point cloud encoder to capture fine-grained geometric and rotational features, which are then integrated into the multimodal language model to support accurate 3D spatial reasoning for assembly tasks. In addition, we construct AssemBench, a large-scale dataset and benchmark for assembly-oriented spatial reasoning, comprising over 900K multimodal samples with precise 6D pose annotations. AssemBench extends spatial reasoning evaluation beyond 2D and grounding tasks into full 3D geometric inference, filling a critical gap in existing embodied AI benchmarks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AssemLM achieves state-of-the-art performance in 6D pose reasoning across diverse assembly scenarios. Furthermore, real-robot evaluations show that our model can support fine-grained and multi-step assembly execution in real-world settings, demonstrating its potential for robotic assembly applications.

</details>


### [388] [HTNav: A Hybrid Navigation Framework with Tiered Structure for Urban Aerial Vision-and-Language Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08883)
*Chengjie Fan,Cong Pan,Zijian Liu,Ningzhong Liu,Jie Qin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HTNav：一种结合模仿学习与强化学习的混合协同导航框架，用于解决复杂城市环境中空中视觉语言导航的泛化性、长距离路径规划和空间连续性理解问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有空中视觉语言导航方法在复杂城市环境中面临三个主要挑战：1）对未见场景的泛化能力不足；2）长距离路径规划性能欠佳；3）对空间连续性的理解不够充分。这些限制影响了导航精度和鲁棒性。

Method: 提出HTNav协同导航框架：1）采用混合IL-RL框架，结合模仿学习和强化学习；2）实施分阶段训练机制，确保基础导航策略稳定性同时增强环境探索能力；3）引入分层决策机制，实现宏观路径规划与细粒度动作控制的协同交互；4）设计地图表示学习模块，深化对开放域空间连续性的理解。

Result: 在CityNav基准测试中，该方法在所有场景级别和任务难度上都达到了最先进的性能。实验结果表明，该框架显著提高了复杂城市环境中的导航精度和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: HTNav框架通过混合IL-RL方法、分层决策机制和地图表示学习，有效解决了空中视觉语言导航在复杂城市环境中的关键挑战，为物流配送、城市巡检等应用提供了更可靠的导航解决方案。

Abstract: Inspired by the general Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) task, aerial VLN has attracted widespread attention, owing to its significant practical value in applications such as logistics delivery and urban inspection. However, existing methods face several challenges in complex urban environments, including insufficient generalization to unseen scenes, suboptimal performance in long-range path planning, and inadequate understanding of spatial continuity. To address these challenges, we propose HTNav, a new collaborative navigation framework that integrates Imitation Learning (IL) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) within a hybrid IL-RL framework. This framework adopts a staged training mechanism to ensure the stability of the basic navigation strategy while enhancing its environmental exploration capability. By integrating a tiered decision-making mechanism, it achieves collaborative interaction between macro-level path planning and fine-grained action control. Furthermore, a map representation learning module is introduced to deepen its understanding of spatial continuity in open domains. On the CityNav benchmark, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across all scene levels and task difficulties. Experimental results demonstrate that this framework significantly improves navigation precision and robustness in complex urban environments.

</details>


### [389] [Simulation of Adaptive Running with Flexible Sports Prosthesis using Reinforcement Learning of Hybrid-link System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08882)
*Yuta Shimane,Ko Yamamoto*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于强化学习的单侧胫骨截肢者跑步运动仿真方法，使用混合连杆系统模拟叶片弹簧型运动假肢的柔性变形，分析不同虚拟假肢刚度对跑步性能的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 运动假肢的设计和选择通常依赖试错法，缺乏考虑人体运动与假肢变形相互作用的全面全身动力学分析。需要一种能够提供用户特定设计和选择见解的仿真方法。

Method: 采用混合连杆系统，结合分段恒定应变模型表示假肢的柔性变形。基于强化学习的方法，从运动捕捉数据中进行模仿学习，结合精确的假肢动力学计算，生成单侧胫骨截肢者的全身动态运动。

Result: 在不同虚拟假肢刚度条件下模拟跑步运动，分析获得的运输代谢成本，发现刚度变化会影响跑步性能。仿真结果显示了该方法在虚拟条件下进行分析的潜力。

Conclusion: 该方法能够模拟和分析与实际情况不同的虚拟条件下的运动，为运动假肢的用户特定设计和选择提供了有价值的仿真工具。

Abstract: This study proposes a reinforcement learning-based adaptive running motion simulation for a unilateral transtibial amputee with the flexibility of a leaf-spring-type sports prosthesis using hybrid-link system. The design and selection of sports prostheses often rely on trial and error. A comprehensive whole-body dynamics analysis that considers the interaction between human motion and prosthetic deformation could provide valuable insights for user-specific design and selection. The hybrid-link system facilitates whole-body dynamics analysis by incorporating the Piece-wise Constant Strain model to represent the flexible deformation of the prosthesis. Based on this system, the simulation methodology generates whole-body dynamic motions of a unilateral transtibial amputee through a reinforcement learning-based approach, which combines imitation learning from motion capture data with accurate prosthetic dynamics computation. We simulated running motions under different virtual prosthetic stiffness conditions and analyzed the metabolic cost of transport obtained from the simulations, suggesting that variations in stiffness influence running performance. Our findings demonstrate the potential of this approach for simulation and analysis under virtual conditions that differ from real conditions.

</details>


### [390] [One Interface, Many Robots: Unified Real-Time Low-Level Motion Planning for Collaborative Arms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08787)
*Yue Feng,Weicheng Huang,I-Ming Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个用于协作机械臂实时低级运动规划的通用接口，通过多项式插值和二次规划求解器生成平滑轨迹，并在三种场景中验证了其可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为协作机械臂的实时低级运动规划提供一个通用接口，以提升在不同异构硬件平台上的适用性和可移植性，解决现有系统在跨平台部署时的兼容性问题。

Method: 基于WinGs Operating Studio中间件，设计最小化但灵活的实时末端执行器轨迹控制接口，采用n次多项式插值器结合二次规划求解器，生成具有精确位置、速度和加速度轮廓的平滑连续可微轨迹。

Result: 在三种不同场景中成功验证：1）离线演示中机械臂精确绘制几何图形；2）可中断的低频重规划场景中机械臂抓取移动机器人上的动态物体；3）遥操作实验中一个机械臂控制另一个执行灵巧操作，证明了方法的可靠性、多功能性和易用性。

Conclusion: 提出的通用接口能够有效实现协作机械臂的实时低级运动规划，在不同硬件平台和应用场景中表现出良好的性能，为异构机器人系统的标准化控制提供了可行方案。

Abstract: This paper proposes a common interface for real-time low-level motion planning of collaborative robotic arms, aimed at enabling broader applicability and improved portability across heterogeneous hardware platforms. In previous work, we introduced WinGs Operating Studio (WOS), a middleware solution that abstracts diverse robotic components into uniform software resources and provides a broad suite of language-agnostic APIs. This paper specifically focuses on its minimal yet flexible interface for real-time end-effector trajectory control. By employing an n-degree polynomial interpolator in conjunction with a quadratic programming solver, the proposed method generates smooth, continuously differentiable trajectories with precise position, velocity, and acceleration profiles. We validate our approach in three distinct scenarios. First, in an offline demonstration, a collaborative arm accurately draws various geometric shapes on paper. Second, in an interruptible, low-frequency re-planning setting, a robotic manipulator grasps a dynamic object placed on a moving mobile robot. Finally, we conducted a teleoperation experiment in which one robotic arm controlled another to perform a series of dexterous manipulations, confirming the proposed method's reliability, versatility, and ease of use.

</details>


### [391] [Toward Hardware-Agnostic Quadrupedal World Models via Morphology Conditioning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08780)
*Mohamad H. Danesh,Chenhao Li,Amin Abyaneh,Anas Houssaini,Kirsty Ellis,Glen Berseth,Marco Hutter,Hsiu-Chin Lin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种可泛化的四足机器人世界模型（QWM），通过显式编码机器人形态学参数，实现跨不同四足机器人形态的零样本控制，解决了现有世界模型对特定硬件过拟合的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前世界模型存在硬件锁定的问题：针对特定机器人（如波士顿动力Spot）训练的模型无法泛化到其他四足机器人（如宇树Go1），因为模型过度拟合了特定机器人的运动学和动力学特性，而非学习通用的运动动态。机器人形态的微小变化（如执行器动态或肢体长度）就需要从头训练新模型。

Method: 提出Quadrupedal World Model（QWM）框架，通过显式地将生成动态条件化于机器人的工程规格，而非隐式地将静态物理属性（如质量、肢体长度）作为从运动历史推断的潜变量。方法包含物理形态编码器和奖励归一器，使模型能够作为神经模拟器在不同形态间泛化。

Result: 首次实现了能够零样本泛化到新形态的四足机器人世界模型。模型作为四足机器人形态族内的分布有界插值器，而非通用物理引擎，但能够实现跨不同形态的零样本控制。

Conclusion: 这项工作代表了向形态条件化世界模型迈出的重要一步，为四足机器人运动提供了可泛化的世界模型框架。虽然方法存在局限性（作为分布有界插值器而非通用物理引擎），但为解决世界模型的硬件锁定问题提供了有效方案。

Abstract: World models promise a paradigm shift in robotics, where an agent learns the underlying physics of its environment once to enable efficient planning and behavior learning. However, current world models are often hardware-locked specialists: a model trained on a Boston Dynamics Spot robot fails catastrophically on a Unitree Go1 due to the mismatch in kinematic and dynamic properties, as the model overfits to specific embodiment constraints rather than capturing the universal locomotion dynamics. Consequently, a slight change in actuator dynamics or limb length necessitates training a new model from scratch. In this work, we take a step towards a framework for training a generalizable Quadrupedal World Model (QWM) that disentangles environmental dynamics from robot morphology. We address the limitations of implicit system identification, where treating static physical properties (like mass or limb length) as latent variables to be inferred from motion history creates an adaptation lag that can compromise zero-shot safety and efficiency. Instead, we explicitly condition the generative dynamics on the robot's engineering specifications. By integrating a physical morphology encoder and a reward normalizer, we enable the model to serve as a neural simulator capable of generalizing across morphologies. This capability unlocks zero-shot control across a range of embodiments. We introduce, for the first time, a world model that enables zero-shot generalization to new morphologies for locomotion. While we carefully study the limitations of our method, QWM operates as a distribution-bounded interpolator within the quadrupedal morphology family rather than a universal physics engine, this work represents a significant step toward morphology-conditioned world models for legged locomotion.

</details>


### [392] [Task-Aware Bimanual Affordance Prediction via VLM-Guided Semantic-Geometric Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08726)
*Fabian Hahne,Vignesh Prasad,Georgia Chalvatzaki,Jan Peters,Alap Kshirsagar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出分层框架解决双手操作中的联合可操作区域定位和手臂分配问题，利用视觉语言模型实现跨物体类别和任务描述的泛化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 双手操作需要同时考虑与物体的交互位置和手臂分配，这是一个几何规划器无法单独解决的联合可操作区域定位和手臂分配问题。现有方法要么将可操作性预测视为粗略的部分分割，要么依赖几何启发式进行手臂分配，无法联合推理任务相关的接触区域和手臂分配。

Method: 提出分层框架进行任务感知的双手可操作性预测：1) 将多视角RGB-D观测融合为一致的3D场景表示；2) 生成全局6自由度抓取候选；3) 查询视觉语言模型对每个物体进行任务相关可操作区域的空间和语义过滤；4) 同时查询VLM进行手臂分配到各个物体，确保几何有效性同时尊重任务语义。

Result: 在双臂平台上评估了9个真实世界操作任务，涵盖4个类别：并行操作、协调稳定、工具使用和人类交接。相比几何和语义基线，该方法在任务导向抓取方面实现了持续更高的任务成功率。

Conclusion: 明确对可操作性和手臂分配进行语义推理有助于在非结构化环境中实现可靠的双手操作。该方法无需类别特定训练即可泛化到不同物体类别和任务描述。

Abstract: Bimanual manipulation requires reasoning about where to interact with an object and which arm should perform each action, a joint affordance localization and arm allocation problem that geometry-only planners cannot resolve without semantic understanding of task intent. Existing approaches either treat affordance prediction as coarse part segmentation or rely on geometric heuristics for arm assignment, failing to jointly reason about task-relevant contact regions and arm allocation. We reframe bimanual manipulation as a joint affordance localization and arm allocation problem and propose a hierarchical framework for task-aware bimanual affordance prediction that leverages a Vision-Language Model (VLM) to generalize across object categories and task descriptions without requiring category-specific training. Our approach fuses multi-view RGB-D observations into a consistent 3D scene representation and generates global 6-DoF grasp candidates, which are then spatially and semantically filtered by querying the VLM for task-relevant affordance regions on each object, as well as for arm allocation to the individual objects, thereby ensuring geometric validity while respecting task semantics. We evaluate our method on a dual-arm platform across nine real-world manipulation tasks spanning four categories: parallel manipulation, coordinated stabilization, tool use, and human handover. Our approach achieves consistently higher task success rates than geometric and semantic baselines for task-oriented grasping, demonstrating that explicit semantic reasoning over affordances and arm allocation helps enable reliable bimanual manipulation in unstructured environments.

</details>


### [393] [Generative Simulation for Policy Learning in Physical Human-Robot Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08664)
*Junxiang Wang,Xinwen Xu,Tiancheng Wu,Julian Millan,Nir Pechuk,Zackory Erickson*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出首个用于物理人机交互的零样本"文本到仿真到现实"生成框架，通过自然语言提示自动生成多样化的pHRI场景，实现大规模合成数据收集和视觉模仿学习策略训练


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主物理人机交互系统开发受限于大规模训练数据的稀缺性，难以学习适用于现实应用的鲁棒机器人行为

Method: 基于大型语言模型和视觉语言模型的生成式仿真框架，从高级自然语言提示自动生成软体人体模型、场景布局和机器人运动轨迹，收集大规模合成演示数据集，训练基于分割点云的视觉模仿学习策略

Result: 在抓挠和洗澡两个辅助任务中，学习到的策略成功实现零样本仿真到现实迁移，成功率超过80%，并对非脚本化人体运动表现出鲁棒性

Conclusion: 提出了首个用于pHRI应用的生成式仿真流水线，实现了仿真环境合成、数据收集和策略学习的自动化，为物理人机交互系统开发提供了新的数据生成和训练范式

Abstract: Developing autonomous physical human-robot interaction (pHRI) systems is limited by the scarcity of large-scale training data to learn robust robot behaviors for real-world applications. In this paper, we introduce a zero-shot "text2sim2real" generative simulation framework that automatically synthesizes diverse pHRI scenarios from high-level natural-language prompts. Leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs), our pipeline procedurally generates soft-body human models, scene layouts, and robot motion trajectories for assistive tasks. We utilize this framework to autonomously collect large-scale synthetic demonstration datasets and then train vision-based imitation learning policies operating on segmented point clouds. We evaluate our approach through a user study on two physically assistive tasks: scratching and bathing. Our learned policies successfully achieve zero-shot sim-to-real transfer, attaining success rates exceeding 80% and demonstrating resilience to unscripted human motion. Overall, we introduce the first generative simulation pipeline for pHRI applications, automating simulation environment synthesis, data collection, and policy learning. Additional information may be found on our project website: https://rchi-lab.github.io/gen_phri/

</details>


### [394] [SIM1: Physics-Aligned Simulator as Zero-Shot Data Scaler in Deformable Worlds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08544)
*Yunsong Zhou,Hangxu Liu,Xuekun Jiang,Xing Shen,Yuanzhen Zhou,Hui Wang,Baole Fang,Yang Tian,Mulin Yu,Qiaojun Yu,Li Ma,Hengjie Li,Hanqing Wang,Jia Zeng,Jiangmiao Pang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SIM1：基于物理对齐的真实-仿真-真实数据引擎，通过将仿真系统建立在物理世界基础上，为可变形物体操作提供可扩展的监督学习


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可变形物体操作需要大量数据，传统仿真方法基于刚体抽象，导致几何不匹配、软体动力学脆弱以及不适合布料交互的运动基元。仿真失败的原因不是因为是合成的，而是因为没有物理基础。

Method: SIM1是一个物理对齐的真实-仿真-真实数据引擎：1）将有限演示场景数字化为度量一致的双胞胎；2）通过弹性建模校准可变形动力学；3）使用基于扩散的轨迹生成和质量过滤扩展行为。将稀疏观察转化为具有接近演示保真度的规模化合成监督。

Result: 在纯合成数据上训练的策略在1:15等价比下达到与真实数据基线相当的性能，在真实世界部署中实现90%的零样本成功率和50%的泛化增益。

Conclusion: 物理对齐的仿真可作为可变形物体操作的可扩展监督学习方式，为数据高效策略学习提供实用途径。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation with deformable objects represents a data-intensive regime in embodied learning, where shape, contact, and topology co-evolve in ways that far exceed the variability of rigids. Although simulation promises relief from the cost of real-world data acquisition, prevailing sim-to-real pipelines remain rooted in rigid-body abstractions, producing mismatched geometry, fragile soft dynamics, and motion primitives poorly suited for cloth interaction. We posit that simulation fails not for being synthetic, but for being ungrounded. To address this, we introduce SIM1, a physics-aligned real-to-sim-to-real data engine that grounds simulation in the physical world. Given limited demonstrations, the system digitizes scenes into metric-consistent twins, calibrates deformable dynamics through elastic modeling, and expands behaviors via diffusion-based trajectory generation with quality filtering. This pipeline transforms sparse observations into scaled synthetic supervision with near-demonstration fidelity. Experiments show that policies trained on purely synthetic data achieve parity with real-data baselines at a 1:15 equivalence ratio, while delivering 90% zero-shot success and 50% generalization gains in real-world deployment. These results validate physics-aligned simulation as scalable supervision for deformable manipulation and a practical pathway for data-efficient policy learning.

</details>


### [395] [Fail2Drive: Benchmarking Closed-Loop Driving Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08535)
*Simon Gerstenecker,Andreas Geiger,Katrin Renz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Fail2Drive是首个用于CARLA闭环自动驾驶泛化测试的配对路线基准，包含200条路线和17种新场景类别，通过匹配分布内和分布外路线来量化泛化能力下降


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶基准测试通常重用训练场景，导致模型可能通过记忆而非真正学习来获得成功，无法准确评估在分布偏移下的泛化能力

Method: 创建包含200条路线和17种新场景类别的配对路线基准，每个偏移路线都有对应的分布内路线，使用开源工具箱创建新场景并通过特权专家策略验证可解性

Result: 评估多个最先进模型显示一致的性能下降，平均成功率下降22.8%，揭示了意外故障模式，如忽略LiDAR中清晰可见的物体和无法学习自由与占用空间的基本概念

Conclusion: Fail2Drive为闭环驾驶泛化的基准测试和改进提供了可复现的基础，通过开源代码、数据和工具加速后续研究，解决了自动驾驶泛化评估的关键瓶颈

Abstract: Generalization under distribution shift remains a central bottleneck for closed-loop autonomous driving. Although simulators like CARLA enable safe and scalable testing, existing benchmarks rarely measure true generalization: they typically reuse training scenarios at test time. Success can therefore reflect memorization rather than robust driving behavior. We introduce Fail2Drive, the first paired-route benchmark for closed-loop generalization in CARLA, with 200 routes and 17 new scenario classes spanning appearance, layout, behavioral, and robustness shifts. Each shifted route is matched with an in-distribution counterpart, isolating the effect of the shift and turning qualitative failures into quantitative diagnostics. Evaluating multiple state-of-the-art models reveals consistent degradation, with an average success-rate drop of 22.8\%. Our analysis uncovers unexpected failure modes, such as ignoring objects clearly visible in the LiDAR and failing to learn the fundamental concepts of free and occupied space. To accelerate follow-up work, Fail2Drive includes an open-source toolbox for creating new scenarios and validating solvability via a privileged expert policy. Together, these components establish a reproducible foundation for benchmarking and improving closed-loop driving generalization. We open-source all code, data, and tools at https://github.com/autonomousvision/fail2drive .

</details>


### [396] [ActiveGlasses: Learning Manipulation with Active Vision from Ego-centric Human Demonstration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08534)
*Yanwen Zou,Chenyang Shi,Wenye Yu,Han Xue,Jun Lv,Ye Pan,Chuan Wen,Cewu Lu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ActiveGlasses：一种通过智能眼镜采集人类第一人称视角演示数据，实现零样本迁移到机器人平台的主动视觉系统


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人数据采集方法通常依赖专用手持设备，增加了操作负担、限制了可扩展性，且难以捕捉人类日常交互中自然协调的感知-操作行为。需要更自然的系统来忠实记录人类操作和感知行为，并实现零样本迁移到机器人平台。

Method: 使用安装在智能眼镜上的立体相机作为唯一感知设备：操作者在裸手演示时佩戴，部署时同一相机安装在6自由度感知臂上以复现人类主动视觉。从演示中提取物体轨迹，使用以物体为中心的点云策略联合预测操作和头部运动。

Result: 在涉及遮挡和精确交互的多个挑战性任务中，ActiveGlasses实现了带主动视觉的零样本迁移，在相同硬件设置下始终优于强基线方法，并在两个机器人平台上展示了良好的泛化能力。

Conclusion: ActiveGlasses提供了一种更自然、可扩展的机器人操作学习系统，通过第一人称视角人类演示和主动视觉机制，实现了从人类到机器人的零样本技能迁移。

Abstract: Large-scale real-world robot data collection is a prerequisite for bringing robots into everyday deployment. However, existing pipelines often rely on specialized handheld devices to bridge the embodiment gap, which not only increases operator burden and limits scalability, but also makes it difficult to capture the naturally coordinated perception-manipulation behaviors of human daily interaction. This challenge calls for a more natural system that can faithfully capture human manipulation and perception behaviors while enabling zero-shot transfer to robotic platforms. We introduce ActiveGlasses, a system for learning robot manipulation from ego-centric human demonstrations with active vision. A stereo camera mounted on smart glasses serves as the sole perception device for both data collection and policy inference: the operator wears it during bare-hand demonstrations, and the same camera is mounted on a 6-DoF perception arm during deployment to reproduce human active vision. To enable zero-transfer, we extract object trajectories from demonstrations and use an object-centric point-cloud policy to jointly predict manipulation and head movement. Across several challenging tasks involving occlusion and precise interaction, ActiveGlasses achieves zero-shot transfer with active vision, consistently outperforms strong baselines under the same hardware setup, and generalizes across two robot platforms.

</details>


### [397] [Sumo: Dynamic and Generalizable Whole-Body Loco-Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08508)
*John Z. Zhang,Maks Sorokin,Jan Brüdigam,Brandon Hung,Stephen Phillips,Dmitry Yershov,Farzad Niroui,Tong Zhao,Leonor Fermoselle,Xinghao Zhu,Chao Cao,Duy Ta,Tao Pang,Jiuguang Wang,Preston Culbertson,Zachary Manchester,Simon Le Cléac'h*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种sim-to-real方法，通过测试时引导预训练全身控制策略与基于采样的规划器，使腿式机器人能够动态操纵大型重物，并在真实Spot四足机器人上验证了多种挑战性任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决腿式机器人动态操纵大型重物的挑战，传统方法难以处理超出机器人额定举升能力的物体，需要开发能够适应多样化物体和任务的通用方法。

Method: 采用sim-to-real方法，结合预训练的全身控制策略和基于采样的规划器进行测试时引导，无需额外调参或训练即可泛化到多样化物体和任务，支持测试时灵活调整成本函数。

Result: 在真实Spot四足机器人上成功完成多项挑战性任务：扶正超过机器人额定举升能力的轮胎、拖动比机器人更大更高的防暴屏障；在仿真中扩展到人形机器人开门、推桌等任务。

Conclusion: 该方法实现了腿式机器人对大型重物的动态全身灵巧操纵，具有良好的泛化能力和适应性，为复杂环境中的机器人操作提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: This paper presents a sim-to-real approach that enables legged robots to dynamically manipulate large and heavy objects with whole-body dexterity. Our key insight is that by performing test-time steering of a pre-trained whole-body control policy with a sample-based planner, we can enable these robots to solve a variety of dynamic loco-manipulation tasks. Interestingly, we find our method generalizes to a diverse set of objects and tasks with no additional tuning or training, and can be further enhanced by flexibly adjusting the cost function at test time. We demonstrate the capabilities of our approach through a variety of challenging loco-manipulation tasks on a Spot quadruped robot in the real world, including uprighting a tire heavier than the robot's nominal lifting capacity and dragging a crowd-control barrier larger and taller than the robot itself. Additionally, we show that the same approach can be generalized to humanoid loco-manipulation tasks, such as opening a door and pushing a table, in simulation. Project code and videos are available at \href{https://sumo.rai-inst.com/}{https://sumo.rai-inst.com/}.

</details>


### [398] [LEGO: Latent-space Exploration for Geometry-aware Optimization of Humanoid Kinematic Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08636)
*Jihwan Yoon,Taemoon Jeong,Jeongeun Park,Chanwoo Kim,Jaewoon Kwon,Yonghyeon Lee,Kyungjae Lee,Sungjoon Choi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于数据驱动的机器人形态设计新范式，通过从现有机械设计中学习设计搜索空间，并利用人体运动数据定义损失函数，实现人形机器人上身的自动化设计优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器人形态和运动学设计依赖人类直觉，缺乏系统化基础。运动设计协同优化面临两大挑战：巨大的非结构化设计空间和任务特定损失函数构建困难。需要减少人工参与，实现自动化设计发现。

Method: 1) 从现有机械设计中学习设计搜索空间，而非手工构建；2) 通过运动重定向和Procrustes分析，直接从人体运动数据定义损失函数；3) 使用基于螺旋理论的关节轴表示和等距流形学习构建紧凑、保几何的人形机器人上身设计潜空间；4) 在该潜空间中使用无梯度优化进行设计优化。

Result: 建立了一个用于数据驱动机器人设计的原理性框架，证明利用现有设计和人体运动数据可以有效指导新型机器人设计的自动化发现。

Conclusion: 该研究提出了一种减少人工参与的新范式，通过从现有设计中学习设计空间和从人体运动数据定义损失，实现了人形机器人上身的自动化设计优化，为数据驱动的机器人设计提供了系统化方法。

Abstract: Designing robot morphologies and kinematics has traditionally relied on human intuition, with little systematic foundation. Motion-design co-optimization offers a promising path toward automation, but two major challenges remain: (i) the vast, unstructured design space and (ii) the difficulty of constructing task-specific loss functions. We propose a new paradigm that minimizes human involvement by (i) learning the design search space from existing mechanical designs, rather than hand-crafting it, and (ii) defining the loss directly from human motion data via motion retargeting and Procrustes analysis. Using screw-theory-based joint axis representation and isometric manifold learning, we construct a compact, geometry-preserving latent space of humanoid upper body designs in which optimization is tractable. We then solve design optimization in this latent space using gradient-free optimization. Our approach establishes a principled framework for data-driven robot design and demonstrates that leveraging existing designs and human motion can effectively guide the automated discovery of novel robot design.

</details>


### [399] [A Unified Multi-Layer Framework for Skill Acquisition from Imperfect Human Demonstrations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08341)
*Zi-Qi Yang,Mehrdad R. Kermani*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个三层控制框架，通过实时学习示教、零空间优化和全域柔顺控制，实现高效、直观且安全的机器人技能教学系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前人机交互技能教学系统碎片化，缺乏同时具备高效性、直观性和通用安全性的统一框架。需要解决轨迹与阻抗同时学习、示教过程质量保证以及全域安全柔顺适应的问题。

Method: 提出三层渐进式控制框架：1) 实时LfD方法，从单次示教同时学习轨迹和可变阻抗；2) 零空间优化策略，主动管理奇异性并提供一致的交互感受；3) 基础零空间柔顺方法，使整个机器人身体柔顺适应外部交互而不影响主任务。

Result: 在7-DOF KUKA LWR机器人上验证，结果表明系统在广泛的人机协作任务中表现出更安全、更直观、更高效的统一性能。

Conclusion: 该框架填补了人机交互技能教学领域的根本性空白，通过三层渐进式设计实现了从示教学习到全域柔顺适应的完整解决方案，将系统转变为超越末端执行器应用的通用人机交互平台。

Abstract: Current Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) systems for skill teaching are fragmented, and existing approaches in the literature do not offer a cohesive framework that is simultaneously efficient, intuitive, and universally safe. This paper presents a novel, layered control framework that addresses this fundamental gap by enabling robust, compliant Learning from Demonstration (LfD) built upon a foundation of universal robot compliance. The proposed approach is structured in three progressive and interconnected stages. First, we introduce a real-time LfD method that learns both the trajectory and variable impedance from a single demonstration, significantly improving efficiency and reproduction fidelity. To ensure high-quality and intuitive {kinesthetic teaching}, we then present a null-space optimization strategy that proactively manages singularities and provides a consistent interaction feel during human demonstration. Finally, to ensure generalized safety, we introduce a foundational null-space compliance method that enables the entire robot body to compliantly adapt to post-learning external interactions without compromising main task performance. This final contribution transforms the system into a versatile HRI platform, moving beyond end-effector (EE)-specific applications. We validate the complete framework through comprehensive comparative experiments on a 7-DOF KUKA LWR robot. The results demonstrate a safer, more intuitive, and more efficient unified system for a wide range of human-robot collaborative tasks.

</details>


### [400] [EMMa: End-Effector Stability-Oriented Mobile Manipulation for Tracked Rescue Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08292)
*Yifei Wang,Hao Zhang,Jidong Huang,Shuohang Fang,Haoyao Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出用于履带式移动机械臂的协调运动生成框架，通过耦合末端执行器与移动基座状态的路径优化模型和隔离控制方案，实现复杂救援场景中的稳定末端操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究在规划和控制层面忽视了末端执行器的多种运动特性，而救援任务中的履带式移动机械臂自主操作不仅需要确保运动可达性和安全性，还需在不同任务需求下维持稳定的末端执行器操作。

Method: 1) 提出协调路径优化模型，耦合末端执行器与移动基座状态，设计紧凑的成本/约束表示以减轻非线性并降低计算复杂度；2) 开发具有前馈补偿和反馈调节的隔离控制方案，实现机器人协调路径跟踪。

Result: 在救援场景的大量仿真和真实世界实验中，所提框架在关键指标（包括任务成功率和末端执行器运动稳定性）上持续优于最先进方法，验证了其在复杂移动操作任务中的有效性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该框架通过协调路径优化和隔离控制，成功解决了履带式移动机械臂在复杂救援场景中实现稳定末端操作的挑战，为自主移动操作提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: The autonomous operation of tracked mobile manipulators in rescue missions requires not only ensuring the reachability and safety of robot motion but also maintaining stable end-effector manipulation under diverse task demands. However, existing studies have overlooked many end-effector motion properties at both the planning and control levels. This paper presents a motion generation framework for tracked mobile manipulators to achieve stable end-effector operation in complex rescue scenarios. The framework formulates a coordinated path optimization model that couples end-effector and mobile base states and designs compact cost/constraint representations to mitigate nonlinearities and reduce computational complexity. Furthermore, an isolated control scheme with feedforward compensation and feedback regulation is developed to enable coordinated path tracking for the robot. Extensive simulated and real-world experiments on rescue scenarios demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently outperforms SOTA methods across key metrics, including task success rate and end-effector motion stability, validating its effectiveness and robustness in complex mobile manipulation tasks.

</details>


### [401] [EvoGymCM: Harnessing Continuous Material Stiffness for Soft Robot Co-Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08258)
*Le Shen,Kangyao Huang,Wentao Zhao,Huaping Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: EvoGymCM扩展了软体机器人协同设计基准，将连续材料刚度作为与形态和控制并列的一类设计变量，包含反应性和不变性两种材料设置，并提出相应的协同设计范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有软体机器人协同设计平台（如EvoGym）将材料维度严格离散化，人为限制了设计空间和性能。需要建立连续材料刚度作为一类设计变量的基准，以充分挖掘软体机器人的物理潜力。

Method: 提出EvoGymCM基准套件，包含两种材料设置：EvoGymCM-R（反应性材料，模拟可编程材料的动态刚度调节）和EvoGymCM-I（不变性材料，模拟传统材料的固定刚度场）。针对高维耦合问题，提出两种形态-材料-控制协同设计范式：反应性材料协同设计（学习实时刚度调节策略）和不变性材料协同设计（联合优化形态和固定材料场）。

Result: 系统实验表明，连续材料优化能提升性能，并在形态、材料和控制器之间解锁协同效应。

Conclusion: 将连续材料刚度作为一类设计变量是软体机器人协同设计的关键进展，EvoGymCM基准为探索形态、材料和控制的协同优化提供了正式框架。

Abstract: In the automated co-design of soft robots, precisely adapting the material stiffness field to task environments is crucial for unlocking their full physical potential. However, mainstream platforms (e.g., EvoGym) strictly discretize the material dimension, artificially restricting the design space and performance of soft robots. To address this, we propose EvoGymCM (EvoGym with Continuous Materials), a benchmark suite formally establishing continuous material stiffness as a first-class design variable alongside morphology and control. Aligning with real-world material mechanisms, EvoGymCM introduces two settings: (i) EvoGymCM-R (Reactive), motivated by programmable materials with dynamically tunable stiffness; and (ii) EvoGymCM-I (Invariant), motivated by traditional materials with invariant stiffness fields. To tackle the resulting high-dimensional coupling, we formulate two Morphology-Material-Control co-design paradigms: (i) Reactive-Material Co-Design, which learns real-time stiffness tuning policies to guide programmable materials; and (ii) Invariant-Material Co-Design, which jointly optimizes morphology and fixed material fields to guide traditional material fabrication. Systematic experiments across diverse tasks demonstrate that continuous material optimization boosts performance and unlocks synergy across morphology, material, and control.

</details>


### [402] [State and Trajectory Estimation of Tensegrity Robots via Factor Graphs and Chebyshev Polynomials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08185)
*Edgar Granados,Patrick Meng,Charles Tang,Shrimed Sangani,William R. Johnson,Rebecca Kramer-Bottiglio,Kostas Bekris*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于因子图的两阶段方法，用于电缆驱动张拉整体机器人的鲁棒状态/轨迹估计，融合RGB-D相机和电缆长度传感器数据


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 张拉整体机器人具有柔顺性和适应性，但其非线性、欠约束动力学使得状态估计具有挑战性。可靠的连续时间状态估计对于闭环控制、系统辨识和机器学习至关重要，而传统方法往往无法满足需求

Method: 提出两阶段方法：1) 基于因子图的在线状态估计，融合RGB-D相机和电缆长度传感器数据；2) 使用马氏距离聚类算法处理噪声，以及切比雪夫多项式方法估计最可能速度和中间状态

Result: 与基于ICP的算法相比，该方法在仿真和真实数据上表现良好，能够为复杂的张拉整体机器人运动提供高保真度的连续时间状态和轨迹估计

Conclusion: 该方法首次将因子图应用于张拉整体机器人领域，利用机器人结构特性提供有效的传感器融合解决方案，能够处理实际中的非线性问题

Abstract: Tensegrity robots offer compliance and adaptability, but their nonlinear, and underconstrained dynamics make state estimation challenging. Reliable continuous-time estimation of all rigid links is crucial for closed-loop control, system identification, and machine learning; however, conventional methods often fall short. This paper proposes a two-stage approach for robust state or trajectory estimation (i.e., filtering or smoothing) of a cable-driven tensegrity robot. For online state estimation, this work introduces a factor-graph-based method, which fuses measurements from an RGB-D camera with on-board cable length sensors. To the best of the authors' knowledge, this is the first application of factor graphs in this domain. Factor graphs are a natural choice, as they exploit the robot's structural properties and provide effective sensor fusion solutions capable of handling nonlinearities in practice. Both the Mahalanobis distance-based clustering algorithm, used to handle noise, and the Chebyshev polynomial method, used to estimate the most probable velocities and intermediate states, are shown to perform well on simulated and real-world data, compared to an ICP-based algorithm. Results show that the approach provides high fidelity, continuous-time state and trajectory estimates for complex tensegrity robot motions.

</details>


### [403] [ViVa: A Video-Generative Value Model for Robot Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08168)
*Jindi Lv,Hao Li,Jie Li,Yifei Nie,Fankun Kong,Yang Wang,Xiaofeng Wang,Zheng Zhu,Chaojun Ni,Qiuping Deng,Hengtao Li,Jiancheng Lv,Guan Huang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ViVa：基于视频生成模型的价值估计方法，通过预测未来本体感知和标量价值，利用时空先验改进机器人长时程任务中的价值估计


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于视觉语言模型（VLMs）的价值模型难以捕捉时序动态，在长时程任务中价值估计不可靠，限制了视觉语言动作（VLA）模型在机器人操作中的实际部署

Method: 提出ViVa（视频生成价值模型），利用预训练视频生成器进行价值估计。输入当前观测和机器人本体感知，联合预测未来本体感知和当前状态标量价值，通过视频生成器的时空先验将价值估计建立在预期的具身动态上

Result: 在真实世界盒子组装任务中，ViVa集成到RECAP框架带来显著改进。定性分析显示ViVa产生更可靠的价值信号，准确反映任务进度，并能泛化到新物体

Conclusion: 视频生成模型通过其时空先验为价值估计提供了有前景的途径，ViVa展示了将视频生成能力转化为可靠价值估计的有效性，推动了VLA模型在机器人操作中的实际应用

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have advanced robot manipulation through large-scale pretraining, but real-world deployment remains challenging due to partial observability and delayed feedback. Reinforcement learning addresses this via value functions, which assess task progress and guide policy improvement. However, existing value models built on vision-language models (VLMs) struggle to capture temporal dynamics, undermining reliable value estimation in long-horizon tasks. In this paper, we propose ViVa, a video-generative value model that repurposes a pretrained video generator for value estimation. Taking the current observation and robot proprioception as input, ViVa jointly predicts future proprioception and a scalar value for the current state. By leveraging the spatiotemporal priors of a pretrained video generator, our approach grounds value estimation in anticipated embodiment dynamics, moving beyond static snapshots to intrinsically couple value with foresight. Integrated into RECAP, ViVa delivers substantial improvements on real-world box assembly. Qualitative analysis across all three tasks confirms that ViVa produces more reliable value signals, accurately reflecting task progress. By leveraging spatiotemporal priors from video corpora, ViVa also generalizes to novel objects, highlighting the promise of video-generative models for value estimation.

</details>


### [404] [Governed Capability Evolution for Embodied Agents: Safe Upgrade, Compatibility Checking, and Runtime Rollback for Embodied Capability Modules](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08059)
*Xue Qin,Simin Luan,John See,Cong Yang,Zhijun Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种面向具身智能体的生命周期感知升级框架，通过四类兼容性检查和分阶段运行时管道，在保持任务成功率的同时实现零不安全激活，解决了能力模块演化后的安全部署问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 具身智能体需要持续更新其可执行能力而非重写整个系统，但现有研究分别关注模块化能力打包、能力演化和运行时治理，而缺乏对能力模块演化后如何安全部署的系统性解决方案。关键问题在于：当能力模块演化出新版本时，如何在不违反策略约束、执行假设或恢复保证的情况下安全部署。

Method: 提出生命周期感知升级框架，将每个新能力版本视为受治理的部署候选而非立即可执行替换。引入四种升级兼容性检查（接口、策略、行为、恢复），并组织为分阶段运行时管道：候选验证、沙盒评估、影子部署、门控激活、在线监控和回滚。

Result: 在6轮能力升级、15个随机种子的评估中：朴素升级达到72.9%任务成功率，但最终轮次不安全激活率达60%；治理升级保持可比成功率（67.4%）的同时，所有轮次均维持零不安全激活（Wilcoxon p=0.003）。影子部署揭示了40%仅靠沙盒评估无法发现的回归问题，回滚在79.8%的激活后漂移场景中成功。

Conclusion: 将治理能力演化确立为具身智能体的首要系统问题，提出的生命周期感知升级框架通过系统化兼容性检查和分阶段部署管道，在保持功能有效性的同时确保安全约束，为具身智能体的持续演化提供了可靠基础架构。

Abstract: Embodied agents are increasingly expected to improve over time by updating their executable capabilities rather than rewriting the agent itself. Prior work has separately studied modular capability packaging, capability evolution, and runtime governance. However, a key systems problem remains underexplored: once an embodied capability module evolves into a new version, how can the hosting system deploy it safely without breaking policy constraints, execution assumptions, or recovery guarantees?
  We formulate governed capability evolution as a first-class systems problem for embodied agents. We propose a lifecycle-aware upgrade framework in which every new capability version is treated as a governed deployment candidate rather than an immediately executable replacement. The framework introduces four upgrade compatibility checks -- interface, policy, behavioral, and recovery -- and organizes them into a staged runtime pipeline comprising candidate validation, sandbox evaluation, shadow deployment, gated activation, online monitoring, and rollback.
  We evaluate over 6 rounds of capability upgrade with 15 random seeds. Naive upgrade achieves 72.9% task success but drives unsafe activation to 60% by the final round; governed upgrade retains comparable success (67.4%) while maintaining zero unsafe activations across all rounds (Wilcoxon p=0.003). Shadow deployment reveals 40% of regressions invisible to sandbox evaluation alone, and rollback succeeds in 79.8% of post-activation drift scenarios.

</details>


### [405] [Open-Ended Instruction Realization with LLM-Enabled Multi-Planner Scheduling in Autonomous Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08031)
*Jiawei Liu,Xun Gong,Fen Fang,Muli Yang,Bohao Qu,Yunfeng Hu,Hong Chen,Xulei Yang,Qing Guo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于大语言模型的指令实现框架，将乘客开放式指令转化为控制信号，通过调度MPC运动规划器实现自动驾驶中的自然语言交互


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前人机交互研究忽视自动驾驶中乘客的操控需求，自然语言虽直观但难以将开放式指令转化为可解释、可追溯的控制信号

Method: 使用LLM解释指令，生成可执行脚本调度多个基于MPC的运动规划器，根据实时反馈将规划轨迹转化为控制信号，采用调度中心设计分离语义推理与车辆控制

Result: 框架显著提高任务完成率，降低LLM查询成本，安全合规性与专用AD方法相当，对LLM推理延迟有较高容忍度

Conclusion: 调度中心设计建立了从高层指令到低层动作的透明可追溯决策链，为解决自动驾驶中开放式指令实现问题提供了有效方案

Abstract: Most Human-Machine Interaction (HMI) research overlooks the maneuvering needs of passengers in autonomous driving (AD). Natural language offers an intuitive interface, yet translating passenger open-ended instructions into control signals, without sacrificing interpretability and traceability, remains a challenge. This study proposes an instruction-realization framework that leverages a large language model (LLM) to interpret instructions, generates executable scripts that schedule multiple model predictive control (MPC)-based motion planners based on real-time feedback, and converts planned trajectories into control signals. This scheduling-centric design decouples semantic reasoning from vehicle control at different timescales, establishing a transparent, traceable decision-making chain from high-level instructions to low-level actions. Due to the absence of high-fidelity evaluation tools, this study introduces a benchmark for open-ended instruction realization in a closed-loop setting. Comprehensive experiments reveal that the framework significantly improves task-completion rates over instruction-realization baselines, reduces LLM query costs, achieves safety and compliance on par with specialized AD approaches, and exhibits considerable tolerance to LLM inference latency. For more qualitative illustrations and a clearer understanding.

</details>


### [406] [AgiPIX: Bridging Simulation and Reality in Indoor Aerial Inspection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08009)
*Sasanka Kuruppu Arachchige,Juan Jose Garcia,Changda Tian,Lauri Suomela,Panos Trahanias,Adriana Tapus,Joni-Kristian Kämäräinen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Agipix是一个用于室内自主飞行和关键资产检测的开源软硬件平台，具有紧凑的主动感知设计、容器化ROS 2自主堆栈和逼真数字孪生，支持仿真与真实环境间的零样本迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前缺乏一个紧凑、主动感知、开源且能在仿真和真实世界操作中可复现的平台，以解决室内自主飞行在感知、规划、控制和学习方面的挑战。

Method: 开发了Agipix平台，包含：1) 紧凑的硬件同步主动感知平台，具备板载GPU加速计算能力；2) 基于ROS 2的容器化模块化自主堆栈；3) 硬件平台的逼真数字孪生和可靠UI。这些组件支持容器化自主组件在仿真和真实飞行间的零样本迁移。

Result: 在工业室内环境中展示了使用板载传感器的轨迹跟踪和探索性能。所有硬件设计、仿真资产和容器化软件均已开源发布并附带文档。

Conclusion: Agipix填补了室内自主飞行平台的空白，通过软硬件协同设计和开源发布，为关键资产检测研究提供了可复现、可快速迭代的平台，支持仿真到真实环境的无缝迁移。

Abstract: Autonomous indoor flight for critical asset inspection presents fundamental challenges in perception, planning, control, and learning. Despite rapid progress, there is still a lack of a compact, active-sensing, open-source platform that is reproducible across simulation and real-world operation. To address this gap, we present Agipix, a co-designed open hardware and software platform for indoor aerial autonomy and critical asset inspection. Agipix features a compact, hardware-synchronized active-sensing platform with onboard GPU-accelerated compute that is capable of agile flight; a containerized ROS~2-based modular autonomy stack; and a photorealistic digital twin of the hardware platform together with a reliable UI. These elements enable rapid iteration via zero-shot transfer of containerized autonomy components between simulation and real flights. We demonstrate trajectory tracking and exploration performance using onboard sensing in industrial indoor environments. All hardware designs, simulation assets, and containerized software are released openly together with documentation.

</details>


### [407] [HEX: Humanoid-Aligned Experts for Cross-Embodiment Whole-Body Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07993)
*Shuanghao Bai,Meng Li,Xinyuan Lv,Jiawei Wang,Xinhua Wang,Fei Liao,Chengkai Hou,Langzhe Gu,Wanqi Zhou,Kun Wu,Ziluo Ding,Zhiyuan Xu,Lei Sun,Shanghang Zhang,Zhengping Che,Jian Tang,Badong Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HEX是一个用于双足人形机器人协调操作的状态中心框架，通过统一状态表示、专家混合本体感知预测器和轻量历史标记等技术实现高效的全身体控制


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类通过协调的全身体控制实现复杂操作，而大多数视觉-语言-动作模型将机器人身体部位独立处理，导致高自由度人形机器人控制困难且不稳定

Method: 1) 引入人形对齐的通用状态表示用于跨异构体现的可扩展学习；2) 使用专家混合统一本体感知预测器从大规模多体现轨迹数据建模全身体协调和时序运动动态；3) 采用轻量历史标记总结过去观察避免推理时重复编码历史图像；4) 使用残差门控融合机制和流匹配动作头自适应整合视觉-语言线索与本体感知动态

Result: 在真实世界人形机器人操作任务中，HEX在任务成功率和泛化能力方面达到最先进性能，特别是在快速反应和长视野场景中表现优异

Conclusion: HEX框架通过状态中心设计、协调建模和高效历史处理，成功解决了高自由度人形机器人协调操作的关键挑战，为实现复杂人形机器人控制提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: Humans achieve complex manipulation through coordinated whole-body control, whereas most Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models treat robot body parts largely independently, making high-DoF humanoid control challenging and often unstable. We present HEX, a state-centric framework for coordinated manipulation on full-sized bipedal humanoid robots. HEX introduces a humanoid-aligned universal state representation for scalable learning across heterogeneous embodiments, and incorporates a Mixture-of-Experts Unified Proprioceptive Predictor to model whole-body coordination and temporal motion dynamics from large-scale multi-embodiment trajectory data. To efficiently capture temporal visual context, HEX uses lightweight history tokens to summarize past observations, avoiding repeated encoding of historical images during inference. It further employs a residual-gated fusion mechanism with a flow-matching action head to adaptively integrate visual-language cues with proprioceptive dynamics for action generation. Experiments on real-world humanoid manipulation tasks show that HEX achieves state-of-the-art performance in task success rate and generalization, particularly in fast-reaction and long-horizon scenarios.

</details>
