Method: 基于观察发现主要LLM API具有共同的语义核心，提出LLM-Rosetta框架：1）采用中心辐射式中间表示（IR），包含9种类型的内容模型和10种类型的流事件模式；2）模块化Ops组合转换器架构，每个API标准可独立添加；3）支持请求和响应负载的双向转换（提供商到IR到提供商），包括具有状态上下文管理的块级流处理。

Result: 实现了四个API标准的转换器（OpenAI Chat Completions、OpenAI Responses、Anthropic Messages、Google GenAI），覆盖大多数商业提供商。经验评估显示：无损往返保真度、正确的流行为、低于100微秒的转换开销（与LiteLLM的单向方法竞争），同时提供双向性和提供商中立性。通过Open Responses合规套件测试，已在阿贡国家实验室生产环境部署。

Conclusion: LLM-Rosetta通过捕获LLM API共享语义核心的中间表示，解决了供应商锁定和生态系统碎片化问题，实现了高效、无损的API互操作性，为多提供商架构提供了可行解决方案。

Abstract: The rapid proliferation of Large Language Model (LLM) providers--each exposing proprietary API formats--has created a fragmented ecosystem where applications become tightly coupled to individual vendors. Switching or bridging providers requires $O(N^2)$ bilateral adapters, impeding portability and multi-provider architectures. We observe that despite substantial syntactic divergence, the major LLM APIs share a common semantic core: the practical challenge is the combinatorial surface of syntactic variations, not deep semantic incompatibility. Based on this finding, we present LLM-Rosetta, an open-source translation framework built on a hub-and-spoke Intermediate Representation (IR) that captures the shared semantic core--messages, content parts, tool calls, reasoning traces, and generation controls--in a 9-type content model and 10-type stream event schema. A modular Ops-composition converter architecture enables each API standard to be added independently. LLM-Rosetta supports bidirectional conversion (provider-to-IR-to-provider) for both request and response payloads, including chunk-level streaming with stateful context management. We implement converters for four API standards (OpenAI Chat Completions, OpenAI Responses, Anthropic Messages, and Google GenAI), covering the vast majority of commercial providers. Empirical evaluation demonstrates lossless round-trip fidelity, correct streaming behavior, and sub-100 microsecond conversion overhead--competitive with LiteLLM's single-pass approach while providing bidirectionality and provider neutrality. LLM-Rosetta passes the Open Responses compliance suite and is deployed in production at Argonne National Laboratory. Code is available at https://github.com/Oaklight/llm-rosetta.

</details>


### [676] [DeepGuard: Secure Code Generation via Multi-Layer Semantic Aggregation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09089)
*Li Huang,Zhongxin Liu,Yifan Wu,Tao Yin,Dong Li,Jichao Bi,Nankun Mu,Hongyu Zhang,Meng Yan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: DeepGuard通过聚合多层表征来缓解代码生成LLMs的安全漏洞，相比仅使用最终层的方法提升11.9%的安全正确生成率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码生成LLMs安全加固方法通常基于最终transformer层进行监督微调，但存在"最终层瓶颈"问题：漏洞判别线索可能分布在多个层中，在接近输出层时变得难以检测

Method: 提出DeepGuard框架：1) 通过分层线性探测发现漏洞相关信号在中上层最明显；2) 使用基于注意力的模块聚合多个上层表征；3) 采用多目标训练平衡安全增强和功能正确性；4) 支持轻量级推理时引导策略

Result: 在5个代码LLMs上的实验表明，DeepGuard相比SVEN等基线平均提升11.9%的安全正确生成率，保持功能正确性，并能泛化到未见过的漏洞类型

Conclusion: 通过利用分布在多个层的安全相关线索，DeepGuard有效缓解了最终层瓶颈问题，显著提升了代码生成LLMs的安全性和正确性

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) for code generation can replicate insecure patterns from their training data. To mitigate this, a common strategy for security hardening is to fine-tune models using supervision derived from the final transformer layer. However, this design may suffer from a final-layer bottleneck: vulnerability-discriminative cues can be distributed across layers and become less detectable near the output representations optimized for next-token prediction. To diagnose this issue, we perform layer-wise linear probing. We observe that vulnerability-related signals are most detectable in a band of intermediate-to-upper layers yet attenuate toward the final layers. Motivated by this observation, we introduce DeepGuard, a framework that leverages distributed security-relevant cues by aggregating representations from multiple upper layers via an attention-based module. The aggregated signal powers a dedicated security analyzer within a multi-objective training objective that balances security enhancement and functional correctness, and further supports a lightweight inference-time steering strategy. Extensive experiments across five code LLMs demonstrate that DeepGuard improves the secure-and-correct generation rate by an average of 11.9% over strong baselines such as SVEN. It also preserves functional correctness while exhibiting generalization to held-out vulnerability types. Our code is public at https://github.com/unknownhl/DeepGuard.

</details>


### [677] [Demystifying the Silence of Correctness Bugs in PyTorch Compiler](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08720)
*Meiziniu Li,Dongze Li,Jianmeng Liu,Shing-Chi Cheung*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文首次系统研究PyTorch编译器(torch.compile)的正确性bug，分析其特征，评估现有模糊测试工具效果，并提出专门检测此类bug的AlignGuard技术


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: torch.compile作为深度学习模型优化的核心工具，存在导致编译模型输出错误但不触发异常的正确性bug，对下游LLM应用可靠性构成严重威胁。PyTorch社区数据显示19.2%的高优先级问题属于此类bug，但目前缺乏系统性研究

Method: 1) 对torch.compile正确性bug进行首次实证研究，分析其特征；2) 评估现有模糊测试工具检测效果；3) 基于研究发现提出AlignGuard测试技术，结合经验总结的bug特征，应用基于LLM的测试变异来检测正确性bug

Result: 1) 发现torch.compile正确性bug的特定模式；2) 现有模糊测试工具检测效果有限；3) AlignGuard成功检测到23个新的正确性bug，全部被PyTorch开发团队确认或修复，其中14个被标记为高优先级bug

Conclusion: torch.compile存在严重的正确性bug问题，需要专门检测技术。AlignGuard基于实证研究发现的bug特征，结合LLM测试变异，能有效检测此类bug，为PyTorch编译器可靠性提供重要保障

Abstract: Performance optimization of AI infrastructure is key to the fast adoption of large language models (LLMs). The PyTorch compiler (torch.compile), a core optimization tool for deep learning (DL) models (including LLMs), has received due attention. However, torch.compile is prone to correctness bugs, which cause incorrect outputs of compiled DL models without triggering exceptions, crashes, or warnings. These bugs pose a serious threat to the reliability of downstream LLM applications. Data from the PyTorch community shows that 19.2% of high-priority issues are incorrect outputs of compiled DL models induced by torch.compile bugs, the second-most-common bug category (only behind program crashes at 19.57%). However, no systematic study has been conducted to specifically characterize and thereby detect these bugs. In this paper, we present the first empirical study of the correctness bugs in torch.compile, examine their characteristics, and assess the effectiveness of existing fuzzers in detecting them. Based on our findings, we propose a proof-of-concept testing technique named AlignGuard, tailored specifically for detecting correctness bugs in torch.compile. AlignGuard incorporates bug characteristics distilled from our empirical study, applying LLM-based test mutation to existing test cases for correctness bug detection. At the time of writing, AlignGuard has successfully detected 23 new correctness bugs in recent torch.compile. All these bugs have been confirmed or fixed by the PyTorch development team, and over half (14/23) of them are even marked as high-priority bugs, underscoring the usefulness of our technique.

</details>


### [678] [CIAO - Code In Architecture Out - Automated Software Architecture Documentation with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08293)
*Marco De Luca,Tiziano Santilli,Domenico Amalfitano,Anna Rita Fasolino,Patrizio Pelliccione*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: CIAO是一个基于LLM的自动化流程，能够从GitHub仓库直接生成符合标准模板的系统级架构文档，开发者评估认为其有价值、可理解且准确，生成成本低且快速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件架构文档对于系统理解至关重要，但往往不可用或不完整。现有的LLM技术通常只能处理局部代码片段，无法生成连贯的系统级架构描述，因此需要一种能够自动从完整代码库生成系统级架构文档的方法。

Method: 提出了CIAO（Code In Architecture Out）流程，这是一个基于LLM的结构化工作流，以GitHub仓库为输入，按照从ISO/IEC/IEEE 42010、SEI Views & Beyond和C4模型派生的模板生成系统级架构文档。生成的文档可直接添加到目标仓库中。

Result: 通过22名开发者的评估研究，开发者普遍认为生成的文档有价值、可理解且与源代码基本准确。但也指出了图表质量、高层上下文建模和部署视图方面的局限性。操作成本评估显示，生成完整架构文档仅需几分钟且成本低廉。

Conclusion: 结构化、面向标准的方法能够有效指导LLM生成既可用又成本效益高的系统级架构文档。CIAO流程展示了自动化生成架构文档的可行性，为软件工程实践提供了有价值的工具。

Abstract: Software architecture documentation is essential for system comprehension, yet it is often unavailable or incomplete. While recent LLM-based techniques can generate documentation from code, they typically address local artifacts rather than producing coherent, system-level architectural descriptions. This paper presents a structured process for automatically generating system-level architectural documentation directly from GitHub repositories using Large Language Models. The process, called CIAO (Code In Architecture Out), defines an LLM-based workflow that takes a repository as input and produces system-level architectural documentation following a template derived from ISO/IEC/IEEE 42010, SEI Views \& Beyond, and the C4 model. The resulting documentation can be directly added to the target repository. We evaluated the process through a study with 22 developers, each reviewing the documentation generated for a repository they had contributed to. The evaluation shows that developers generally perceive the produced documentation as valuable, comprehensible, and broadly accurate with respect to the source code, while also highlighting limitations in diagram quality, high-level context modeling, and deployment views. We also assessed the operational cost of the process, finding that generating a complete architectural document requires only a few minutes and is inexpensive to run. Overall, the results indicate that a structured, standards-oriented approach can effectively guide LLMs in producing system-level architectural documentation that is both usable and cost-effective.

</details>


### [679] [Towards Counterfactual Explanation and Assertion Inference for CPS Debugging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07679)
*Zaid Ghazal,Hadiza Yusuf,Khouloud Gaaloul*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: DeCaF是一个用于CPS调试的反事实引导解释和基于断言的表征框架，通过生成最小、必要且充分的输入信号反事实变化来将失败测试转为通过，并推断可解释的断言。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CPS调试技术虽然能定位异常到特定模型组件，但无法提供触发违规的输入信号值和时序条件信息，也无法确定能防止失败的最小精确时间变化。需要一种能解释失败原因并提供修复指导的方法。

Method: DeCaF框架结合三种反事实生成器（KD-Tree最近邻、遗传算法等）与两种因果模型（M5模型树、随机森林），生成将失败测试转为通过的最小必要输入信号变化，然后推断作为逻辑谓词的断言来泛化恢复条件。

Result: 在三个CPS案例研究中，KD-Tree最近邻与M5模型树组合获得最佳成功率，而遗传算法与随机森林组合在成功率和因果精度之间提供最强平衡。

Conclusion: DeCaF框架能够为CPS调试提供反事实引导的解释和基于断言的表征，帮助工程师理解失败原因和修复条件，无需访问内部模型细节。

Abstract: Verification and validation of cyber-physical systems (CPS) via large-scale simulation often surface failures that are hard to interpret, especially when triggered by interactions between continuous and discrete behaviors at specific events or times. Existing debugging techniques can localize anomalies to specific model components, but they provide little insight into the input-signal values and timing conditions that trigger violations, or the minimal, precisely timed changes that could have prevented the failure. In this article, we introduce DeCaF, a counterfactual-guided explanation and assertion-based characterization framework for CPS debugging. Given a failing test input, DeCaF generates counterfactual changes to the input signals that transform the test from failing to passing. These changes are designed to be minimal, necessary, and sufficient to precisely restore correctness. Then, it infers assertions as logical predicates over inputs that generalize recovery conditions in an interpretable form engineers can reason about, without requiring access to internal model details. Our approach combines three counterfactual generators with two causal models, and infers success assertions. Across three CPS case studies, DeCaF achieves its best success rate with KD-Tree Nearest Neighbors combined with M5 model tree, while Genetic Algorithm combined with Random Forest provides the strongest balance between success and causal precision.

</details>


### [680] [MVOS_HSI: A Python Library for Preprocessing Agricultural Crop Hyperspectral Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07656)
*Rishik Aggarwal,Krisha Joshi,Pappu Kumar Yadav,Jianwei Qin,Thomas F. Burks,Moon S. Kim*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MVOS_HSI是一个开源Python库，为叶片级高光谱成像数据提供端到端处理流程，解决植物表型研究中数据处理的标准化和可重复性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高光谱成像技术能够无损检测植物性状，但数据处理通常依赖于实验室特定的MATLAB或Python脚本，导致工作流程难以共享、结果难以重复。需要统一的工具来标准化处理流程。

Method: 开发了MVOS_HSI开源Python库，提供从原始ENVI文件校准到基于多种植被指数（NDVI、CIRedEdge和GCI）检测和裁剪单个叶片的完整处理流程。包含数据增强工具用于机器学习训练，以及光谱剖面可视化工具。

Result: MVOS_HSI可作为可导入的Python库或命令行工具使用，代码和文档已在GitHub上开源。该工具整合了高光谱数据处理中的常见任务。

Conclusion: 通过将常见任务整合到单一软件包中，MVOS_HSI帮助研究人员在植物表型研究中产生一致且可重复的结果，促进了高光谱数据处理流程的标准化。

Abstract: Hyperspectral imaging (HSI) allows researchers to study plant traits non-destructively. By capturing hundreds of narrow spectral bands per pixel, it reveals details about plant biochemistry and stress that standard cameras miss. However, processing this data is often challenging. Many labs still rely on loosely organized collections of lab-specific MATLAB or Python scripts, which makes workflows difficult to share and results difficult to reproduce. MVOS_HSI is an open-source Python library that provides an end-to-end workflow for processing leaf-level HSI data. The software handles everything from calibrating raw ENVI files to detecting and clipping individual leaves based on multiple vegetation indices (NDVI, CIRedEdge and GCI). It also includes tools for data augmentation to create training-time variations for machine learning and utilities to visualize spectral profiles. MVOS_HSI can be used as an importable Python library or run directly from the command line. The code and documentation are available on GitHub. By consolidating these common tasks into a single package, MVOS_HSI helps researchers produce consistent and reproducible results in plant phenotyping

</details>


### [681] [MIMIC-Py: An Extensible Tool for Personality-Driven Automated Game Testing with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07752)
*Yifei Chen,Sarra Habchi,Lili Wei*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: MIMIC-Py是一个基于Python的自动化游戏测试工具，将基于人格的LLM智能体转化为可重用、可扩展的框架，支持通过API或代码合成与游戏交互，降低新游戏环境部署成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代视频游戏是复杂、非确定性的系统，难以进行大规模自动化测试。现有基于人格的LLM智能体工具大多是研究原型，缺乏跨游戏可重用性，需要将研究原型转化为实用的自动化游戏测试工具。

Method: MIMIC-Py采用模块化架构，将规划、执行和记忆与游戏特定逻辑解耦，将人格特质作为可配置输入，支持多种交互机制（通过暴露的API或合成代码），实现最小工程努力下的新游戏环境部署。

Result: 开发了MIMIC-Py工具，提供了源代码和演示视频，实现了从研究原型到实用自动化游戏测试工具的桥梁，支持跨游戏重用和扩展。

Conclusion: MIMIC-Py通过将基于人格的LLM智能体转化为可重用框架，解决了现有游戏测试工具缺乏跨游戏可重用性的问题，为自动化游戏测试提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Modern video games are complex, non-deterministic systems that are difficult to test automatically at scale. Although prior work shows that personality-driven Large Language Model (LLM) agents can improve behavioural diversity and test coverage, existing tools largely remain research prototypes and lack cross-game reusability.
  This tool paper presents MIMIC-Py, a Python-based automated game-testing tool that transforms personality-driven LLM agents into a reusable and extensible framework. MIMIC-Py exposes personality traits as configurable inputs and adopts a modular architecture that decouples planning, execution, and memory from game-specific logic. It supports multiple interaction mechanisms, enabling agents to interact with games via exposed APIs or synthesized code. We describe the design of MIMIC-Py and show how it enables deployment to new game environments with minimal engineering effort, bridging the gap between research prototypes and practical automated game testing.
  The source code and a demo video are available on our project webpage: https://mimic-persona.github.io/MIMIC-Py-Home-Page/.

</details>


### [682] [ReCodeAgent: A Multi-Agent Workflow for Language-agnostic Translation and Validation of Large-scale Repositories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07341)
*Ali Reza Ibrahimzada,Brandon Paulsen,Daniel Kroening,Reyhaneh Jabbarvand*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ReCodeAgent：首个完全自主的多智能体方法，用于语言无关的仓库级代码翻译和验证，支持多种编程语言对，相比现有技术显著提升翻译正确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仓库级代码翻译和验证技术通常只针对单一编程语言对，扩展新语言对需要大量工程工作。虽然编程智能体可以实现语言无关性，但现有技术尚未提供完全自主的智能体方法用于大规模程序的仓库级代码翻译和验证。

Method: 提出ReCodeAgent，一种自主的多智能体方法，用户只需提供源语言项目和目标语言，系统就能自动翻译和验证整个仓库。这是首个实现跨多种编程语言高翻译成功率的技术。

Result: 在118个真实项目（平均1975行代码、43个翻译单元）上评估，涵盖6种编程语言和4种语言对。ReCodeAgent在翻译正确性上持续优于现有技术，在真实测试上的通过率提高了60.8%，平均成本15.3美元。多智能体架构相比单智能体使测试通过率下降40.4%，轨迹长度增加28%。

Conclusion: ReCodeAgent是首个完全自主的多智能体方法，成功实现了语言无关的仓库级代码翻译和验证，显著提升了翻译正确性和效率，多智能体架构设计对性能有重要影响。

Abstract: Most repository-level code translation and validation techniques have been evaluated on a single source-target programming language (PL) pair, owing to the complex engineering effort required to adapt new PL pairs. Programming agents can enable PL-agnosticism in repository-level code translation and validation: they can synthesize code across many PLs and autonomously use existing tools specific to each PL's analysis. However, state-of-the-art has yet to offer a fully autonomous agentic approach for repository-level code translation and validation of large-scale programs. This paper proposes ReCodeAgent, an autonomous multi-agent approach for language-agnostic repository-level code translation and validation. Users only need to provide the project in the source PL and specify the target PL for ReCodeAgent to automatically translate and validate the entire repository. ReCodeAgent is the first technique to achieve high translation success rates across many PLs.
  We compare the effectiveness of ReCodeAgent with four alternative neuro-symbolic and agentic approaches to translate 118 real-world projects, with 1,975 LoC and 43 translation units for each project, on average. The projects cover 6 PLs (C, Go, Java, JavaScript, Python, and Rust) and 4 PL pairs (C-Rust, Go-Rust, Java-Python, Python-JavaScript). Our results demonstrate that ReCodeAgent consistently outperforms prior techniques on translation correctness, improving test pass rate by 60.8% on ground-truth tests, with an average cost of $15.3. We also perform process-centric analysis of ReCodeAgent trajectories to confirm its procedural efficiency. Finally, we investigate how the design choices (a multi-agent vs. single-agent architecture) influence ReCodeAgent performance: on average, the test pass rate drops by 40.4%, and trajectories become 28% longer and persistently inefficient.

</details>


<div id='cs.CR'></div>

# cs.CR [[Back]](#toc)

### [683] [XFED: Non-Collusive Model Poisoning Attack Against Byzantine-Robust Federated Classifiers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09489)
*Israt Jahan Mouri,Muhammad Ridowan,Muhammad Abdullah Adnan*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了首个无需攻击者间通信的非共谋模型投毒攻击XFED，在联邦学习中实现了有效的攻击效果，并能绕过多种现有防御机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦学习模型投毒攻击大多依赖攻击者间的共谋协调，这在实际部署中成本高且易被检测。本文旨在探索无需攻击者间通信的非共谋攻击模型是否可行，以揭示联邦学习系统更真实的安全威胁。

Method: 提出并形式化了非共谋攻击模型，其中所有被攻陷的客户端共享共同的对抗目标但独立操作。在此基础上设计了XFED攻击方法，该方法无需攻击者间通信、无需访问其他客户端更新、也不依赖服务器端防御知识，是一种与聚合方法无关的非共谋模型投毒攻击。

Result: 在六个基准数据集上的实验评估表明，XFED能够绕过八种最先进的防御机制，并且在性能上优于六种现有的模型投毒攻击方法。

Conclusion: 研究结果表明联邦学习系统的安全性比先前认为的要脆弱得多，非共谋攻击模型具有实际可行性，这凸显了开发更鲁棒和实用防御机制的紧迫需求。

Abstract: Model poisoning attacks pose a significant security threat to Federated Learning (FL). Most existing model poisoning attacks rely on collusion, requiring adversarial clients to coordinate by exchanging local benign models and synchronizing the generation of their poisoned updates. However, sustaining such coordination is increasingly impractical in real-world FL deployments, as it effectively requires botnet-like control over many devices. This approach is costly to maintain and highly vulnerable to detection. This context raises a fundamental question: Can model poisoning attacks remain effective without any communication between attackers? To address this challenge, we introduce and formalize the \textbf{non-collusive attack model}, in which all compromised clients share a common adversarial objective but operate independently. Under this model, each attacker generates its malicious update without communicating with other adversaries, accessing other clients' updates, or relying on any knowledge of server-side defenses. To demonstrate the feasibility of this threat model, we propose \textbf{XFED}, the first aggregation-agnostic, non-collusive model poisoning attack. Our empirical evaluation across six benchmark datasets shows that XFED bypasses eight state-of-the-art defenses and outperforms six existing model poisoning attacks. These findings indicate that FL systems are substantially less secure than previously believed and underscore the urgent need for more robust and practical defense mechanisms.

</details>


### [684] [CLIP-Inspector: Model-Level Backdoor Detection for Prompt-Tuned CLIP via OOD Trigger Inversion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09101)
*Akshit Jindal,Saket Anand,Chetan Arora,Vikram Goyal*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: CLIP-Inspector (CI) 是一种针对提示调优CLIP模型的后门检测方法，能够在白盒访问和少量未标记OOD图像下重建潜在触发器，实现94%的检测准确率，并能通过微调修复后门。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着组织将模型训练外包给MLaaS提供商，恶意提供商可能在遵循提示调优协议的同时植入后门，使触发输入被分类到攻击者选择的类别。现有方法无法检测这种仅修改提示而不改变编码器的后门，需要模型级别的验证方案。

Method: CLIP-Inspector (CI) 假设白盒访问交付模型和未标记OOD图像池，通过重建每个类别的可能触发器来检测后门行为。方法使用少量OOD图像（仅1000张）在单个epoch内重建有效触发器。

Result: 在10个数据集和4种后门攻击的广泛实验中，CI实现了94%的检测准确率（50个模型中检测出47个）。相比适应的触发器反转基线，CI获得显著更高的AUROC分数（0.973 vs 0.495/0.687）。

Conclusion: CLIP-Inspector能够有效检测提示调优CLIP模型中的后门，并通过使用重建触发器在正确标记的触发输入上进行微调来修复模型，确保安全部署。

Abstract: Organisations with limited data and computational resources increasingly outsource model training to Machine Learning as a Service (MLaaS) providers, who adapt vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP to downstream tasks via prompt tuning rather than training from scratch. This semi-honest setting creates a security risk where a malicious provider can follow the prompt-tuning protocol yet implant a backdoor, forcing triggered inputs to be classified into an attacker-chosen class, even for out-of-distribution (OOD) data. Such backdoors leave encoders untouched, making them undetectable to existing methods that focus on encoder corruption. Other data-level methods that sanitize data before training or during inference, also fail to answer the critical question, "Is the delivered model backdoored or not?" To address this model-level verification problem, we introduce CLIP-Inspector (CI), a backdoor detection method designed for prompt-tuned CLIP models. Assuming white-box access to the delivered model and a pool of unlabeled OOD images, CI reconstructs possible triggers for each class to determine if the model exhibits backdoor behaviour or not. Additionally, we demonstrate that using CI's reconstructed trigger for fine-tuning on correctly labeled triggered inputs enables us to re-align the model and reduce backdoor effectiveness. Through extensive experiments across ten datasets and four backdoor attacks, we demonstrate that CI can reconstruct effective triggers in a single epoch using only 1,000 OOD images, achieving a 94% detection accuracy (47/50 models). Compared to adapted trigger-inversion baselines, CI yields a markedly higher AUROC score (0.973 vs 0.495/0.687), thus enabling the vetting and post-hoc repair of prompt-tuned CLIP models to ensure safe deployment.

</details>


### [685] [PIArena: A Platform for Prompt Injection Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08499)
*Runpeng Geng,Chenlong Yin,Yanting Wang,Ying Chen,Jinyuan Jia*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: PIArena是一个统一的、可扩展的提示注入评估平台，用于解决当前缺乏统一评估框架的问题，通过该平台发现现有防御方法存在泛化性差、易受自适应攻击等关键局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前社区面临关键缺口：缺乏统一的提示注入评估平台，导致难以可靠比较防御方法、理解其真实鲁棒性以及评估跨任务和基准的泛化能力。许多最初报告有效的防御方法后来被发现在不同数据集和攻击下鲁棒性有限。

Method: 引入PIArena统一可扩展平台，支持用户轻松集成最先进的攻击和防御方法，并在各种现有和新基准上进行评估。同时设计了基于动态策略的自适应攻击，根据防御反馈优化注入提示。

Result: 通过PIArena的综合评估，揭示了最先进防御方法的关键局限性：跨任务泛化能力有限、易受自适应攻击、以及当注入任务与目标任务对齐时的根本性挑战。

Conclusion: PIArena填补了提示注入评估的关键空白，为社区提供了统一的评估框架，揭示了现有防御方法的实质性局限性，并强调了开发更鲁棒防御方法的必要性。

Abstract: Prompt injection attacks pose serious security risks across a wide range of real-world applications. While receiving increasing attention, the community faces a critical gap: the lack of a unified platform for prompt injection evaluation. This makes it challenging to reliably compare defenses, understand their true robustness under diverse attacks, or assess how well they generalize across tasks and benchmarks. For instance, many defenses initially reported as effective were later found to exhibit limited robustness on diverse datasets and attacks. To bridge this gap, we introduce PIArena, a unified and extensible platform for prompt injection evaluation that enables users to easily integrate state-of-the-art attacks and defenses and evaluate them across a variety of existing and new benchmarks. We also design a dynamic strategy-based attack that adaptively optimizes injected prompts based on defense feedback. Through comprehensive evaluation using PIArena, we uncover critical limitations of state-of-the-art defenses: limited generalizability across tasks, vulnerability to adaptive attacks, and fundamental challenges when an injected task aligns with the target task. The code and datasets are available at https://github.com/sleeepeer/PIArena.

</details>


### [686] [Retrieval Augmented Classification for Confidential Documents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08628)
*Yeseul E. Chang,Rahul Kailasa,Simon Shim,Byunghoon Oh,Jaewoo Lee*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出使用检索增强分类(RAC)进行机密文档分类，相比监督微调(FT)在类别不平衡和数据变化时表现更稳定，能减少参数级泄漏，支持即时数据更新。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实工作环境中文档流入流出频繁，需要持续更新知识。机密文档泄露问题需要低泄漏的鲁棒分类方法，传统监督微调在类别不平衡和数据变化时表现不稳定，且存在参数级泄漏风险。

Method: 提出检索增强分类(RAC)方法，通过外部向量存储进行相似性匹配来分类，保持敏感内容不进入模型权重。在WikiLeaks US Diplomacy语料上对比RAC和监督微调，控制类别不平衡和序列长度影响。

Result: 在平衡数据上，RAC与FT性能相当。在不平衡数据上，RAC更稳定：在原始(不平衡)和增强(平衡)集上均达到约96%准确率，F1最高94%；而FT在平衡集上F1为90%，在不平衡集上降至88%。RAC对标签偏斜不敏感，减少参数泄漏，支持即时数据更新。

Conclusion: 当鲁棒增强不可行时，RAC提供了一种实用、安全保护的强分类路径，保持敏感内容在用户控制下，在类别平衡、数据、上下文长度或治理要求变化时保持鲁棒性。RAC基于外部向量存储的决策机制使其对标签偏斜不敏感，减少泄漏风险，支持即时数据更新。

Abstract: Unauthorized disclosure of confidential documents demands robust, low-leakage classification. In real work environments, there is a lot of inflow and outflow of documents. To continuously update knowledge, we propose a methodology for classifying confidential documents using Retrieval Augmented Classification (RAC). To confirm this effectiveness, we compare RAC and supervised fine tuning (FT) on the WikiLeaks US Diplomacy corpus under realistic sequence-length constraints. On balanced data, RAC matches FT. On unbalanced data, RAC is more stable while delivering comparable performance--about 96% Accuracy on both the original (unbalanced) and augmented (balanced) sets, and up to 94% F1 with proper prompting--whereas FT attains 90% F1 trained on the augmented, balanced set but drops to 88% F1 trained on the original, unbalanced set. When robust augmentation is infeasible, RAC provides a practical, security-preserving path to strong classification by keeping sensitive content out of model weights and under your control, and it remains robust as real-world conditions change in class balance, data, context length, or governance requirements. Because RAC grounds decisions in an external vector store with similarity matching, it is less sensitive to label skew, reduces parameter-level leakage, and can incorporate new data immediately via reindexing--a difficult step for FT, which typically requires retraining. The contributions of this paper are threefold: first, a RAC-based classification pipeline and evaluation recipe; second, a controlled study that isolates class imbalance and context-length effects for FT versus RAC in confidential-document grading; and third, actionable guidance on RAC design patterns for governed deployments.

</details>


### [687] [Securing Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Taxonomy of Attacks, Defenses, and Future Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08304)
*Yuming Xu,Mingtao Zhang,Zhuohan Ge,Haoyang Li,Nicole Hu,Jason Chen Zhang,Qing Li,Lei Chen*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出RAG安全的核心在于外部知识访问管道的安全性，通过建立操作边界区分LLM固有缺陷与RAG引入/放大的威胁，将RAG工作流抽象为六个阶段，围绕三个信任边界和四个主要安全面组织文献，系统回顾攻击、防御、修复机制和评估基准，指出当前防御的局限性并展望未来方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 检索增强生成（RAG）显著增强了大语言模型（LLM）的能力，但通过外部知识访问引入了新的安全风险。现有研究虽然涵盖了各种RAG漏洞，但常常混淆了LLM固有风险与RAG专门引入的风险。本文认为安全的RAG从根本上关乎外部知识访问管道的安全性。

Method: 1. 建立操作边界以分离LLM固有缺陷与RAG引入或放大的威胁；2. 将RAG工作流抽象为六个阶段；3. 围绕三个信任边界和四个主要安全面组织文献：检索前知识污染、检索时访问操纵、下游上下文利用和知识外泄；4. 系统回顾相应的攻击、防御、修复机制和评估基准。

Result: 通过系统分析发现，当前防御措施在很大程度上仍然是反应性和碎片化的。现有研究未能提供跨整个知识访问生命周期的全面保护框架，防御机制缺乏主动性和系统性。

Conclusion: 本文揭示了RAG安全研究的重要空白，强调需要朝着跨整个知识访问生命周期的分层、边界感知保护方向发展。未来的研究应关注建立更系统、主动的防御机制，以应对RAG特有的安全挑战。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) significantly enhances large language models (LLMs) but introduces novel security risks through external knowledge access. While existing studies cover various RAG vulnerabilities, they often conflate inherent LLM risks with those specifically introduced by RAG. In this paper, we propose that secure RAG is fundamentally about the security of the external knowledge-access pipeline. We establish an operational boundary to separate inherent LLM flaws from RAG-introduced or RAG-amplified threats. Guided by this perspective, we abstract the RAG workflow into six stages and organize the literature around three trust boundaries and four primary security surfaces, including pre-retrieval knowledge corruption, retrieval-time access manipulation, downstream context exploitation, and knowledge exfiltration. By systematically reviewing the corresponding attacks, defenses, remediation mechanisms, and evaluation benchmarks, we reveal that current defenses remain largely reactive and fragmented. Finally, we discuss these gaps and highlight future directions toward layered, boundary-aware protection across the entire knowledge-access lifecycle.

</details>


### [688] [TADP-RME: A Trust-Adaptive Differential Privacy Framework for Enhancing Reliability of Data-Driven Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08113)
*Labani Halder,Payel Sadhukhan,Sarbani Palit*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: TADP-RME框架通过自适应隐私预算和反向流形嵌入，在异构用户信任环境下提升对抗性学习可靠性，相比固定隐私预算方法实现更好的隐私-效用权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有差分隐私方案依赖固定隐私预算，导致刚性隐私-效用权衡，无法适应异构用户信任水平；同时噪声差分隐私保留几何结构，易被推理攻击利用造成隐私泄露。

Method: 提出TADP-RME框架：1) 引入[0,1]范围的逆信任分数自适应调节隐私预算；2) 使用反向流形嵌入进行非线性变换，破坏局部几何关系同时通过后处理保持正式差分隐私保证。

Result: 理论分析和实验结果表明，该框架改善了隐私-效用权衡，将攻击成功率降低达3.1%且无显著效用损失，在对抗推理攻击方面持续优于现有方法。

Conclusion: TADP-RME为对抗性环境中的可靠学习提供了统一框架，通过自适应隐私预算调节和几何结构破坏，有效应对异构用户信任下的隐私保护挑战。

Abstract: Ensuring reliability in adversarial settings necessitates treating privacy as a foundational component of data-driven systems. While differential privacy and cryptographic protocols offer strong guarantees, existing schemes rely on a fixed privacy budget, leading to a rigid utility-privacy trade-off that fails under heterogeneous user trust. Moreover, noise-only differential privacy preserves geometric structure, which inference attacks exploit, causing privacy leakage.
  We propose TADP-RME (Trust-Adaptive Differential Privacy with Reverse Manifold Embedding), a framework that enhances reliability under varying levels of user trust. It introduces an inverse trust score in the range [0,1] to adaptively modulate the privacy budget, enabling smooth transitions between utility and privacy. Additionally, Reverse Manifold Embedding applies a nonlinear transformation to disrupt local geometric relationships while preserving formal differential privacy guarantees through post-processing.
  Theoretical and empirical results demonstrate improved privacy-utility trade-offs, reducing attack success rates by up to 3.1 percent without significant utility degradation. The framework consistently outperforms existing methods against inference attacks, providing a unified approach for reliable learning in adversarial environments.

</details>


### [689] [PrivFedTalk: Privacy-Aware Federated Diffusion with Identity-Stable Adapters for Personalized Talking-Head Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08037)
*Soumya Mazumdar,Vineet Kumar Rakesh,Tapas Samanta*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: PrivFedTalk：基于条件潜在扩散和参数高效身份适配的隐私感知联邦个性化说话头生成框架，通过身份稳定联邦聚合和时序去噪一致性正则化解决客户端异构分布和帧间漂移问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统说话头生成依赖集中式人脸视频和语音数据集，存在严重隐私问题，特别是对于个性化说话头生成，身份特定数据高度敏感且无法跨用户或设备共享。

Method: 结合条件潜在扩散与参数高效身份适配的联邦框架：共享扩散主干在客户端间训练，每个客户端从本地私有音视频数据学习轻量级LoRA身份适配器。引入身份稳定联邦聚合（ISFA）使用隐私安全标量可靠性信号加权客户端更新，以及时序去噪一致性（TDC）正则化减少帧间漂移和闪烁。采用安全聚合和客户端级差分隐私保护适配器更新。

Result: 在多种训练和聚合条件下与FedAvg、FedProx比较，PrivFedTalk显示出稳定的联邦优化和成功的端到端训练评估。支持低内存GPU执行和多GPU客户端并行训练，验证了联邦环境中隐私感知个性化说话头训练的可行性。

Conclusion: 该框架证明了在联邦环境中进行隐私感知个性化说话头训练的可行性，但指出需要进一步标准化评估来验证组件性能、隐私-效用权衡和定性声明。

Abstract: Talking-head generation has advanced rapidly with diffusion-based generative models, but training usually depends on centralized face-video and speech datasets, raising major privacy concerns. The problem is more acute for personalized talking-head generation, where identity-specific data are highly sensitive and often cannot be pooled across users or devices. PrivFedTalk is presented as a privacy-aware federated framework for personalized talking-head generation that combines conditional latent diffusion with parameter-efficient identity adaptation. A shared diffusion backbone is trained across clients, while each client learns lightweight LoRA identity adapters from local private audio-visual data, avoiding raw data sharing and reducing communication cost. To address heterogeneous client distributions, Identity-Stable Federated Aggregation (ISFA) weights client updates using privacy-safe scalar reliability signals computed from on-device identity consistency and temporal stability estimates. Temporal-Denoising Consistency (TDC) regularization is introduced to reduce inter-frame drift, flicker, and identity drift during federated denoising. To limit update-side privacy risk, secure aggregation and client-level differential privacy are applied to adapter updates. The implementation supports both low-memory GPU execution and multi-GPU client-parallel training on heterogeneous shared hardware. Comparative experiments on the present setup across multiple training and aggregation conditions with PrivFedTalk, FedAvg, and FedProx show stable federated optimization and successful end-to-end training and evaluation under constrained resources. The results support the feasibility of privacy-aware personalized talking-head training in federated environments, while suggesting that stronger component-wise, privacy-utility, and qualitative claims need further standardized evaluation.

</details>


### [690] [Semantic Intent Fragmentation: A Single-Shot Compositional Attack on Multi-Agent AI Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08608)
*Tanzim Ahad,Ismail Hossain,Md Jahangir Alam,Sai Puppala,Yoonpyo Lee,Syed Bahauddin Alam,Sajedul Talukder*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: SIF攻击利用LLM编排系统的分解机制，通过单个合法请求生成看似无害但整体违反安全策略的子任务组合，绕过现有安全检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM编排系统的安全机制主要在子任务层面运行，无法检测多个子任务组合后产生的策略违规。这种组合安全漏洞使得攻击者可以通过合法请求实现隐蔽攻击。

Method: 提出语义意图碎片化(SIF)攻击框架，利用四种机制：批量范围升级、静默数据外泄、嵌入式触发器部署和准标识符聚合。构建基于OWASP、MITRE ATLAS和NIST框架的三阶段红队管道，在14个企业场景中测试GPT-20B编排器。

Result: GPT-20B编排器在71%的场景(10/14)中生成违反策略的计划，而所有子任务单独看起来都无害。更强的编排器成功率更高。通过确定性污点分析、思维链评估和跨模型合规判断三种独立信号验证攻击有效性。

Conclusion: 组合安全漏洞可通过计划级信息流跟踪结合合规评估来检测和防御。研究证明当前子任务级安全机制存在不足，需要系统级的安全评估方法。

Abstract: We introduce Semantic Intent Fragmentation (SIF), an attack class against LLM orchestration systems where a single, legitimately phrased request causes an orchestrator to decompose a task into subtasks that are individually benign but jointly violate security policy. Current safety mechanisms operate at the subtask level, so each step clears existing classifiers -- the violation only emerges at the composed plan. SIF exploits OWASP LLM06:2025 through four mechanisms: bulk scope escalation, silent data exfiltration, embedded trigger deployment, and quasi-identifier aggregation, requiring no injected content, no system modification, and no attacker interaction after the initial request. We construct a three-stage red-teaming pipeline grounded in OWASP, MITRE ATLAS, and NIST frameworks to generate realistic enterprise scenarios. Across 14 scenarios spanning financial reporting, information security, and HR analytics, a GPT-20B orchestrator produces policy-violating plans in 71% of cases (10/14) while every subtask appears benign. Three independent signals validate this: deterministic taint analysis, chain-of-thought evaluation, and a cross-model compliance judge with 0% false positives. Stronger orchestrators increase SIF success rates. Plan-level information-flow tracking combined with compliance evaluation detects all attacks before execution, showing the compositional safety gap is closable.

</details>


<div id='cs.AR'></div>

# cs.AR [[Back]](#toc)

### [691] [DHFP-PE: Dual-Precision Hybrid Floating Point Processing Element for AI Acceleration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04507)
*Shubham Kumar,Vijay Pratap Sharma,Vaibhav Neema,Santosh Kumar Vishvakarma*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 提出一种支持FP8和FP4格式的双精度浮点MAC处理单元，采用创新的比特分区技术实现单4比特乘法器复用，在28nm工艺下实现高能效和面积优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人工智能和边缘计算中低精度算术的快速采用，对能效高且灵活的浮点乘累加单元产生了强烈需求。需要支持多种低精度格式（FP8和FP4）的MAC单元来满足低功耗、高吞吐量的AI工作负载需求。

Method: 采用创新的比特分区技术，使单个4比特单元乘法器能够作为标准4×4乘法器用于FP8运算，或作为两个并行2×2乘法器用于2比特操作数运算。这种设计实现了最大硬件利用率而无需重复逻辑。架构支持FP8（E4M3、E5M2）和FP4（2×E2M1、2×E1M2）格式，专门针对低功耗和高吞吐量AI工作负载优化。

Result: 在28nm工艺下实现，工作频率达1.94GHz，面积0.00396mm²，功耗2.13mW。与最先进设计相比，面积减少高达60.4%，功耗节省高达86.6%。该PE非常适合部署在大型加速器架构中，用于能源受限的AI推理和混合精度计算应用。

Conclusion: 提出的双精度浮点MAC处理单元通过创新的比特分区技术实现了硬件复用和高效能，在面积和功耗方面显著优于现有设计，为低功耗AI推理和混合精度计算提供了有效的硬件解决方案。

Abstract: The rapid adoption of low-precision arithmetic in artificial intelligence and edge computing has created a strong demand for energy-efficient and flexible floating-point multiply-accumulate (MAC) units. This paper presents a dual-precision floating-point MAC processing element supporting FP8 (E4M3, E5M2) and FP4 (2 x E2M1, 2 x E1M2) formats, specifically optimized for low-power and high-throughput AI workloads. The proposed architecture employs a novel bit-partitioning technique that enables a single 4-bit unit multiplier to operate either as a standard 4 x 4 multiplier for FP8 or as two parallel 2 x 2 multipliers for 2-bit operands, achieving maximum hardware utilization without duplicating logic. Implemented in 28 nm technology, the proposed PE achieves an operating frequency of 1.94 GHz with an area of 0.00396 mm^2 and power consumption of 2.13 mW, resulting in up to 60.4% area reduction and 86.6% power savings compared to state-of-the-art designs, making it well suited for energy-constrained AI inference and mixed-precision computing applications when deployed within larger accelerator architectures.

</details>


### [692] [From LLM to Silicon: RL-Driven ASIC Architecture Exploration for On-Device AI Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07526)
*Ravindra Ganti,Steve Xu*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 提出基于强化学习的编译器，联合优化ASIC架构、内存层次和工作负载划分，适用于3nm至28nm工艺节点的AI推理，使用SAC算法探索混合离散-连续动作空间，实现统一的PPA目标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统ASIC设计需要针对不同工艺节点进行手动调优，过程繁琐且难以实现跨节点的自动适配。需要一种能够联合优化架构、内存和任务划分的自动化方法，以适应不同工艺节点的AI推理需求。

Method: 将设计空间建模为单一马尔可夫决策过程，包含混合离散-连续动作。使用软演员-评论家算法配合专家混合门控机制，联合探索网格拓扑结构、每核微架构和算子放置策略。支持从3nm到28nm共7个工艺节点的自动适配。

Result: 在Llama 3.1 8B FP16工作负载上实现高性能模式（3nm节点达到29809 tokens/秒），在SmolVLM工作负载上实现低功耗模式（所有节点功耗低于13mW，频率10MHz）。RL自动调整网格大小和每瓦配置，包括异构FETCH、VLEN和内存分配，无需节点特定的手动重调。

Conclusion: 提出的RL驱动编译器能够有效联合优化ASIC架构、内存层次和工作负载划分，实现跨工艺节点的自动适配，在保持高性能的同时满足低功耗需求，为AI推理硬件设计提供了自动化解决方案。

Abstract: We present an RL-driven compiler that jointly optimizes ASIC architecture, memory hierarchy, and workload partitioning for AI inference across 3nm to 28nm. The design space is formulated as a single Markov Decision Process with mixed discrete-continuous actions and a unified Power-Performance-Area (PPA) objective. Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) with Mixture-of-Experts gating explores the joint space of mesh topology, per-core microarchitecture, and operator placement. We validate on two workloads, Llama 3.1 8B FP16 (high-performance mode, 29809 tokens per second at 3nm) and SmolVLM (low-power mode, less than 13 mW at all nodes, 10 MHz). Across 7 process nodes, the RL automatically adapts mesh sizes and per-tile configurations, including heterogeneous FETCH, VLEN, and memory allocation without node-specific manual retuning.

</details>


<div id='cs.SD'></div>

# cs.SD [[Back]](#toc)

### [693] [DDSP-QbE++: Improving Speech Quality for Speech Anonymisation for Atypical Speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09246)
*Suhita Ghosh,Yamini Sinha,Sebastian Stober*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出两种改进DDSP-QbE语音转换中激励信号的方法：1) 引入显式浊音检测，在清音区域用滤波噪声替代谐波激励；2) 应用PolyBLEP校正相位累积振荡器，消除波形不连续导致的混叠伪影。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DDSP-QbE语音转换系统使用相位累积产生激励信号，其锯齿状波形的不连续性会引入混叠伪影，表现为听觉上的"嗡嗡声"和频谱失真，特别是在较高基频时更为明显。

Method: 1) 集成显式浊音检测，在清音区域门控谐波激励，用滤波噪声替代周期性成分；2) 对相位累积振荡器应用多项式带限阶跃(PolyBLEP)校正，用平滑多项式残差替代相位回绕处的硬波形不连续性。

Result: 改进后的方法产生了更干净的谐波滚降、减少了高频伪影，并通过MOS评分验证了感知自然度的提升。该方法轻量、可微分，无需额外可学习参数即可无缝集成到现有DDSP-QbE训练流程中。

Conclusion: 通过浊音检测和PolyBLEP校正两种针对性改进，显著提升了DDSP-QbE语音转换系统的激励信号质量，减少了混叠伪影，改善了感知自然度，同时保持了系统的轻量化和可微分特性。

Abstract: Differentiable Digital Signal Processing (DDSP) pipelines for voice conversion rely on subtractive synthesis, where a periodic excitation signal is shaped by a learned spectral envelope to reconstruct the target voice. In DDSP-QbE, the excitation is generated via phase accumulation, producing a sawtooth-like waveform whose abrupt discontinuities introduce aliasing artefacts that manifest perceptually as buzziness and spectral distortion, particularly at higher fundamental frequencies. We propose two targeted improvements to the excitation stage of the DDSP-QbE subtractive synthesizer. First, we incorporate explicit voicing detection to gate the harmonic excitation, suppressing the periodic component in unvoiced regions and replacing it with filtered noise, thereby avoiding aliased harmonic content where it is most perceptually disruptive. Second, we apply Polynomial Band-Limited Step (PolyBLEP) correction to the phase-accumulated oscillator, substituting the hard waveform discontinuity at each phase wrap with a smooth polynomial residual that cancels alias-generating components without oversampling or spectral truncation. Together, these modifications yield a cleaner harmonic roll-off, reduced high-frequency artefacts, and improved perceptual naturalness, as measured by MOS. The proposed approach is lightweight, differentiable, and integrates seamlessly into the existing DDSP-QbE training pipeline with no additional learnable parameters.

</details>


### [694] [Noise-Aware In-Context Learning for Hallucination Mitigation in ALLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09021)
*Qixuan Huang,Khalid Zaman,Masashi Unoki*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出噪声感知上下文学习(NAICL)方法，通过构建噪声先验库来减少听觉大语言模型的幻觉问题，并建立了音频字幕任务的幻觉基准数据集和评估指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有听觉大语言模型存在幻觉问题，当前的幻觉评估方法过于简单（二元分类），无法捕捉生成任务中更复杂的幻觉模式，且现有的缓解策略依赖微调，计算成本高。

Method: 提出插件式噪声感知上下文学习(NAICL)方法：1) 构建噪声先验库；2) 检索与输入音频相关的噪声示例；3) 将其作为上下文先验，引导模型在声学证据不足时减少推测性关联，采用更保守的生成策略。

Result: 1) 所有评估的听觉大语言模型都表现出相同的幻觉行为；2) NAICL方法将总体幻觉率从26.53%降低到16.98%；3) 建立了Clotho-1K多事件基准数据集，定义了四种听觉幻觉类型，并引入了幻觉类型分布等细粒度分析指标。

Conclusion: NAICL方法有效缓解了听觉大语言模型的幻觉问题，无需微调即可实现显著改进，同时建立的幻觉基准为未来研究提供了细粒度评估框架。

Abstract: Auditory large language models (ALLMs) have demonstrated strong general capabilities in audio understanding and reasoning tasks. However, their reliability is still undermined by hallucination issues. Existing hallucination evaluation methods are formulated as binary classification tasks, which are insufficient to characterize the more complex hallucination patterns that arise in generative tasks. Moreover, current hallucination mitigation strategies rely on fine-tuning, resulting in high computational costs. To address the above limitations, we propose a plug-and-play Noise-Aware In-Context Learning (NAICL) method. Specifically, we construct a noise prior library, retrieve noise examples relevant to the input audio, and incorporate them as contextual priors, thereby guiding the model to reduce speculative associations when acoustic evidence is insufficient and to adopt a more conservative generation strategy. In addition, we establish a hallucination benchmark for audio caption tasks including the construction of the Clotho-1K multi-event benchmark dataset, the definition of four types of auditory hallucinations, and the introduction of metrics such as hallucination type distribution to support fine-grained analysis. Experimental results show that all evaluated ALLMs exhibit same hallucination behaviors. Moreover, the proposed NAICL method reduces the overall hallucination rate from 26.53% to 16.98%.

</details>


### [695] [AudioGuard: Toward Comprehensive Audio Safety Protection Across Diverse Threat Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08867)
*Mintong Kang,Chen Fang,Bo Li*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 论文提出AudioSafetyBench音频安全基准和AudioGuard统一护栏系统，用于解决音频基础模型特有的安全风险，包括音频原生有害事件、说话人属性、语音克隆滥用等复杂威胁。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 音频已成为基础模型的主要接口，但音频安全比"不安全文本朗读"更复杂，涉及音频原生有害声音事件、说话人属性（如儿童声音）、语音克隆滥用以及语音内容组合危害等独特风险。现有方法缺乏针对音频特有风险的综合基准和防护措施。

Method: 1）通过大规模红队测试系统发现音频漏洞；2）建立基于策略的音频风险分类法；3）创建AudioSafetyBench基准，支持多语言、可疑声音（名人/儿童声音）、风险语音内容组合和非语音声音事件；4）提出AudioGuard统一护栏系统，包括SoundGuard（波形级音频原生检测）和ContentGuard（基于策略的语义保护）。

Result: 在AudioSafetyBench和四个补充基准上的广泛实验表明，AudioGuard相比基于音频LLM的基线方法，持续提高了护栏准确性，并显著降低了延迟。

Conclusion: 该研究填补了音频安全领域的空白，提供了首个基于策略的音频安全基准和统一的防护系统，有效应对音频特有的复杂风险场景，为音频基础模型的安全部署提供了重要工具。

Abstract: Audio has rapidly become a primary interface for foundation models, powering real-time voice assistants. Ensuring safety in audio systems is inherently more complex than just "unsafe text spoken aloud": real-world risks can hinge on audio-native harmful sound events, speaker attributes (e.g., child voice), impersonation/voice-cloning misuse, and voice-content compositional harms, such as child voice plus sexual content. The nature of audio makes it challenging to develop comprehensive benchmarks or guardrails against this unique risk landscape. To close this gap, we conduct large-scale red teaming on audio systems, systematically uncover vulnerabilities in audio, and develop a comprehensive, policy-grounded audio risk taxonomy and AudioSafetyBench, the first policy-based audio safety benchmark across diverse threat models. AudioSafetyBench supports diverse languages, suspicious voices (e.g., celebrity/impersonation and child voice), risky voice-content combinations, and non-speech sound events. To defend against these threats, we propose AudioGuard, a unified guardrail consisting of 1) SoundGuard for waveform-level audio-native detection and 2) ContentGuard for policy-grounded semantic protection. Extensive experiments on AudioSafetyBench and four complementary benchmarks show that AudioGuard consistently improves guardrail accuracy over strong audio-LLM-based baselines with substantially lower latency.

</details>


### [696] [Selective Attention System (SAS): Device-Addressed Speech Detection for Real-Time On-Device Voice AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08412)
*David Joohun Kim,Daniyal Anjum,Bonny Banerjee,Omar Abbasi*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: 提出SDAR框架和SAS系统，用于边缘设备上的设备寻址语音检测，将任务建模为基于交互历史的序列路由问题而非单次话语分类，显著提升多说话人环境下的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在ASR前的边缘部署场景中，系统需要在严格延迟和计算限制下决定是否转发音频。多说话人环境中存在时间模糊的话语，传统的话语局部分类方法效果有限，需要更有效的建模方式。

Method: 提出序列设备寻址路由(SDAR)框架，将任务形式化为基于交互历史的序列路由问题。实现选择性注意系统(SAS)，在ARM Cortex-A级硬件上完全在设备端运行，支持音频和音视频融合配置。

Result: 纯音频配置在60小时多说话人英语测试集上达到F1=0.86；音视频融合提升至F1=0.95。移除因果交互历史使F1从0.95降至0.57±0.03，表明短期交互历史包含重要决策信息。系统延迟<150ms，占用<20MB。

Conclusion: 在多说话人环境中，将设备寻址语音检测建模为序列路由问题优于话语局部分类。交互历史对决策至关重要，SAS系统在边缘设备上实现了高效部署，音视频融合显著提升性能。

Abstract: We study device-addressed speech detection under pre-ASR edge deployment constraints, where systems must decide whether to forward audio before transcription under strict latency and compute limits. We show that, in multi-speaker environments with temporally ambiguous utterances, this task is more effectively modelled as a sequential routing problem over interaction history than as an utterance-local classification task. We formalize this as Sequential Device-Addressed Routing (SDAR) and present the Selective Attention System (SAS), an on-device implementation that instantiates this formulation.
  On a held-out 60-hour multi-speaker English test set, the primary audio-only configuration achieves F1=0.86 (precision=0.89, recall=0.83); with an optional camera, audio+video fusion raises F1 to 0.95 (precision=0.97, recall=0.93). Removing causal interaction history (Stage~3) reduced F1 from 0.95 to 0.57+/-0.03 in the audio+video configuration under our evaluation protocol. Among the tested components, this was the largest observed ablation effect, indicating that short-horizon interaction history carries substantial decision-relevant information in the evaluated setting. SAS runs fully on-device on ARM Cortex-A class hardware (<150 ms latency, <20 MB footprint). All results are from internal evaluation on a proprietary dataset evaluated primarily in English; a 5-hour evaluation subset may be shared for independent verification (Section 8.8).

</details>


### [697] [Semantic Noise Reduction via Teacher-Guided Dual-Path Audio-Visual Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08147)
*Linge Wang,Yingying Chen,Bingke Zhu,Lu Zhou,Jinqiao Wang*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: TG-DP：教师引导的双路径框架，通过解耦重建和对齐目标，改进音频-视觉表示学习，在零样本检索和线性探测任务上达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有音频-视觉表示学习方法将对比对齐与掩码重建联合优化，导致对比分支被迫使用为重建设计的随机可见补丁，引入语义噪声和优化干扰，影响跨模态对齐效果。

Method: 提出TG-DP（Teacher-Guided Dual-Path）框架，将重建和对齐解耦到独立的优化路径。对比路径使用更适合跨模态对齐的可见模式，教师模型为组织该分支的可见token提供辅助指导，减少干扰并稳定跨模态表示学习。

Result: 在AudioSet上，视频到音频检索R@1从35.2%提升至37.4%，音频到视频检索从27.9%提升至37.1%。在AS20K和VGGSound上的线性探测任务也达到SOTA性能，表明学习到的表示具有语义鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 解耦多模态目标并在对比路径中引入教师引导结构，为改进大规模音频-视觉预训练提供了有效框架，显著提升了零样本检索和下游任务性能。

Abstract: Recent advances in audio-visual representation learning have shown the value of combining contrastive alignment with masked reconstruction. However, jointly optimizing these objectives in a single forward pass forces the contrastive branch to rely on randomly visible patches designed for reconstruction rather than cross-modal alignment, introducing semantic noise and optimization interference. We propose TG-DP, a Teacher-Guided Dual-Path framework that decouples reconstruction and alignment into separate optimization paths. By disentangling the masking regimes of the two branches, TG-DP enables the contrastive pathway to use a visibility pattern better suited to cross-modal alignment. A teacher model further provides auxiliary guidance for organizing visible tokens in this branch, helping reduce interference and stabilize cross-modal representation learning. TG-DP achieves state-of-the-art performance in zero-shot retrieval. On AudioSet, it improves R@1 from 35.2\% to 37.4\% for video-to-audio retrieval and from 27.9\% to 37.1\% for audio-to-video retrieval. The learned representations also remain semantically robust, achieving state-of-the-art linear-probe performance on AS20K and VGGSound. Taken together, our results suggest that decoupling multimodal objectives and introducing teacher-guided structure into the contrastive pathway provide an effective framework for improving large-scale audio-visual pretraining. Code is available at https://github.com/wanglg20/TG-DP.

</details>


### [698] [DeepForestSound: a multi-species automatic detector for passive acoustic monitoring in African tropical forests, a case study in Kibale National Park](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08087)
*Gabriel Dubus,Théau d'Audiffret,Claire Auger,Raphaël Cornette,Sylvain Haupert,Innocent Kasekendi,Raymond Katumba,Hugo Magaldi,Lise Pernel,Harold Rugonge,Jérôme Sueur,John Justice Tibesigwa,Sabrina Krief*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: DeepForestSound (DFS) 是一个针对非洲热带森林被动声学监测的多物种自动检测模型，通过半监督管道结合无标注录音聚类与人工验证，使用低秩适应微调音频频谱变换器，在灵长类和象类检测上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非洲热带森林的被动声学监测应用受到标注数据稀缺的限制，导致通用生态声学模型在代表性不足的分类群上性能下降，需要开发针对特定区域和任务的检测模型。

Method: 提出DeepForestSound (DFS)模型，采用半监督管道：1) 对无标注录音进行聚类和人工验证；2) 使用低秩适应(LoRA)微调音频频谱变换器(AST)，并与冻结骨干的线性基线(DFS-Linear)进行比较。模型支持检测鸟类、灵长类和象类等多个分类群。

Result: 在乌干达基巴莱国家公园Sebitoli地区训练，在两年后同一森林不同地点独立数据集上评估。在12个分类群中的8个上优于现有自动检测工具，特别是非鸟类分类群：灵长类平均AP 0.964，象类0.961。LoRA微调在所有分类群上都显著优于线性探测。

Conclusion: 面向任务的区域特定训练显著提高了声学复杂热带环境中的检测性能，DFS展示了作为非洲雨林生物多样性监测和保护实用工具的潜力。

Abstract: Passive Acoustic Monitoring (PAM) is widely used for biodiversity assessment. Its application in African tropical forests is limited by scarce annotated data, reducing the performance of general-purpose ecoacoustic models on underrepresented taxa. In this study, we introduce DeepForestSound (DFS), a multi-species automatic detection model designed for PAM in African tropical forests. DFS relies on a semi-supervised pipeline combining clustering of unannotated recordings with manual validation, followed by supervised fine-tuning of an Audio Spectrogram Transformer (AST) using low-rank adaptation, which is compared to a frozen-backbone linear baseline (DFS-Linear). The framework supports the detection of multiple taxonomic groups, including birds, primates, and elephants, from long-term acoustic recordings. DFS was trained on acoustic data collected in the Sebitoli area, in Kibale National Park, Uganda, and evaluated on an independent dataset recorded two years later at different locations within the same forest. This evaluation therefore assesses generalization across time and recording sites within a single tropical forest ecosystem. Across 8 out of 12 taxons, DFS outperforms existing automatic detection tools, particularly for non-avian taxa, achieving average AP values of 0.964 for primates and 0.961 for elephants. Results further show that LoRA-based fine-tuning substantially outperforms linear probing across taxa. Overall, these results demonstrate that task-oriented, region-specific training substantially improves detection performance in acoustically complex tropical environments, and highlight the potential of DFS as a practical tool for biodiversity monitoring and conservation in African rainforests.

</details>


### [699] [AT-ADD: All-Type Audio Deepfake Detection Challenge Evaluation Plan](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08184)
*Yuankun Xie,Haonan Cheng,Jiayi Zhou,Xiaoxuan Guo,Tao Wang,Jian Liu,Weiqiang Wang,Ruibo Fu,Xiaopeng Wang,Hengyan Huang,Xiaoying Huang,Long Ye,Guangtao Zhai*

Main category: cs.SD

TL;DR: ACM Multimedia 2026 AT-ADD挑战赛：针对音频大语言模型生成的各种音频类型（语音、音效、歌声、音乐）的深度伪造检测，包含鲁棒语音检测和全类型音频检测两个赛道。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 音频大语言模型（ALLMs）能够高效生成高保真的语音和非语音音频（音效、歌声、音乐），这带来了创造性和内容生产的便利，但也引发了严重的安全和信任问题。现有音频深度伪造检测方法主要针对语音，依赖语音特定伪影，对真实世界失真鲁棒性有限，且难以泛化到异构音频类型和新兴伪造技术。

Method: 提出ACM Multimedia 2026的All-Type Audio Deepfake Detection（AT-ADD）大挑战，包含两个赛道：1）鲁棒语音深度伪造检测：在真实场景下评估检测器，并针对未见的最新语音生成方法；2）全类型音频深度伪造检测：将检测范围扩展到语音之外的多样化未知音频类型，促进跨语音、音效、歌声和音乐的类型无关泛化。

Result: 通过提供标准化数据集、严格评估协议和可复现基线，AT-ADD旨在加速鲁棒且可泛化的音频取证技术发展，支持安全通信、可靠媒体验证和合成音频普及时代的负责任治理。

Conclusion: AT-ADD挑战赛旨在弥合受控学术评估与实际多媒体取证之间的差距，推动音频深度伪造检测技术向更鲁棒、更通用的方向发展，以应对音频大语言模型带来的安全挑战。

Abstract: The rapid advancement of Audio Large Language Models (ALLMs) has enabled cost-effective, high-fidelity generation and manipulation of both speech and non-speech audio, including sound effects, singing voices, and music. While these capabilities foster creativity and content production, they also introduce significant security and trust challenges, as realistic audio deepfakes can now be generated and disseminated at scale. Existing audio deepfake detection (ADD) countermeasures (CMs) and benchmarks, however, remain largely speech-centric, often relying on speech-specific artifacts and exhibiting limited robustness to real-world distortions, as well as restricted generalization to heterogeneous audio types and emerging spoofing techniques. To address these gaps, we propose the All-Type Audio Deepfake Detection (AT-ADD) Grand Challenge for ACM Multimedia 2026, designed to bridge controlled academic evaluation with practical multimedia forensics. AT-ADD comprises two tracks: (1) Robust Speech Deepfake Detection, which evaluates detectors under real-world scenarios and against unseen, state-of-the-art speech generation methods; and (2) All-Type Audio Deepfake Detection, which extends detection beyond speech to diverse, unknown audio types and promotes type-agnostic generalization across speech, sound, singing, and music. By providing standardized datasets, rigorous evaluation protocols, and reproducible baselines, AT-ADD aims to accelerate the development of robust and generalizable audio forensic technologies, supporting secure communication, reliable media verification, and responsible governance in an era of pervasive synthetic audio.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [700] [2D or 3D: Who Governs Salience in VLA Models? -- Tri-Stage Token Pruning Framework with Modality Salience Awareness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09244)
*Zihao Zheng,Sicheng Tian,Zhihao Mao,Lingyue Zhang,Chenyue Li,Ziyun Zhang,Hong Gao,Yuchen Huang,Yutong Xu,Guojie Luo,Xiang Chen*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对多视觉模态VLA模型的三阶段令牌剪枝框架，通过分析2D/3D模态显著性差异实现高效推理加速


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多视觉模态VLA模型虽然提升了空间感知能力，但由于模态扩展导致输入令牌数量增加，面临更大的加速需求。现有的令牌剪枝方案专为2D-only VLA模型设计，忽略了2D/3D模态显著性差异。

Method: 提出三阶段分析框架捕捉2D/3D模态显著性差异和动态特性，基于此设计三阶段令牌剪枝框架，实现最优2D/3D令牌选择和高效剪枝。

Result: 实验表明，该框架在最小精度损失下实现最高2.55倍推理加速，仅产生5.8%的开销。

Conclusion: 提出的三阶段令牌剪枝框架能有效解决MVLA模型因模态扩展带来的加速需求，通过考虑2D/3D模态显著性差异实现高效推理优化。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as the mainstream of embodied intelligence. Recent VLA models have expanded their input modalities from 2D-only to 2D+3D paradigms, forming multi-visual-modal VLA (MVLA) models. Despite achieving improved spatial perception, MVLA faces a greater acceleration demand due to the increased number of input tokens caused by modal expansion. Token pruning is an effective optimization methods tailored to MVLA models. However, existing token pruning schemes are designed for 2D-only VLA models, ignoring 2D/3D modality salience differences. In this paper, we follow the application process of multi-modal data in MVLA models and develop a tri-stage analysis to capture the discrepancy and dynamics of 2D/3D modality salience. Based on these, we propose a corresponding tri-stage token pruning framework for MVLA models to achieve optimal 2D/3D token selection and efficient pruning. Experiments show that our framework achieves up to a 2.55x inference speedup with minimal accuracy loss, while only costing 5.8% overhead. Our Code is coming soon.

</details>


### [701] [QoS-QoE Translation with Large Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08703)
*Yingjie Yu,Mingyuan Wu,Ahmadreza Eslaminia,Lingzhi Zhao,Kaizhuo Yan,Klara Nahrstedt*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 该论文提出了首个结构化QoS-QoE关系数据集，通过自动化流程从多媒体文献中提取关系，并评估了LLM在QoS-QoE双向翻译任务上的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有QoS-QoE关系研究分散在不同论文、实验设置和报告格式中，缺乏系统性整理，限制了跨场景泛化和大规模分析。需要构建结构化数据集来解决这一差距。

Method: 采用自动化流程构建数据集：1) 论文筛选与整理；2) QoS-QoE关系提取；3) 迭代数据评估。每个记录包含提取的关系、参数定义、支持证据和上下文元数据。进一步评估LLM在数据集上的性能，包括监督微调前后在连续值和离散标签预测任务上的表现。

Result: 构建了首个结构化QoS-QoE翻译数据集，专注于视频流相关任务。LLM在QoS-QoE双向翻译任务上表现出色，包括从QoS到QoE和从QoE到QoS的连续值和离散标签预测。数据集和代码已公开。

Conclusion: 提出的数据集为QoS-QoE翻译的LLM基准测试提供了基础，支持未来基于LLM的多媒体质量预测和优化推理。公开数据集促进了可重复性和开放访问。

Abstract: QoS-QoE translation is a fundamental problem in multimedia systems because it characterizes how measurable system and network conditions affect user-perceived experience. Although many prior studies have examined this relationship, their findings are often developed for specific setups and remain scattered across papers, experimental settings, and reporting formats, limiting systematic reuse, cross-scenario generalization, and large-scale analysis. To address this gap, we first introduce QoS-QoE Translation dataset, a source-grounded dataset of structured QoS-QoE relationships from the multimedia literature, with a focus on video streaming related tasks. We construct the dataset through an automated pipeline that combines paper curation, QoS-QoE relationship extraction, and iterative data evaluation. Each record preserves the extracted relationship together with parameter definitions, supporting evidence, and contextual metadata. We further evaluate the capability of large language models (LLMs) on QoS-QoE translation, both before and after supervised fine-tuning on our dataset, and show strong performance on both continuous-value and discrete-label prediction in bidirectional translation, from QoS-QoE and QoE-QoS. Our dataset provides a foundation for benchmarking LLMs in QoS-QoE translation and for supporting future LLM-based reasoning for multimedia quality prediction and optimization. The complete dataset and code are publicly available at https://yyu6969.github.io/qos-qoe-translation-page/, for full reproducibility and open access.

</details>
